title: Experienced Meta Ads Assistant
description:
Job Title: Experienced Meta Ads Assistant for a Growing E-Commerce Brand



We are looking for an experienced Meta Ads Assistant to join our growing e-commerce team.



We are a young e-commerce company that recently started, and we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. We need a reliable, detail-oriented, and organized person who has experience working inside Meta Ads Manager.



Please note: this position is only for someone with previous experience. We are not looking for a beginner or someone who still needs basic training.



Important: you will not be responsible for the ad strategy. We are looking for someone who can support us by uploading, setting up, and organizing ads based on clear instructions.



Your responsibilities will include:

- Uploading creatives in Meta Ads Manager

- Entering primary text, headlines, and descriptions

- Setting up campaigns, ad sets, and ads based on instructions

- Checking that everything is correct before publishing

- Keeping ads organized and structured inside Ads Manager

- Spotting mistakes and reporting them

- Working carefully and accurately inside Meta Ads Manager



Requirements:

- Proven experience with Meta Ads Manager

- Experience with uploading and setting up ads

- Able to follow instructions carefully

- Strong attention to detail

- Reliable and organized

- Good written English

- Able to work independently

- Interested in a long-term role



Bonus if you have experience with:

-
 ads

- Instagram ads

- E-commerce brands

- Working with ad creatives and ad copy

- Shopify or product-based online stores



About us:

We are building a growing e-commerce brand and are looking for the right people to grow with us. We want to build a strong team with people who are serious about long-term work and who want to be part of something from the beginning.



Salary:

- $3 to $5 per hour

- Rate depends on experience and skill level



What we offer:

- Long-term opportunity

- Friendly work environment

- Clear communication

- Opportunity to grow with the company



To apply, please send:

- A short introduction about yourself

- Your experience with Meta Ads Manager

- Your experience with uploading and setting up ads

- Examples of your previous work

- Your availability



Important:

Please include the words “Ads Ready” in your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: LinkedIn Content Strategist
description:
This is a One-Time Consulting Engagement with Quarterly Evaluations.



Overview

We're seeking a LinkedIn Content Strategist to build a structured, repeatable content system that translates our brand identity into consistent authority-building messaging designed to maintain and grow brand awareness, and attract passive real estate investors to our investment opportunities.



This is a strategic advisory engagement: you define direction and strategy; we execute and implement; we reconvene quarterly to review performance and refine approach.



We handle content writing, posting, and day-to-day execution internally. You own the blueprint.



What We Already Have

• Core Identity: Calm operator, disciplined allocator, long-term thinker, thought leader

• Tone: Calm, measured, direct, clear, confident without hype

• Audience: High-income professionals (W2/business owners), operators, sophisticated investors

• Objective: Build brand awareness and attract passive real estate investors through story-driven content that demonstrates disciplined investing philosophy, market insight, and track record

• Positioning: Structured, selective, disciplined, focused on downside protection, measured under pressure

• Writing Standards: First-person ("I"), under 250 words, short paragraphs, clean spacing, plain language (no jargon, no academic tone), no emojis, no hard CTAs



Your Responsibilities

1. Content Strategy & Direction

• Transform our existing brand, tone, and audience into a clear, structured content direction

• Define content pillars (what we talk about) and content themes (monthly/quarterly focus areas)

• Establish content angles and narrative approaches for each topic

• Ensure all strategy aligns with our positioning and resonates with our target audience

2. Content System & Planning

• Build month-by-month content plans with specific post ideas and angles (not full writing)

• Develop post frameworks that guide storytelling structure, hooks, and flow

• Create format guidance: when to use text-only vs. carousel, visual presentation standards

• Establish content repurposing principles to extend high-performing ideas across multiple formats

• Design a repeatable system that removes guesswork and ensures consistency

3. Performance Guidance

• Define key metrics to track: engagement, reach, inbound investor inquiries, content patterns that attract qualified passive investors

• Recommend evaluation frameworks to assess how content drives investor awareness and interest

• Provide best practices and reference examples from real estate investment and operator communities

• Build a foundation for ongoing optimization that keeps content focused on investor attraction



Engagement Model

Phase 1 – Initial Strategy

• Discovery and alignment on brand, audience, and objectives

• Deliver complete content strategy, pillars, frameworks, and first month plan

• Handoff: detailed documentation and system for internal execution

Phase 2 – Quarterly Reviews 

• We implement and execute; you advise quarterly

• Review performance, refine strategy, adjust themes and angles as needed

• Quarterly check-ins to keep content system sharp and responsive to market/audience shifts



Final Deliverables (Initial Engagement)

• Content pillars and themes

• 3-month rolling content plans (topics + angles)

• Post frameworks and structure guidelines

• Content system and process documentation

• Performance metrics and optimization guidance



Ideal Candidate

• Proven LinkedIn content strategy experience (strategy, direction, and planning—not limited to writing/posting)

• Personal branding expertise for investors, operators, or founders in high-net-worth communities

• Deep knowledge of real estate investment and capital raising dynamics—you understand what attracts passive investors

• Systems thinker who translates strategy into clear, actionable frameworks

• Deep understanding of LinkedIn dynamics and authority-building mechanics that drive investor interest

• Strategic clarity: ability to craft narratives that position a firm as disciplined, selective, and trustworthy

• Excellent communicator who can document and distill complex investment philosophy into compelling, accessible content



Why Work With Us

• Clear, collaborative relationship: you own strategy; we own execution

• Quarterly touchpoints keep strategy fresh without requiring ongoing day-to-day involvement

• Work with a disciplined, thoughtful leadership team that values clarity and long-term thinking

• Opportunity to build a repeatable system that scales across a growing portfolio

title: People & Culture Leader
description:
If you run HR by waiting to be told what to do, this is not for you. We need someone who walks into ambiguity and builds order.



About the Role

Aureus Financial is a multi-division financial services and education group serving seven and eight-figure business owners across Australia. We have a team of 65-plus people across education, wealth advice, accounting, mortgage broking, and property. We move fast, hold high standards, and we are scaling.



We have split our HR function into internal and external. This role owns internal HR completely. Within 30 to 60 days of you starting, you will hire a People & Culture Coordinator who handles execution. Your job is to build the system, lead that person, and partner with our department heads to embed performance culture across the business.



Performance management at Aureus is a collaboration. You design the framework and the cadence. Department heads run the conversations with their teams. You hold them accountable to the schedule and the standard. This is the model — you need to be able to build it and make it stick without being heavy-handed.



Why This Role Is Worth Your Time

You will own the entire internal HR function — full design authority, no one telling you how to structure it.

You will hire and lead your own direct report within 60 days — this is a people leadership role, not a solo operator role.

Direct access to the CEO and Group Operations Leader from day one.

You will build the performance infrastructure for a growing business and get to see it work at scale.

PHP 100,
,000 per month, based on experience + performance bonus



What You Will Own

Pillar 1 — Team Leadership & HR Systems

Hire and lead a People & Culture Coordinator within your first 60 days

Design every HR process so it is a documented, repeatable system your Coordinator can run

Own compliance across all HR platforms and employment documentation



Pillar 2 — Talent Acquisition & Performance Framework

Accountable for all hiring outcomes — your Coordinator handles execution, you set the standard

Build the monthly performance review framework and partner with department heads to run it — they own the conversations, you own the system

Design KPI scorecards for every role and train department heads to use them



Pillar 3 — Culture & Strategic Leadership

Engagement initiatives measured by retention and satisfaction scores — not activity

Workforce planning and succession with the executive team

Act as trusted advisor to department heads on people challenges



How We Measure Success

P&C Coordinator hired and operating within 60 days

Monthly performance review cycle running across all divisions with department heads facilitating

Roles filled in under 30 days, every time

Friday Self Assessment completion above 90% with weekly trend reports actioned

Zero employment compliance breaches

Employee satisfaction above 4 out of 5 on quarterly surveys



This Role Is For You If

You have led HR in a 65+ person, multi-entity, fast-moving environment and thrived without hand-holding

You have built HR frameworks from scratch and then trained others to run them

You are comfortable influencing department heads who do not report to you

You know how to hire well — and can build a process that finds A-players consistently

You measure your work by business outcomes: retention, review completion, time-to-fill — not activity



This Role Is NOT For You If

You want to be the one running every review, handling every HR ticket, and staying in execution permanently

You have not been a HR leader in a 65+ person organization

You struggle to influence stakeholders who do not report to you

You have never led or managed a direct report

You have only maintained HR systems — never designed one from the ground up

You need to be told what to work on each week



Base Salary: PHP 100,
,000php per month + bonus

Work Style: Fully remote

Hours: Aligned to Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Reports To: Group Operations Leader



How to Apply

We use VideoAsk for initial screening. Do not send a CV
.

You will be asked to complete a short async video screening (6 questions, approximately 15 minutes). Instructions will be sent after you express interest via our careers page or the link provided.

Applications without a completed VideoAsk will not be reviewed.

title: Wix Website Developer
description:
We are looking for an experienced Wix Website Developer to support ongoing improvements and updates on our existing websites. All of our websites are already built on Wix, so this role does not involve building websites from scratch.



You will be responsible for making design refinements, layout adjustments, content updates, and general optimizations to improve usability, performance, and visual consistency across our sites.



Responsibilities:

1. Edit and enhance existing Wix websites

2. Improve layouts, spacing, and overall page structure

3. Update content, images, and sections as needed

4. Create and modify Wix forms and basic site integrations

5. Optimize pages for better performance and user experience

6. Ensure consistency across desktop and mobile versions



Requirements:

1. Proven experience working with Wix

2. Good eye for design and attention to detail

3. Ability to follow clear instructions and improve existing designs

4. Basic understanding of UX/UI and website best practices

5. Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines



Nice to Have:

1. Experience with Wix SEO settings

2. Familiarity with Wix automations and apps

3. This is an ongoing part-time or freelance role with flexible hours. Long-term collaboration is preferred.

title: Quick Books Management
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented QuickBooks Management & Payroll Assistant to support our day-to-day accounting operations. This role focuses on employee setup, time tracking, and payroll-related calculations using QuickBooks.



You will work closely with our internal team to ensure employee hours are correctly recorded, categorized (regular vs. overtime), and prepared for payroll processing. This role does not require advanced accounting — accuracy and consistency are key.



Responsibilities:

1. Manage employee profiles in QuickBooks

2. Enter and update employee work hours

3. Track and calculate regular and overtime hours

4. Review timesheets for accuracy and consistency

5. Assist with payroll preparation and reporting

6. Maintain organized payroll and employee records

7. Communicate clearly regarding any discrepancies or missing information



Requirements:

Experience using QuickBooks (especially payroll and time tracking)

Strong attention to detail and numerical accuracy

Ability to follow clear procedures and instructions

Basic understanding of payroll concepts (regular vs. overtime)

Reliable communication and confidentiality with sensitive data



Nice to Have:

1. Experience with QuickBooks Online Payroll

2. Familiarity with U.S. payroll basics

3. Experience working with hourly employees

4. This is an ongoing part-time or freelance role with flexible hours. Long-term collaboration is preferred.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant - Transaction Coordinator
description:
Responsibilities:

*Coordinate real estate transactions from start to finish, including document preparation, scheduling inspections, and liaising with clients, agents, and vendors.

*Ensure compliance with all legal and contractual requirements throughout the transaction process.

*Maintain accurate records and databases related to real estate transactions.

*Provide excellent customer service and support to clients during the buying or selling process.

*Keep abreast of market trends and industry regulations to provide informed guidance to clients.

*Manage calendars, appointments, and schedules.

*Handle
 correspondence, phone calls, and other communications in a professional and timely manner.

*Assist with data entry, file organization, and document management tasks.

*Conduct research, compile reports, and create presentations as needed.



Qualifications:

*Previous experience as a real estate virtual assistant, fulfillment specialist agent or related role is preferred.

*Knowledge of real estate transactions, contracts, and industry terminology.

*Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and real estate software/tools.

*Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

*Strong organizational and time management abilities.

*Attention to detail and accuracy in handling documentation and data.

*Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a virtual team environment.

*Familiarity with property management processes and best practices is a plus.

title: Short-Form Video Editor / Content Clipper (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)
description:
???? JOB TITLE



Short-Form Video Editor / Content Clipper (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)



?



TYPE OF EMPLOYMENT



Part-Time / Project-Based (Remote)



?



COMPANY NAME



Business Made Fair (BMF)



?



CONTACT NAME



Samiyrah Robinson



?



CONTACT







?



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are hiring multiple Short-Form Video Editors (Clippers) to produce high-performing content for social media.



Your job is simple:

Take raw content and turn it into engaging, fast-paced, attention-grabbing videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



This is a performance-driven role. We are not looking for basic editors—we want people who understand viral content and can produce videos that keep attention and drive views.



You will be working under our Content Manager and Creative Director, following a clear style and structure.



?



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

    •    Clip raw footage into short-form videos (15–60 seconds)

    •    Add captions, subtitles, and on-screen text

    •    Use fast cuts, zooms, and effects to maintain attention

    •    Follow viral content styles and trends

    •    Deliver multiple videos daily or weekly (based on workload)

    •    Organize and label files properly

    •    Meet deadlines consistently



?



IMPORTANT (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



This is a volume + performance role.



You are expected to:

    •    Produce content quickly

    •    Follow instructions and style guidelines

    •    Improve based on feedback



This is NOT a role for slow editors or perfectionists who take hours on one video.



?



REQUIRED SKILLS

    •    Experience editing short-form content (Reels/TikTok/Shorts REQUIRED)

    •    Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar

    •    Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, and retention

    •    Ability to add engaging captions and subtitles

    •    Fast turnaround time

    •    Reliable and responsive



?



BONUS SKILLS (STRONG PLUS)

    •    Experience editing viral content

    •    Understanding of storytelling and hooks

    •    Familiar with trending formats

    •    Experience working with creators or personal brands



?



PAY STRUCTURE (IMPORTANT)



Option 1 (Starter):

    •    $3 – $10 per video (based on quality)



Option 2 (After proving performance):

    •    Base pay + performance bonuses

    •    Bonuses for high-performing videos (views, engagement)



???? Top performers will get consistent work and higher pay.



?



WORKLOAD EXPECTATION

    •    3–10 videos per day (depending on capacity)

    •    Must be able to handle volume



?



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (FILTER OUT WEAK EDITORS)



To apply:

    1.    Send 3–5 videos you have edited (short-form ONLY)

    2.    Include BEFORE & AFTER if possible

    3.    Record a short Loom (2 minutes):

    •    Explain your editing style

    •    What makes a video go viral

    4.    Subject line: “BMF Clipper”

    5.    Send to: [your
]



?



TEST TASK (REQUIRED)



If selected, you will be given a short sample clip to edit.



We are looking for:

    •    Strong hook

    •    Clean captions

    •    Good pacing

    •    Attention retention



?



DESIRED QUALITIES

    •    Fast and efficient

    •    Takes feedback well

    •    Consistent and reliable

    •    Understands viral content (not just editing)

    •    Hungry for growth



?



???? INSTANT DISQUALIFIERS

    •    Slow turnaround

    •    No understanding of hooks

    •    Over-editing / messy visuals

    •    Doesn’t follow instructions

    •    Misses deadlines

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Executive Assistant to provide comprehensive support across multiple areas of our growing, mission-driven business. This role is ideal for a professional with exceptional administrative skills, excellent grammatical abilities, creative design sensibilities, and a strong work ethic.

The ideal candidate is fluent in American English, communicates professionally in both written and verbal formats, and demonstrates the ability to work independently with minimal supervision. This position offers a clear pathway from part-time to full-time based on performance and business growth.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Executive & Administrative Support

• Provide high-level administrative support to the Founder & CEO across multiple business areas • Manage complex calendars, scheduling coaching sessions, keynote engagements, workshops, and client meetings • Handle professional
 correspondence, inbox management, and client communications • Draft, edit, and proofread documents, proposals, capability statements, and presentations with impeccable grammar • Prepare reports, meeting agendas, and internal communications • Organize and maintain digital filing systems using Google Workspace and cloud-based platforms • Track tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups to ensure seamless project execution • Coordinate logistics for virtual and on-site training programs, keynotes, and workshops

Business Operations & Systems Management

• Support day-to-day operations across leadership development, coaching, and speaking services • Manage client onboarding and off boarding processes • Coordinate cohort programs including The Founders Circle™, MasterPeace Experience™, and Leadership Identity Blueprint™ • Utilize and optimize business tools including Google Workspace, Canva, QuickBooks, Acuity Scheduling, Notion, ClickUp, and other productivity platforms • Maintain CRM database and client relationship management systems • Process invoices, track payments, and support financial administration • Anticipate needs, problem-solve proactively, and continuously improve workflows

Government Contracting & Business Development Support

• Support MBE certification process and government contracting initiatives • Research and track federal RFP opportunities in leadership development and training • Assist with proposal preparation and capability statement updates • Maintain compliance documentation (DUNS, UEI, CAGE codes, certifications) • Coordinate with past performance clients for testimonials and contract references • Support SAM.gov registration and updates

Creative & Design Support

• Create and edit graphic design assets for presentations, marketing materials, and client deliverables using Canva • Maintain brand consistency across all documents, visual materials, and digital content • Format and design professional documents including capability statements, proposals, and workshop materials • Support social media content creation and website updates as needed

Faith-Based & Nonprofit Coordination

• Support coordination with Artistic Empowerment Centers, Inc. (501c3 nonprofit) • Assist with Faith-based client communications and ministry leadership activities • Maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion regarding sensitive organizational and client matters at all times



To apply: Please include your resume with experience, including social media, CRM and QB experience, and if you are comfortable committing part time work with possibility of full time work depending on experience and training at the posted salary and that you are willing to use at least 8 points per week for this position.

title: Business Development Manager (SDR Manager) – Enterprise Focus (WFH)
description:

We are looking for someone who can build, lead, and scale a high-performing outbound team targeting enterprise clients.

If you’ve successfully led SDR teams, understand how to break into complex organizations, and know how to consistently generate high-quality pipeline from enterprise accounts — this role is for you.

________________________________________

• Build and optimize outbound strategies across cold calling, LinkedIn, and

• Coach SDRs on navigating multi-threaded enterprise sales cycles

• Own SDR KPIs: pipeline generated, meeting quality, conversion rates, and activity performance

• Strong experience in cold calling, LinkedIn outreach, and outbound
 campaigns

• Experience navigating complex organizations and long sales cycles 

• Data-driven — you understand metrics and know how to improve them 

• Strong coaching ability — you can turn average SDRs into top performers 

• Highly strategic, execution-focused, and results-driven 

________________________________________

What We Value

• Ownership mindset — you take responsibility for results 

• Speed and adaptability — you move and improve fast

• High standards — you don’t settle for average performance

Work Setup (Remote)

Why Join Us

• High visibility role with strong career growth potential

title: Sr. Graphic Designer
description:
We are a growing marketing agency seeking a full-time Sr. Graphic Designer to join our team for 40 hours per week. This role is ideal for a creative, reliable, and detail-oriented designer who can produce strong digital and print work, manage deadlines independently, and support a variety of client brands.



This position is primarily focused on graphic design, including social media graphics, marketing materials, ad creative, branded collateral, and simple animated ads using motion and video assets. Candidates should be comfortable creating light animation and video-based ad creative for digital campaigns. Basic familiarity with web design and preparing assets for digital use is also helpful.



We are looking for someone who is self-motivated, organized, and able to think through projects carefully rather than simply check boxes. The right candidate should have a strong eye for design, understand brand consistency, and be able to work efficiently across multiple projects.



Responsibilities:



 -   Create social media graphics for a variety of client accounts

 -   Design digital marketing materials including ad creative, newsletter graphics, promotional assets, and branded content

 -   Design print materials such as flyers, postcards, business cards, signage, and other collateral

 -   Develop layouts and creative concepts that align with each client’s brand standards and goals

 -   Resize, adapt, and version designs across platforms and formats

 -   Retouch and edit photos as needed

 -   Prepare final files for both digital and print use

 -   Create infographics, icons, illustrations, and other supporting visual assets when needed

 -   Collaborate with tea
mbers on creative direction, revisions, and project execution

 -   Manage assigned tasks independently in ClickUp and provide regular project updates

 -   Meet deadlines consistently and communicate proactively if questions or issues arise

 -   Basic motion or animated graphics support is a plus





Requirements:



-   3+ years of professional graphic design experience

 -   Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite - Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign

 -   Strong understanding of layout, typography, brand consistency, and visual hierarchy

 -   Experience designing for both digital and print

 -   Ability to prepare and organize files correctly for production and web use

 -   Detail-oriented and able to follow direction while also thinking critically

 -   Able to self-manage and work independently in a remote environment

 -   Strong communication skills

 -   Reliable internet connection and consistent availability during working hours

 -   Experience with motion graphics or simple animation is a plus

 -   Basic familiarity with WordPress or Elementor is helpful, but not required



What We’re Looking For:



 -   Someone dependable, proactive, and organized

 -   A designer who produces thoughtful, polished work

 -   Someone who can manage multiple brands without losing attention to detail

 -   A tea
mber who takes ownership of projects and follows through

 -   Someone who is open to feedback and able to implement revisions carefully



Perks We Offer:



   -   Full-time remote position

   -   40 hours per week

   -   Flexible work schedule

   -   Work-from-home setup

   -   13th-month bonus

   -   Opportunity to work across a variety of brands and industries

   -   Long-term growth opportunity within an established marketing agency



To Apply, please respond to this posting by sending us a message including:



 -   a summary of your relevant experience

 -   your general availability

 -   your portfolio with graphic design samples

 -   examples of social media graphics, ad creative, and print materials if available

title: Recruiter
description:
Full-Time | US PST hours | WFH



We are looking for a highly organized and execution-driven Recruiter to own the end-to-end recruiting process and help build scalable hiring systems for a fast-growing eCommerce company.



This is a hybrid strategic and operational role focused on both recruiting execution and process building.



What You Will Do:

• Manage full-cycle recruiting (sourcing, screening, scheduling, and offer coordination)

• Build proactive talent pipelines for recurring and high-priority roles

• Source candidates beyond job boards (LinkedIn, referrals, outreach)

• Conduct structured screening interviews assessing skills and culture fit

• Build and improve hiring processes, SOPs, and workflows

• Maintain ATS and pipeline tracking (ClickUp or similar tools)

• Collaborate with hiring managers and provide regular updates

• Track hiring metrics and identify process improvements



Requirements:

• 3+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience (startup, DTC, or eCommerce preferred)

• Experience managing multiple roles and pipelines simultaneously

• Strong ATS/CRM experience (ClickUp, Greenhouse, Lever, etc.)

• Excellent written and verbal communication

• Highly organized, process-driven, and detail-oriented

• Strong ownership and ability to work independently



Nice to Have:

• Experience building hiring systems or SOPs

• Familiarity with structured hiring frameworks

• Experience hiring for marketing, creative, or technical roles



Please send your resume and answer the questions below

1. Have you managed multiple open roles across different departments simultaneously? If yes, what was the maximum number of open roles you handled at one time?

2. Briefly describe a hiring process or recruiting system you built or significantly improved. What was broken, and what did you change?

3. When managing 5+ open roles at once, how do you prioritize and ensure nothing falls through the cracks?

4. Beyond job boards, what sourcing strategies have you personally used to find strong candidates?

5. Describe a time you had to push back on a hiring manager to protect candidate quality or process integrity. What happened?

6. This role requires proactive pipeline building before roles become urgent. Have you built talent pipelines for future hiring needs before a role officially opened? If yes, briefly explain your approach.

title: Shopify Web Developer / eCommerce Feed Specialist (GMC + Local Inventory) - MUST PROVIDE LOOM
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Shopify developer / eCommerce feed specialist to help optimise our Shopify store, product feeds, and Google Merchant Center (GMC) integration.



This role is focused on resolving issues impacting local inventory accuracy, product feed structure, and Google integrations, and setting up a scalable, reliable system going forward.



Key Responsibilities



Shopify Setup & Data Structure



Shopify POS Lite setup and configuration

Product metafields and custom tagging (In-Store vs Online Only)

Product feed structure and attribute mapping

Shopify Admin API or bulk product editing for large-scale updates



Feed Management & Google Integration



Supplemental feed creation via Google Sheets

Troubleshooting Shopify ? Feed App ? GMC data flow

Feed app evaluation and migration (e.g. DataFeedWatch, Multifeeds, or similar)

Variant-level feed management (1,500+ variants with correct availability and store data)



Local Inventory & Store Integration (Priority)



Local inventory feed configuration:

Store codes

Pickup eligibility

Stock quantity mapping

Google Business Profile linkage with local inventory



App & Integration Management



Shopify app setup, replacement, and optimisation (including Google & YouTube app)

DSZ (dropshipping app) integration review:

Ensuring correct attributes (no pickup, no returns, delivery timeframe)



Frontend / Store Logic



Theme updates to support “Online Only” messaging

Promo code and discount configuration for DSZ products

Priority Focus Areas



The most critical areas to resolve first:



Local Inventory Feed configuration and accuracy

Shopify to GMC data flow and sync issues

Feed app selection and clean migration



These issues are currently causing GMC errors and confusion around in-store vs online availability.



Ideal Candidate

Strong experience with Shopify and Google Merchant Center

Proven experience with local inventory ads and feed setup

Deep understanding of product feeds and attribute mapping

Experience with feed tools (DataFeedWatch, Multifeeds, or similar)

Experience managing large product catalogs (1,000+ variants)

Comfortable with Shopify APIs, metafields, and automation workflows

Experience with dropshipping integrations is a plus

Application Requirement



Please include a short Loom video with your application covering:



Your experience with Shopify and Google Merchant Center

How you would approach the responsibilities outlined above

How you would diagnose and resolve the current issues (especially local inventory feed and GMC sync)



Applications without a Loom video may not be considered.



Engagement

Project-based with potential for ongoing work

Must be able to audit, diagnose, and implement fixes efficiently

Clear communication and documentation required



If you have hands-on experience with Shopify, GMC, and local inventory setups, we’d like to hear from you.

title: Digital Marketing Associate
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a Digital Marketing Associate to work directly with the Owner in supporting and growing our Owner’s Representation (Owner Rep) services within the construction industry.



We are an Owner’s Representation company that manages high-end residential construction projects, acting as the client’s advocate across budgeting, bidding, contracts, construction administration, and closeout. Our marketing efforts focus on clearly communicating our services, processes, and value to homeowners and partners.



This is a stand-alone role within a small team. You will partner closely with the Owner, who will provide direction, draft copy, and raw content (photos, videos, notes). Your role is to refine, design, edit, publish, and distribute this content across our platforms to build credibility, trust, and inbound leads.

 

RESPONSIBILITIES



Content & Publishing

• Refine and organize Owner-provided copy into clear, well-structured content for blogs, landing pages, service pages, and marketing materials.

• Translate construction processes into clear, homeowner-friendly explanations (budgeting, bidding, schedules, change orders, project oversight).

• Publish content in WordPress, including formatting, metadata optimization, and manual indexing.

• Proofread and quality-check content for clarity, accuracy, and consistency.

 

Design

• Create simple visual assets (blog headers, social graphics,
 banners, diagrams, checklists) using Photoshop.

• Apply branding consistently across written, visual, and instructional materials.

 

Video Editing (Beginner–Intermediate)

• Edit videos using Owner-provided footage (explainers, walkthroughs, reels).

• Add basic cuts, captions, overlays, and branding.

• Repurpose long videos into short clips for social media and
.

• Advanced animation or motion graphics are not required.

 

 & Social

• Build and deploy
 campaigns using Owner-provided direction and content.

• Perform basic A/B testing, spam checks, and campaign deployment.

• Plan and publish a monthly social media calendar.

• Engage with comments and questions on platforms such as LinkedIn, Reddit, and YouTube.

 

SEO & Support

• Apply keyword guidance and assist with backlink outreach.

• Support service launches, template releases, and other marketing tasks as needed.

 

ESSENTIAL SKILLS

• Experience with Adobe Photoshop/Canva.

• Beginner-to-intermediate video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci, or similar)

• Good copy organization and editing skills

• Attention to detail, especially for process-driven or instructional content

• Ability to execute independently with clear direction

• Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)

title: Long-Form Youtube Editor / Social Media Editor
description:
About the Role:



I’m a full-time travel, adventure, and music content creator looking for a highly skilled and creative editor who can edit my content across YouTube and short-form platforms.



The primary focus is high-quality long-form YouTube videos, with additional support for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels. This role goes beyond basic editing — I’m looking for someone who understands storytelling, pacing, and audience retention, and can actively contribute ideas to improve content performance. Also who can grow with me over time creatively and financially. 



Key Responsibilities:

 • Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20+ minutes) with strong storytelling, pacing, and retention-focused structure

 • Create short-form content (10–60 seconds) optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

 • Add engaging elements: subtitles, sound effects, music, 
s, transitions, and visual effects

 • Collaborate on content ideas, video concepts, and strategy to improve growth and engagement

 • Design high quality thumbnails for YouTube

 • Create supporting content: teaser clips, story posts, promotional visuals

 • Organize and manage footage efficiently (naming, sorting, versioning)

 • Maintain consistent communication and quick turnaround times



What I’m Looking For:

 • Strong experience editing YouTube content (REQUIRED) 

 • Understanding of YouTube retention, hooks, pacing, and storytelling

 • Ability to match editing style to travel/adventure + personality-driven content

 • Skilled in short-form editing with an understanding of what performs on TikTok/Reels/Youtube Shorts

 • Experience with thumbnails

 • Creative thinker — not just an editor, but someone who can bring ideas and improvements

 • Reliable, communicative, and detail-oriented



Requirements:

 • Strong experience editing long-form YouTube content

 • Ability to create engaging short-form videos

 • Color grading

 • Experience creating thumbnails

 • Good communication and reliability

 • Must have a portfolio (even if small/required to apply)

 • Create one Youtube Video a week

 • Create 1-2 short form videos a day

 • Create short video/pictures for promotion

 • Willing to grow with the creator



Bonus Skills (Big Advantage):

 • Experience working with travel or IRL creators

 • Knowledge of YouTube analytics and performance optimization

 • Basic motion graphics or animation

 • Color grading and audio balancing

 • Understanding of viral trends and platform algorithms (especially the USA style content)



Working Style:

 • Ongoing / long-term position

 • Frequent communication

 • Flexible but expects reliability and accountability



To Apply:



Please include:

 1. Portfolio (especially long-form YouTube videos)

 2. Examples of short-form content

 3. Any thumbnails you’ve created

 4. A short message explaining your experience and editing style

 5.    We can discuss these on a video call.



Important Notice:



While professionalism is important to me, I am a young, chill guy. Please do not respond with AI prompts and overly-professional. As long as you are dedicated, talented, respectful and skilled. 



I do not need a professional style portfolio (while appreciated). I am looking to see previous long form videos, short form videos, use of editing/color grading/subtitles. I want to see your video editing skills over professionalism. I hope we can be friends and make a great team!!

, Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

title: Shopify Web Developer / eCommerce Feed Specialist (GMC + Local Inventory) -MUST PROVIDE LOOM
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Shopify developer / eCommerce feed specialist to help optimise our Shopify store, product feeds, and Google Merchant Center (GMC) integration.



This role is focused on resolving issues impacting local inventory accuracy, product feed structure, and Google integrations, and setting up a scalable, reliable system going forward.



Key Responsibilities



Shopify Setup & Data Structure



Shopify POS Lite setup and configuration

Product metafields and custom tagging (In-Store vs Online Only)

Product feed structure and attribute mapping

Shopify Admin API or bulk product editing for large-scale updates



Feed Management & Google Integration



Supplemental feed creation via Google Sheets

Troubleshooting Shopify ? Feed App ? GMC data flow

Feed app evaluation and migration (e.g. DataFeedWatch, Multifeeds, or similar)

Variant-level feed management (1,500+ variants with correct availability and store data)



Local Inventory & Store Integration (Priority)



Local inventory feed configuration:

Store codes

Pickup eligibility

Stock quantity mapping

Google Business Profile linkage with local inventory



App & Integration Management



Shopify app setup, replacement, and optimisation (including Google & YouTube app)

DSZ (dropshipping app) integration review:

Ensuring correct attributes (no pickup, no returns, delivery timeframe)



Frontend / Store Logic



Theme updates to support “Online Only” messaging

Promo code and discount configuration for DSZ products

Priority Focus Areas



The most critical areas to resolve first:



Local Inventory Feed configuration and accuracy

Shopify to GMC data flow and sync issues

Feed app selection and clean migration



These issues are currently causing GMC errors and confusion around in-store vs online availability.



Ideal Candidate

Strong experience with Shopify and Google Merchant Center

Proven experience with local inventory ads and feed setup

Deep understanding of product feeds and attribute mapping

Experience with feed tools (DataFeedWatch, Multifeeds, or similar)

Experience managing large product catalogs (1,000+ variants)

Comfortable with Shopify APIs, metafields, and automation workflows

Experience with dropshipping integrations is a plus

Application Requirement



Please include a short Loom video with your application covering:



Your experience with Shopify and Google Merchant Center

How you would approach the responsibilities outlined above

How you would diagnose and resolve the current issues (especially local inventory feed and GMC sync)



Applications without a Loom video may not be considered.



Engagement

Project-based with potential for ongoing work

Must be able to audit, diagnose, and implement fixes efficiently

Clear communication and documentation required



If you have hands-on experience with Shopify, GMC, and local inventory setups, we’d like to hear from you.

Marketing & Creative Strategy

Collaboration

???? What Makes This Role Unique

?

?

title: Senior Bookkeeper (US-Based Clients – QuickBooks Online Accounting Expert Expert)
description:
CFO Anywhere is a US based remote CFO and accounting firm providing bookkeeping, financial reporting, and strategic advisory services to growing U.S. businesses.  We are building an offshore accounting team in the Philippines and are looking for a highly experienced bookkeeper with deep knowledge of U.S. accounting and QuickBooks Online, bookkeeping, reconciliation, etc.



Key Responsibilities

• Categorize and record transactions in QuickBooks Online

• Perform monthly bank, credit card, and loan reconciliations

• Assist in month-end close process

• Maintain accurate Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable

• Review financials for accuracy and flag issues

• Assist with sales tax tracking and filings

• Prepare internal financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet)

• Communicate with internal team on issues/questions

• Follow documented SOPs and workflows

• Deadline-driven, a problem solver, a self-starter, able to take direction, and resilient



Required Qualifications (MUST HAVE)

• Minimum 5+ years bookkeeping experience for U.S. companies

• Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online

• Strong understanding of:

o accrual vs. cash accounting

o reconciliations

o financial statements

• Experience handling multiple clients

• Excellent attention to detail

• Strong written English communication



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working with U.S.-based accounting or CPA firms

• Experience with sales tax filings

• Experience with tools like Karbon, 
, Gusto

 

Compensation

• Full-time, long-term role

• Competitive salary based on experience

• Growth opportunities into Senior Accountant role



IMPORTANT – APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

To apply, you MUST:

1. Include the word “CFO Anywhere” in your subject line

2. Record a 2–3 minute video explaining:

o your QuickBooks experience

o how you perform a bank reconciliation

3. Answer this question:  What are the 3 most common mistakes you see in QuickBooks?

title: Google Ads Manager for Local Ads
description:
Hello!



This role manages live Google Ads accounts with real client money, so we need someone with actual experience & skill. If you plan on learning on the job — please do not apply.



We’re a small US-based agency working with local service businesses (plumbing, tree service, etc.), in need of a proven Google Ads manager





What You’ll Do:



- You manage existing campaigns and keep accounts clean, accurate, and stable.

- Launch new campaigns based on info from our client onboarding form

- Weekly search term reviews + negative keywords

- Account hygiene (ads, extensions, locations, budgets)

- Bid/budget adjustments within clear rules

- Conversion tracking setup & audits (calls + forms)

- Identify when accounts are broken, low intent, or should be paused

- Automate or write up performance reports (e.g., written updates: what changed, what’s wrong, what needs a decision, etc)

- You won't need to communicate with clients directly





Requirements:



- 3+ years managing Google Ads hands-on

- Experience with call-based local service businesses

- Ideally experienced working with a marketing agency

- Comfortable saying: “This account won’t work and here’s why” and backing it up with data

- Quick communication (we primarily communicate via-Slack and ClickUp)

- Strong understanding of:

>>> Search intent & match types

>>> Search terms

>>> Negative keyword strategy

>>> Google Tag Manager for in-depth conversion tracking (calls, clicks, form submissions)







Estimated: 5-10 hours/week to start



Long-term role for the right person



Paid test task required







Please reply with the following:

- how many local ad accounts you can manage at 10 hours a week (our clients typically spend 1-5K/mo on local ads in their city)

- Types of businesses and ad campaigns that you've managed

- Tools you’ve used (GTM, GHL, Clickup, CallRail, etc.)

title: Google Ads Specialist (VA) – Full-Time | Agency Role

- Writing and testing ad copy variations

- Monitoring campaign performance daily and making proactive adjustments

- Building reports and presenting insights to clients or account managers

What We're Looking For

---

s

Lead management, follow-up, booking appointments, and CRM organization.



 Required Skills:

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Confident on the phone

• Must be available during U.S. Eastern business hours

What We’re Looking For:

• Takes ownership

• Follows up consistently

To Apply:

If you’re organized, proactive, and serious about helping build a company the right way — we’d love to meet

title: DTC Copywriter - Landing Pages & Brand Copy
description:
Fill out form to apply: 



3-5 years experience required



About Us



We're a DTC e-commerce brand building in the pheromone fragrance and skincare space, selling across the US, and globally. We run paid social at scale and drive traffic into funnels that need to do the heavy lifting- converting cold audiences into buyers without a salesperson in the room.



Our creative engine is strong. Our ads are performing. Now we need copy that meets that standard at every step of the funnel from the first headline on a prelander to the final paragraph on a product page.

This isn't a content marketing role. We don't need blog posts or captions. We need someone who writes copy that sells.

 

The Role



You'll be our dedicated copywriter for landing pages, website pages, and brand copy across our product portfolio. Your primary focus is the funnel: prelanders, product detail pages, bundle pages, and any web-facing copy that sits between a customer and a purchase decision.



Beyond the core funnel, you'll also support us with branding copy as needed things like brand positioning documents, product descriptions,
 sequences, and internal-facing documents that represent the brand voice externally.

You'll work closely with the entire Marketing Tribe – our CEO, Head of CRO, Head of Retention,  Head of Marketing and our Web Designer, and you'll be embedded in our creative feedback loop which means your copy gets tested, measured, and iterated on.

 

What You'll Be Doing



Core - Landing Page & Funnel Copy

•   	Writing and iterating on prelander copy across multiple brands and target market audience

•   	Writing product page copy (headlines, benefit blocks, objection-handling sections, CTAs) that is designed to convert, not just describe

•   	Developing copy variations for A/B tests in collaboration with the CRO lead

•   	Ensuring copy aligns with the ad creative, driving traffic, the message match from ad to page is your responsibility and so on.

•   	Rewriting or refreshing underperforming pages based on test results and performance data

•   	Writing & adapting tone and angle to the relevant audience without losing brand voice ensuring everything is congruent with the angle we are going for



Secondary - Brand & Website Copy

•   	Writing and maintaining product descriptions across the Goda website and internal brand portfolio as needed

•   	Supporting brand positioning and messaging documents when new products or campaigns are in development

•   	Writing copy for bundle pages, offer pages, and promotional campaigns

•   	Assisting with brand copy assets on an as-needed basis - things like FAQ sections, guarantee copy, and trust-building content blocks

•   	Occasionally supporting internal brand documents where external-facing language needs to be polished and on-brand

 

What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

•   	A strong portfolio of conversion-focused copy - we want to see landing pages and web copy, not articles or social posts

•   	Deep understanding of buyer psychology: desire, objection, urgency, trust and how to write to each stage of awareness

•   	Ability to write clean, direct, persuasive copy without over-explaining or over-writing

•   	Experience writing for DTC or direct-response brands,  you know what a hook is, what a benefit statement is, and why most copy buries the lede

•   	Ability to adapt tone across brands & you can write differently for each product without losing the underlying conversion logic

•   	Willingness to have your copy tested and to iterate based on what the data shows, not just what you think sounds good

•   	Reliable output & you can deliver multiple page drafts per week and respond to feedback without needing hand-holding



Strong Advantages

•   	Experience writing for beauty, wellness, or lifestyle DTC brands

•   	Understanding of how ad creative and landing page copy should work together

•   	Ability to write for both English-language markets with awareness of cultural differences in buyer psychology

•   	Some understanding of CRO principles even if you're not running tests yourself, you know what makes a page structure work



Instant No's

•   	You write for brand awareness, not conversion, if your instinct is to make things sound nice rather than make people buy, this isn't the role

•   	You can't take feedback, every piece of copy gets reviewed and iterated, and defensiveness will slow the whole team down

•   	You've never written a landing page or sales page - we need immediate contribution, not someone learning the format on the job

•   	You write in a vacuum, this role requires close collaboration with designers, strategists, and the CRO lead

 

What the First 90 Days Look Like



First 30 Days

•   	Complete onboarding: brand immersion, customer avatar deep-dive, & SOPs

•   	Study existing prelanders and product pages across all brands, understand what's working and where the gaps are

•   	Produce your first set of prelander copy drafts and receive feedback

•   	Establish your working rhythm: turnaround times, revision process, communication norms

60 Days

•   	Delivering copy with minimal revision rounds, you've internalized the brand voice and the conversion framework

•   	Contributing actively to A/B test ideation, bringing copy angles and hypotheses, not just executing briefs

•   	Supporting the Web Designer with page copy that integrates with the visual structure, not just dropped in as an afterthought

•   	Beginning to take on secondary copy needs: product descriptions, offer pages, brand copy requests

90 Days

•   	A trusted, go-to copywriter for anything web-facing-  the team isn't second-guessing your output

•   	Independently developing new copy angles and testing hypotheses based on performance data

•   	Contributing to conversion rate improvement in a measurable, documented way

•   	Reliable at volume & multiple high-quality deliverables per week without quality dropping

 

How We Measure Your Performance

•   	Conversion rate on the pages you write - this is the primary metric

•   	A/B test contribution: how many tests your copy informs and what the results show

•   	Turnaround speed and revision count - fewer rounds is better



Compensation & Benefits

•   	Competitive monthly rate (contractor) to be discussed based on experience

•   	Fully remote - no office, no fixed timezone

•   	Learning & development budget

•   	Access to winning ad and landing page references across our brand portfolio

•   	Clear growth path as the team and brand portfolio expands

•   	Weekly performance reviews and tight feedback loops with senior tea
mbers

•   	Exposure to multi-market DTC operations across US and Southeast Asia

 

???? This is a role for someone who takes copy seriously as a commercial discipline. If you've ever rewritten a headline and watched the numbers move, and wanted to do more of that, you'll fit right in here!

title: Good accent English-Speaking Receptionist (Remote Virtual Assistant)
description:
DOING INTERVIEWS NOW DROP IN AND WE WILL SCREEN YOU.



We're Looking For One Person Who Can Do What Most Can't — Pick Up The Phone And Book The Appointment.

Pure Glow Media is a fast-growing Canadian digital marketing agency managing lead generation for med spas and home renovation companies across the U.S. and Canada. We generate the leads. We build the systems. We run the ads.

The one thing that kills results every single time? Nobody calls fast enough.

Leads go cold in minutes. Every hour a lead sits uncalled is money left on the table — for us and for our clients. We've seen it happen over and over, and we're done letting it happen.

That's where you come in.



What This Job Actually Is

You will be the first human voice a warm lead hears after they raise their hand. Your job is simple and non-negotiable — call within 60 seconds, build rapport fast, and book the appointment. That's it.

You'll be calling on behalf of med spas booking aesthetic consultations and renovation contractors booking in-home estimates. Both audiences are warm — they asked for information. Your job is to convert that interest into a booked slot on a calendar.

You are not doing cold outreach. You are not selling. You are booking.



A Day In This Role Looks Like This

A lead comes in. You get notified immediately. You call within 60 seconds — not 5 minutes, not an hour. You follow a proven script, you handle the common objections you've been trained on, you find a time that works, and you book it. Then you log the outcome and move to the next one.

When someone no-shows, you follow up. When someone reschedules, you make it happen. You track your calls, your pickups, your bookings. Nothing complicated — just consistency.

You'll be working inside GoHighLevel, Slack, and Hot Prospector. Full training is provided on all three.



Who We're Actually Looking For

You've worked in a phone-based role before — call centre, reception, sales, customer service — and you were good at it. Not good in a "I showed up and did my hours" way. Good in a "my numbers were consistently better than the people around me" way.

You speak English clearly and confidently. Clients in Canada and the U.S. need to trust you immediately. Accent is not the issue — clarity, warmth, and confidence are.

You don't need to be chased. When leads come in, you move. You don't wait to be reminded. You don't let things sit. This role rewards urgency.

You can handle rejection without it derailing your day. Some people won't pick up. Some will be rude. You reset and move to the next call. That resilience is not optional.

You have a reliable internet connection, a headset, and a quiet place to work.



What We Provide

Proven call scripts for both med spa and renovation clients. Full CRM training on GoHighLevel, Slack, and Hot Prospector. Phone software set up and ready. A structured onboarding process. Ongoing coaching and support. A full-time, long-term role with a team that actually measures performance and rewards people who deliver.



To Be Considered

Record a 30-second Loom video. Tell us who you are, what phone-based experience you have, and why you're the person who picks up the phone before anyone else would. No scripts. Just talk to us.

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Project Coordinator with CIVIL Experience Only
description:
Role Overview:

Our client is looking for a highly organised and proactive Project Coordinator responsible for supporting the delivery of projects through disciplined administration, documentation, and coordination across all project phases. This role ensures that Project Managers can focus on high-value activities by maintaining the systems, processes, and records that keep commercial and industrial projects on track. The coordinator manages information flow, tracks actions and risks, and ensures nothing falls through the cracks from initiation to completion.



Core Accountabilities

- Scope, Time, Cost & Quality: Coordinate and maintain project scope documentation and schedules while tracking project costs, including claims and variations.

- Commercial & Business Administration: Maintain accurate oversight of the commercial position of each project, ensuring invoicing is current and escalating overdue or at-risk items promptly.

- Project 
ntum: Maintain a current and accurate picture of project status and critical paths, ensuring the team never operates on outdated information.

- Document & Drawing Management: Manage all project drawings, including filing, version control, and mark-ups, while organizing project photography for reporting purposes.

- HSE Tracking: Administratively track the submission and approval status of Construction Management Plans and HSE communication plans.



Qualifications & Experience

MUST-HAVE Experience

- Proven 4-5 years experience in project coordination or administration specifically within commercial or industrial construction.

- Strong proficiency in the Microsoft 365 environment (Excel, Word, and Outlook).

- Experience with Bluebeam or a comparable PDF editing and markup tool for drawing coordination.

- Demonstrated ability in written communication, specifically in producing meeting minutes, status reports, and scope of works.



Additional Experience

- Familiarity with payment claim administration and procurement processes (RFI, RFQ, RFT).

- Ability to create and maintain project registers, risk matrices, and schedules.

title: Social Media Outreach & Sales
description:
ABOUT US

Great American Craft Spirits is a specialty bourbon and craft spirits retail shop based in Rancho Santa Margarita, Southern California. We carry hard-to-find bourbons, allocated bottles, single barrels, and premium craft spirits. We're a small, passionate team focused on building a real community around American whiskey — both in our store and online.

We're growing fast and looking for a motivated, reliable VA to help us expand our presence across social media and connect with the bourbon community online.





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Your primary job is outreach and community engagement across social media platforms on behalf of the business. You'll be helping us connect with bourbon enthusiasts, build relationships, and drive traffic to our online store.



Primary Responsibilities — Social Media Outreach (80% of your time)

Find and engage with bourbon and whiskey enthusiasts on Instagram, TikTok,
, X 
), and Truth Social

Send personalized, friendly outreach messages to potential customers using provided templates and scripts

Build genuine conversations with people in the bourbon community — not spam, real engagement

Respond to comments and DMs on our social accounts

Log all outreach activity in a daily tracking spreadsheet

Submit a short end-of-day report covering outreach completed, responses received, and any leads



Secondary Responsibilities — Product Data Entry (20% of your time)

Help enter and update product listings on our website as needed

Basic research on products we carry (descriptions, tasting notes, bottle details)





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Strong written English — you'll be writing conversational messages that feel natural and human

Comfortable using Instagram, TikTok,
, X, and Truth Social

Organized and detail-oriented — you'll be maintaining a daily tracker

Self-motivated and reliable — you'll work independently with clear instructions

Honest and straightforward — we'd rather you ask a question than guess wrong

Experience with social media outreach, community management, or sales is a plus but not required

Interest in American whiskey, bourbon, or spirits is a bonus — but we'll train you on what you need to know



Please send us the following:

• A short intro about yourself and your experience with social media

• Which platforms you use most and feel most comfortable with

• Your availability and preferred working hours (Philippine time)

• Any previous VA or outreach work you've done — even informal experience counts

title: HIRING: STR Admin / Night Comms Specialist
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term | Remote



IMPORTANT: Real STR / Airbnb experience is required.

Please do not apply if you do not have hands-on short-term rental experience.



We are hiring a highly organized, detail-oriented STR Admin / Night Comms Specialist for our growing short-term rental company based in Las Vegas.



This is primarily an admin and backend role, not just a task-based VA job.



Yes, there are specific responsibilities in this role. But we are not only looking for someone who can complete tasks. We are looking for someone who naturally notices what should be improved, takes ownership of backend systems, keeps platforms clean and current, and helps the company get better without waiting to be told every next step.



The right person for this role lives in systems, software, details, listings, SOPs, organization, and backend upkeep. If a platform adds a new feature, they want to learn it. If something in the listing looks weak, outdated, inconsistent, or inaccurate, they want to fix it. If a process can be improved, they want to improve it. They take pride in keeping the backend sharp, updated, and under control.



Because this is a night shift role, you must also be able to handle guest communication when needed. Most nights are quieter, but if there is a guest issue, emergency, party, or urgent situation, you must be able to step in, communicate clearly, stay calm, and be firm when needed.



Main responsibilities



* Night guest communication when needed

* Late-night issue triage and emergency handling

* Firm communication for parties, noise issues, or rule violations when needed

* Light urgent vendor coordination at night when necessary

* Reservation updates

* Inbox cleanup

* Notes, tagging, and system hygiene

* Listing updates and listing improvement

* Creating and improving Airbnb listings

* SOP updates and backend platform upkeep

* AI photo, upload, and listing support

* Review management and negative review removal support

* Airbnb account issue support

* Owner report support

* Expense tracking, invoice/payment support, and admin follow-up

* Ordering supplies and handling other backend admin tasks when needed



What matters most to us



* Real STR / Airbnb experience

* Strong written English

* High attention to detail

* Strong organization skills

* Comfort with systems and software

* Ability to work independently without being chased

* Strong admin and backend mindset

* Calm, professional guest communication

* Ability to be firm when needed

* A natural instinct to improve systems, listings, SOPs, and backend processes

* Curiosity to learn new tools, software updates, and better ways of doing things



This role is not the right fit for someone who is only strong in customer service but weak in backend admin.

It is also not the right fit for someone who likes quiet admin work but waits to be told what to check, update, improve, or clean up.



We want someone who takes real pride in making the company better from the backend side.



Schedule – Philippines Time



* Monday: OFF

* Tuesday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Wednesday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Thursday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Friday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

* Saturday: OFF

* Sunday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM



Pay

* $5/hour

* Opportunity for increased pay over time based on performance, ownership, reliability, and growth

 accounts and

title: Creative Strategist
description:
This is not a junior role dressed up with a fancy title. We move fast, iterate relentlessly, and hold creative to a high standard. If you need your hand held, this isn't the job. If you're the type who obsessively studies why ads work — read on.



About the role:



We run performance-driven creative for DTC supplement and skincare brands operating on Meta. You'll own the full creative loop — from market research and angle development to hook writing, ad copy, and directing UGC/video concepts. You think in mechanisms, not just aesthetics. You understand that great creative isn't pretty — it converts.



What you'll own:



Deep market and customer research — Reddit, reviews, forums, competitor ads — to uncover real pain points and language patterns

Angle and hook development across awareness levels (unaware to most aware) for every offer and product

Writing high-converting ad copy: hooks, body copy, CTAs for static ads, video scripts, and advertorials

Developing UGC briefs and video concepts with clear direction on hook, story arc, and CTA

Building and maintaining a structured creative testing framework — organized by angle, format, and hypothesis

Analyzing ad performance data and translating results into clear creative learnings and next iterations

Collaborating directly with the media buyer and editor to ensure concepts translate cleanly into production

Staying ahead of what's working on Meta — studying the ad library, top DTC brands, and native content trends



What we require:



Minimum 2 years of hands-on creative strategy experience in DTC — supplements, skincare, or health preferred

A proven track record with Meta paid social — you've written creative that has generated real results, and you can show it

Deep understanding of direct-response copywriting principles — Eugene Schwartz, Claude Hopkins, or equivalent

Ability to write copy that sounds like a real human, not an ad — native, editorial, and conversational styles all in your toolkit

Strong research instincts — you don't guess at customer pain points, you find them

Fluency in awareness-stage targeting — you know how to write differently for cold, warm, and retargeting audiences

You are fast, organized, and self-directed — you don't need daily check-ins to stay on task

Extremely high personal bar for quality — average output is not acceptable to you



What will disqualify you:



Submitting a generic portfolio with no DTC or performance context

Copy that reads like it was written by AI with no editing or voice

No understanding of how a funnel works beyond the ad itself

Inability to explain why a specific creative angle works — or doesn't

Needing extensive revisions to hit a consistent quality standard

To apply



Send your portfolio, 2–3 examples of ad creative you're proud of (with context on performance if possible), and a brief note on the mechanism or angle behind each one. Generic applications will not receive a response.

title: Appointment Setter / Cold Caller — Remote | Roofing & Insurance Restoration
description:
About the Role:

I’m a Senior Project Manager specializing in storm damage insurance restoration, working primarily in Texas and traveling nationwide wherever hail damage is significant enough to work. I’m looking for a hungry, reliable appointment setter to cold call homeowners in storm-affected areas that we discuss and book free roof inspections on my behalf so I can focus on what I do best — closing deals and managing claims.



This is not a customer service role. You’re making outbound calls, following a proven script, and driving one outcome — booked inspections for me. From time to time I may also have additional tasks outside of cold calling, so being adaptable is a plus.



What You’ll Do:

 - Outbound cold calls to homeowners in hail-damaged areas

 - Follow my provided script to qualify homeowners and book free roof inspections

 - Track your calls, contacts, and appointments daily

 - Communicate results and updates with me consistently



What I’m Looking For:

 - Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience (home services, solar, real estate, or insurance preferred)

 - Clear, confident English communication

 - Stable internet connection and a quality headset

 - Self-motivated — you’ll have flexibility but targets are expected

 - Coachable, consistent, and hungry to earn



Pay:

 - $200/week base

 - 5% commission on every deal that closes from your appointments (one roofing deal can range anywhere from $3,000 – $25,000+ depending on roof size)

 - Strong performance means real money — the commission is uncapped



To Apply
