title: LinkedIn Personal Brand Manager (No Entry-Level Role!)
description:
We're looking for a seasoned digital marketing professional to manage and grow the personal brand of a Brisbane-based entrepreneur operating across promotional products, car rental, and AI/automation ventures.



> The Role

You'll own the full LinkedIn presence — content strategy, post creation, engagement, and audience growth. The goal is to position the founder as a thought leader at the intersection of entrepreneurship, AI-powered business systems, and e-commerce innovation.



> What You'll Do

- Plan and maintain a consistent content calendar (3–5 posts per week)

- Write and schedule posts in the founder's voice

- Engage meaningfully with comments and relevant industry conversations

- Identify and act on trending topics in AI, automation, e-commerce, and SMB growth

- Track performance metrics and refine strategy monthly

- Coordinate with the founder on key announcements (new ventures, hiring, milestones)

Required Experience

- Minimum 5 years of professional experience in digital marketing, online advertising, or a closely related field — this isn't an entry-level role. We need someone who understands the full digital landscape including paid media, organic content strategy, SEO,
 marketing, and conversion funnels, even though the day-to-day focus is LinkedIn.

- 2+ years managing LinkedIn specifically for a founder, executive, or personal brand — with demonstrable follower growth and engagement results.

- A genuine understanding of business growth and entrepreneurship. You've either built something yourself, worked closely with founders, or operated in growth-focused roles. You need to "get" the mindset to write about it authentically.

- Actively up to date on developments in AI, automation, and how these technologies are reshaping business. You don't need to be an engineer, but you should be able to discuss AI trends, tools, and their practical business applications with confidence and credibility.



> Skills & Capabilities

- Strong copywriting skills with the ability to write in someone else's voice — punchy, direct, no fluff

- Deep understanding of the LinkedIn algorithm: post formatting, hook writing, optimal timing, engagement tactics

- Experience with content repurposing (turning ideas, conversations, or business updates into compelling posts)

- Proficiency with LinkedIn analytics, reporting tools, and scheduling platforms

- Strategic thinker who can connect content to broader brand-building and business development goals

- Bonus: experience in B2B, e-commerce, SaaS, or startup spaces

- Bonus: basic graphic design skills (Canva or similar) for post visuals and carousels



> Who You Are

You're a marketing professional first, not just a content poster. You understand how personal branding fits into a broader growth strategy and can think beyond vanity metrics. You're self-directed, don't need hand-holding, and can take a rough idea or a voice note and turn it into a polished post. You know that personal branding on LinkedIn isn't about corporate jargon — it's about authentic storytelling, sharing lessons learned, and building trust with an audience. You're across what performs well on the platform right now, not what worked two years ago. You read about AI developments because you're genuinely interested, not because someone told you to.



> Details

- Contract/freelance, ongoing

- Remote (Australian timezone overlap preferred but not essential)

- Approximately 10–15 hours per week to start

- Compensation: competitive, based on experience



> To Apply

Send 2–3 examples of LinkedIn content you've written for a client or personal brand, a brief summary of your digital marketing background, and a note on how you'd approach the first 30 days managing this account.

title: Email & LinkedIn Outreach Specialist + AI Sales Tool Manager
description:
About Us

We run two US-based companies in the sourcing and supply chain space. One serves the cannabis industry with vape hardware and packaging. The other serves supplement and nutraceutical brands with full-service sourcing, packaging, and logistics. Both companies source factory direct from China with American partners on the ground ensuring quality — and we pass the savings (20%+) to our customers.

We’re growing fast and need a sharp, detail-oriented tea
mber to run our outreach programs and fill our VP of Sales’ calendar with qualified meetings.

The Role

This is a digital outreach role — no phone calls required. You’ll manage AI-powered
 campaigns and LinkedIn outreach for two sales programs running simultaneously. Your job is to generate interest and book meetings with our VP of Sales.

You’ll set up and manage our sales tech stack (Clay, Instantly, Apollo, HubSpot, Zapier), build AI-personalized
 campaigns, run LinkedIn outreach, handle replies, and coordinate meetings. The AI tools handle
 personalization and sending at scale — your focus is on managing those tools, running LinkedIn outreach, handling warm leads, and making sure meetings get booked.

What You’ll Do

AI Tool Setup & Management (your primary technical responsibility):

• Set up and manage 
 — import lead lists, configure enrichment columns 
, phone, LinkedIn, company data), and set up AI-powered
 personalization

• Set up and manage Instantly.ai — build
 campaigns, import enriched leads, configure send settings, monitor deliverability and open/reply rates

• Configure
 sending infrastructure — set up DNS records (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) on secondary domains using our step-by-step guide, manage
 warm-up

• Build Zapier automations — connect Clay, Instantly, and HubSpot so data flows automatically (positive replies trigger alerts, bounces trigger re-enrichment, etc.)

• Maintain HubSpot CRM — keep pipeline data accurate, update deal stages, log all outreach activity

LinkedIn Outreach (your primary relationship-building channel):

• Send 20-30 personalized LinkedIn connection requests per day to decision makers at target companies (founders, VPs of Operations, supply chain leaders)

• Follow up with accepted connections using provided message templates

• Engage with prospect content — like, comment, and share posts from target accounts to build visibility and trust before pitching

• Convert LinkedIn conversations into booked VP of Sales meetings

Reply Management & Meeting Booking (your most important daily task):

• Monitor Instantly for AI-flagged
 replies every morning

• Respond to interested leads within 1 hour — speed is everything

• Handle objections using provided scripts (we give you a full objection-handling playbook)

• Book VP of Sales meetings — lock down specific dates/times, send calendar invites, provide context notes to the VP

• Follow up on no-shows and reschedule

Reporting:

• Send a structured weekly performance report every Friday using our template (takes 15 minutes)

The #1 Metric We Care About

VP of Sales calls booked per week. Target: 5-10. Everything else 
s sent, LinkedIn connections, reply rates) is an input. Meetings booked is the output. We will evaluate your performance primarily on this number.

Requirements

• Strong written English — you’ll be writing LinkedIn messages and
 replies to US-based C-level executives and business owners. Grammar, tone, and professionalism matter.

• Experience with
 outreach, LinkedIn outreach, or digital lead generation (B2B preferred)

• Comfortable learning and managing multiple software tools — 
, Instantly.ai, 
, HubSpot CRM, Zapier

• Basic technical skills — able to follow a step-by-step guide to configure DNS records, connect tools via Zapier, and troubleshoot basic issues

• Detail-oriented and organized — you’ll manage campaigns across two companies simultaneously and need to keep everything clean

• Self-motivated — you’ll work independently with a 15-minute weekly check-in, not daily supervision. You need to own your workflow.

• Available to work US business hours (Eastern or Pacific time — evening/night shift Philippines time)

Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience with 
, Instantly.ai, 
, or similar sales automation / enrichment tools

• Familiarity with the cannabis, supplement, nutraceutical, or CPG/packaging industries

• Experience setting up
 infrastructure (domains, DNS records,
 warm-up)

• LinkedIn Sales Navigator experience

• Experience managing AI-powered outreach tools or workflows

Compensation & Details

• Pay: $
USD/month (based on experience), paid bi-weekly based off working hours

• Performance bonus based on meetings 10$ per meeting

• Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week, US business hours (evening shift PH)

• Location: Remote — Philippines only

• Start date: As soon as possible

• Long-term position — this is not a short-term project. We want someone who will grow with us.

What We Provide

• Complete outreach playbooks with
 templates, LinkedIn scripts, objection handling — you won’t be guessing what to say

• Pre-built lead lists (5,200+ cannabis growers + 40 supplement brands with contact columns) ready to work

• AI-powered tools that handle
 personalization and sending at scale — you manage the system, not the manual work

• Step-by-step setup guides for every tool (Clay, Instantly, DNS configuration, Zapier, HubSpot)

• A clear KPI framework so you always know exactly what success looks like

• Direct access to leadership — small company, no bureaucracy, fast decisions

How to Apply

• A brief introduction (2-3 sentences about your background)

• Your experience with
 outreach, LinkedIn outreach, or digital lead generation

• Any experience with sales/marketing tools (CRM,
 automation, lead databases, Zapier)

• A link to your LinkedIn profile

• Your expected monthly salary in USD

Send
 only to 
 and 
 include the word “TCI Sales Outreach Manager” in the subject of the
 so we know you read the full posting. Applications without this subject will be ignored.

We review applications within 48 hours and aim to have the right person started within 1-2 weeks.

title: Shopify Product Manager
description:
Job Title: Shopify Product Manager



Location: Fully Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



About Bower Solutions



Bower Solutions is a digital marketing and web development agency supporting a portfolio of brands, including several fast-growing ecommerce companies. Our teams work across social media, paid ads, websites,
 marketing, and product launches—often simultaneously.



We’re looking for a Shopify Product Manager who can manage and optimize product listings, maintain storefront visuals, and support ongoing ecommerce operations across multiple brands.



Learn more at bowersolutions.ai



Role Overview



As a Shopify Product Manager, you’ll be responsible for managing day-to-day ecommerce operations within Shopify. This includes creating and updating product listings, organizing collections, managing site banners, and setting up promotions such as discount codes.



This role is fast-paced and detail-oriented, with frequent updates required across multiple brands and product catalogs. You’ll be expected to move quickly, maintain accuracy, and ensure the storefront is always optimized for conversions.



Key Responsibilities



- Create, update, and manage product listings in Shopify (titles, descriptions, images, variants, pricing)

- Organize and maintain product collections for optimal navigation and merchandising

- Update homepage and site banners based on promotions, launches, and campaigns

- Create and manage discount codes, sales, and promotional campaigns

- Ensure product pages are visually consistent and aligned with brand standards

- Coordinate with marketing and design teams for product launches and updates

- Monitor site for errors, inconsistencies, or optimization opportunities



Qualifications & Skills



- Experience working with Shopify (required)

- Strong attention to detail and ability to manage large volumes of product data

- Basic understanding of ecommerce merchandising and conversion optimization

- Familiarity with product tagging, collections, and navigation structure

- Ability to work quickly and accurately in a fast-paced environment

- Comfortable using tools like Shopify admin, Google Sheets, and basic image editing tools

- Experience with ecommerce brands is a plus

- Ability to work in US Pacific time hours



What We’re Looking For



- Someone who is highly organized and process-driven

- A detail-obsessed operator who catches mistakes before they go live

- A fast executor who can handle repetitive tasks without losing quality

- Someone who understands how product presentation impacts sales

- A reliable team player who can keep up with ongoing ecommerce demands

- Bonus: Management of product listings on Etsy



What We Offer



- Fully remote, full-time role

- Opportunity to work across multiple ecommerce brands

- Hands-on experience with fast-growing online stores

- A collaborative, results-driven team environment

- Opportunity to grow into an ecommerce manager or operations lead role



How To Apply

title: Shopify Marketing Assistant
description:
A well-established, fast-growing UK health supplement brand with a loyal 50+ customer base is looking for a talented Shopify Marketing Assistant to help us build and optimise our on-site and social media marketing strategy.



If you love e-commerce, marketing, sales psychology, and building systems that increase revenue and AOV - and you’re looking for a long-term, growth-focused role, this could be perfect for you!

Your responsibilities will include:



Coordinating our Shopify apps: (No coding required but you must be comfortable being hands on configuring apps and working with external support teams to problem solve when needed)



-> Zipify Page Builder – Build and optimise product pages, collection pages, and landing pages for a smooth customer journey across our store focused on CRO.



-> Loop Subscriptions – Help optimise our subscription platform, coordinating retention flows to reduce churn, reactivation campaigns, and cross-selling opportunities.



-> OCU (OneClickUpsell) – Coordinate and optimise pre- and post-purchase upsells with compelling offers based on our margins and customer psychology to increase AOV.



-> Referral & Affiliate Programs – Manage our customer referral and loyalty systems.





Marketing & CRO Execution:

- You will work closely with the founder to implement our marketing strategy to drive new customer acquisition and increase LTV via our internal customer marketing and new customer acquisition funnels. 



- You will play a key role in building and testing new ideas to improve CRO, AOV and LTV.



- Help build and test new offers and promotional campaigns for new and existing products, ensuring all campaigns align with our brand image.



- Analyse and report on product performance and A/B testing data, design, and offers to improve conversions.





Customer Journey & Collaboration:

- Help manage the internal marketing calendar working with our
 Marketer to plan and implement Sales events, Product launches and limited-time offers.



- Coordinating with our partner paid media agencies to help drive our new customer acquisition funnels and report on results.



- Coordinating with our graphic designer and UGC partners to produce marketing assets and creatives.





The MUST-HAVE qualities we’re looking for:

- You’re a highly organised marketer who enjoys strategy, data and execution — someone who can take a marketing idea, help build it, and track the results.



- Excellent written English, Hungry to learn and continually develop your skills. 



- Deep understanding of E-commerce and Social media marketing, CRO, and Sales psychology.



- Experience operating Shopify apps, Technically Minded and a Problem Solver (No coding is required but you must be comfortable being hands on configuring apps and working with external support teams to problem solve when needed)



- Highly organised, reliable and self-motivated - you manage your own priorities and follow through on details.



- Comfortable working with data to guide marketing decisions and maintain organised systems.



- Passion for health, nutrition, and wellness is a BIG plus.





Experience:

- 2+ years in e-commerce marketing, preferably in a health related brand.



- Hands-on experience with Shopify and configuring apps



- Experience writing and editing copy (using AI tools is fine — understanding marketing principles and psychology is what matters most).



- Experience with performance tracking and reporting (Google Sheets, Shopify analytics, etc.).





What’s in it for you:

- Long-term, Full-time remote position where you can continually grow your skills and be rewarded as develop into a world class marketer, while gaining valuable hands on experience into the full e-commerce customer life cycle - from acquisition to cross-selling and nurturing for maximum LTV. 



- Learn directly from the world's top marketers inside our Mastermind mentoring group (worth $24K/year), with weekly calls, direct feedback and support, and access to advanced e-commerce training. 



- A fun, collaborative and varied workday where you have the freedom and ongoing training to develop your skills into a world-class marketer





You’ll thrive in this role if you:

- Love building and testing new ideas and learning from real-time data.

- Enjoy a varied work day working remotely on a flexible schedule (Must have overlap with Australia AEST workday). 

- Are comfortable managing Shopify apps and creating systems. 



- Want to grow with a fast-moving brand and make a positive impact on results and our customers health.





To apply, please start your application with  “Shopify Marketing Assistant - (Your Name)”  and include ALL of the below points (Applications without this WILL NOT be considered)



- In YOUR OWN WORDS (Not AI) tell us in 2-4 Paragraphs about your marketing experience? Who you’ve worked with, and what your responsibilities were?



- Tell us in 1-2 paragraphs why you would be great for this job and why we should hire you? 



- Tell us about your experience managing Shopify apps?



- What books have you read about business and marketing? And any courses or training have you completed? 



- Write a few sentences about what you’re passionate about or enjoy outside of work.



DO NOT use Ai to write your application, it is very obvious and easy to spot. Ai written applications will not be considered.

We like Ai and expect you to use it in this role, but we need to talk to the real you at this stage.

routine spikes in field merchandising recruitment by utilizing web-based recruitment

resources

Review applications and conduct phone screen interviews for variable hour field

merchandising staff with applicants to determine their suitability for placement

Maintain department workflow tracking procedures and participate in active

communication with the Recruiting Team, Recruiting Supervisor, and Human Resources

Manager

Achieve and maintain a minimum average of 7 candidates screened and submitted for

consideration per working day, with an average of 60% of those submitted completing an

electronic intake process, equating to 21 candidates completing intake per 5 day week

Other duties as assigned



Must demonstrate effectiveness in the following areas:

o Outstanding English communication and interpersonal skills 

o Excellent time management and organizational skills

title: Sales Development Representative - B2B SaaS (Dutch-speaking)
description:
Company Overview



At LevelUp, we believe growth happens when people feel trusted, supported, and challenged. For more than seven years we’ve partnered with agencies, software vendors and website owners to provide world class outsourcing and offshore hiring services in a range of verticals, such as technical, operational, and back-office support. We hire curious problem-solvers, give them room to own outcomes, and back them with systems, support and a culture that makes learning part of the job. Join us and help businesses (and your career) level up.



Position Overview



We are looking for a proactive, resourceful Dutch-speaking Sales Development Representative to support our client’s global B2B SaaS sales team. You will handle inbound and outbound outreach for the auditing & accounting SaaS product in Dutch-speaking markets, qualify prospects, and book meetings for sales executives.

Strong communication skills are essential in order to match the high level of detail and precision expected by auditing and accounting professionals. You do not need deep technical product knowledge, but you must be able to understand the key differences between product versions across different regions and communicate them clearly to prospects



Key Responsibilities

•Reach out to inbound leads from Dutch-speaking markets via phone,
, and LinkedIn.

•Qualify leads against the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) and basic business needs.

•Understand and apply regional differences in the software when speaking with prospects.

•Use discovery questions to confirm pain points, fit, and level of interest.

•Book qualified meetings for sales executives and manage calendar invites.

•Execute directed outbound campaigns 
, call, sequences) to target accounts and contact lists.

•Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in the CRM (e.g. lead status, notes, follow-up tasks).

•Follow approved scripts,
 templates, and objection-handling guidelines.

•Meet or exceed monthly targets for:

•Qualified meetings booked (e.g. 20 per month)

•Activity volumes (calls,
s, InMails)

•Collaborate with the sales and marketing teams to provide feedback on lead quality, messaging, and common objections.



Required Skills & Experience

•2+ years experience in an SDR, inside sales, appointment-setting, or similar role (B2B SaaS preferred)

•Excellent spoken and written English

•Advanced proficiency (C1 or native) in Dutch

•Confident phone presence and strong
-writing skills

•Comfortable working with CRMs and sales tools (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Outreach, Salesloft, Apollo, or similar)

•Able to quickly understand and explain key product features and regional differences

•Strong attention to detail when logging activities and updating records

•Self-motivated, target-driven, and comfortable working in a metrics-based environment

•Reliable internet connection and suitable home-working environment for making calls



Nice to have: proficiency in German



More Info

•Remote, home-based role in the Philippines

•Central European Time office hours (4pm - 1am Philippines Time)

•Regular Philippines employment (HMO and 13th month pay included)

•Equipment provided

title: 360° Facebook Ads Specialist
description:
360°
 Ads Specialist (All Industries – Lead Quality Focused)

Remote | Part-Time or Full-Time

Work Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AWST



Please Read Before Applying

This role is not for beginners or task-based media buyers.

We are looking for a 360°
 Ads Specialist who understands:



Lead quality

Funnel intent

How ads actually turn into booked calls, walk-ins, ticket sales, and revenue



Not just low CPL.

If you've run:



Lead form ads AND website/landing page campaigns

Local service lead generation

Low-ticket escalation funnels

Direct-to-high-ticket offers

Event and nightclub promotion campaigns



Keep reading.



What You'll Do

You will own
 Ads end to end — from traffic strategy to lead quality — across multiple industries including trades, health and fitness, real estate, professional services, events, nightclubs, and more.

This is a fast-paced environment. Campaigns often need to be built, launched, and optimised on tight turnarounds — sometimes same day. You need to move quickly without compromising quality. If you need three days to launch a simple campaign, this is not the right fit.



Build, launch, and optimise Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns — often under tight deadlines

Run multiple funnel types: lead forms, website and landing page traffic, low-ticket front-end offers, direct-to-high-ticket offers, local service lead generation, event and nightclub promotion

Run event-specific campaigns: ticket sales, guestlist builds, event awareness, last-minute promo pushes, weekly recurring events

Create and test UGC-style, video, and static ad creatives (working with our design team for production assets)

Continuously improve lead quality, not just CPL

Test hooks, offers, creatives, and funnel structures

Manage TOF / MOF / BOF campaign structures

Proactively refresh ads (fatigue, seasons, new promos)

Respond quickly when campaigns need changes — you do not sit on underperforming ads

Collaborate with our CRM and automation team to ensure leads are being followed up and qualified properly

Report clearly on what is working, what is not, and what you are changing — no vanity metrics





Must-Have Experience (Non-Negotiable)



Proven experience running
 Ads for local service businesses (trades, fitness, medical, legal, real estate, or similar)

Proven experience running
 Ads for events, nightclubs, or entertainment venues — you understand time-sensitive promotion, urgency-driven campaigns, and short sales windows

Experience with both lead form ads and website/landing page traffic

Experience running:



Local service lead generation

Low-ticket escalation funnels

Direct-to-high-ticket offers

Event ticket sales and guestlist campaigns





Strong understanding of lead quality and intent — you know the difference between a cheap lead and a booked job

Ability to analyse performance beyond CPL (CTR, CVR, booking rate, lead-to-sale quality)

Experience managing multiple client accounts simultaneously

Ability to work fast under pressure — events do not wait, promos drop with short notice, and you need to execute quickly without cutting corners

A proactive mindset — you don't wait to be told what to fix



If your experience is only lead forms or only traffic, please do not apply.

If your experience is only ecommerce or only brand awareness, this is not the right fit.



Nice to Have (Optional)



Experience working with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar CRM platforms

Understanding of lead qualification, follow-up logic, and speed-to-lead

Experience creating ad creatives in Canva or directing a designer with clear briefs

Loom walkthroughs of past campaigns

Experience with Google Ads (we run both — there may be opportunity to expand your role)

Sales or customer service background





Why Work With Us



Work directly with the founder — no layers of middle management

No micromanagement — clear ownership and accountability

Long-term clients across multiple industries — stable, varied workload

Fast-moving agency that values speed and quality equally

Performance-focused, no-fluff environment

You will have access to a design team for creative production — you focus on strategy and execution

Remote role with consistent hours and weekly pay





Hours & Pay



Remote role (Philippines preferred)

Working hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AWST

Weekly pay via Wise

Part-time or full-time (based on performance and workload)

Long-term opportunity for the right operator





How to Apply (Important)

To be considered, please send:



A short intro or Loom video explaining:



Your
 Ads experience

The industries you have worked with (especially events, nightclubs, or local services)

The funnel types you've run (lead forms, landing pages, local, low-ticket, high-ticket, event promotion)





2–3 examples of
 ad campaigns you've managed (screenshots, results, or case studies)

Your timezone and daily availability



Applications without real funnel experience details will not be reviewed.



Final Filter

This role is for 360° operators, not button-pushers.

If you:



Think beyond CPL

Adapt funnels based on lead quality

Move fast without dropping quality

Take ownership of results across multiple industries

Communicate clearly without being chased



You'll thrive here.

title: Social Media & Content Marketing VA (Full-Time, Bonuses + Growth)
description:
We are an established Australian trade services business looking for a full-time Social Media and Content Marketing VA.



This role is responsible for building and executing a social media strategy across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube. You will audit our existing channels and content library, develop a strategy grounded in real analysis, create and schedule content daily, manage comments and DMs, and report on performance each month. The business owner appears on camera - everything else is yours to own and execute.



If you have worked in digital marketing, content creation, social media management, or at a marketing agency - and you can point to specific accounts you have genuinely grown from a smaller base - we want to hear from you.



==============================



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, stable role with a long-established Australian business

* Starting salary of PHP 33,500 per month during probation, increasing to PHP 35,000 per month after probation

* WE ARE WILLING TO PAY MORE FOR A HIGH-QUALITY, PROVEN CANDIDATE - THE LISTED RATE IS A STARTING POINT

* Additional earning potential through commissions and performance-based bonuses

* Fully remote - work from home

* Flexible hours within Australian timezone

* Long-term role with growing scope over time



==============================



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Audit existing social channels, content, and performance data - identify what is working and what is not

* Build a clear content strategy and present it to the business owner

* Create content daily - graphics, captions, short-form video edits, carousels

* Post consistently across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube

* Coordinate with the owner for his on-camera video appearances - brief him on what is needed and handle everything else

* Respond to all comments and DMs daily across all platforms

* Pre-qualify or redirect social leads to the sales team where appropriate

* Track performance monthly and report clearly to the owner

* Provide content and UX input on two business websites (supporting role)



==============================



REQUIREMENTS



* Demonstrated experience growing social media followings from a smaller base - you must be able to show numbers, not just titles

* Ability to build and articulate a content strategy - not just execute one that already exists

* Strong video editing skills - you will be working with raw phone footage filmed in a single take

* Exceptional written English - captions, comments, and DMs are all public-facing brand touchpoints

* Self-directed and able to make decisions without constant guidance

* Comfortable reading platform analytics and adjusting strategy based on data

* Reliable computer, internet connection, and equipment suitable for video editing



==============================



NICE TO HAVE



* HubSpot or CRM experience

* Experience helping a business owner build a personal brand or thought leadership presence

* Background in service-based businesses - trades, home improvement, or similar

* YouTube channel growth experience (long-form content)

* Digital marketing agency experience



==============================



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Flexible hours

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



==============================



If you have built real followings, can back it up with numbers, and want a role where your results are recognised and rewarded - apply now.



==============================



HOW TO APPLY



* Click "APPLY FOR THIS JOB" button on this job post

* Fill in the Subject field (this is required, but it will not affect your application outcome)

* Optionally, you may write a message

* Click Send

* Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process

title: Systems Monitoring & Account Maintenance VA
description:
JOB TITLE

Systems Monitoring & Account Maintenance VA



---



JOB DESCRIPTION



An established Australian business is looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA to take over daily monitoring and maintenance of multiple systems and accounts.



This is not a standard Monday-Friday role. The work runs every single day, including weekends, and requires consistency and discipline. The same core tasks must be completed daily to a high standard, without drop-off in accuracy or focus.



Your core work will involve logging into remote machines each day, checking that everything is running correctly, restarting anything that has stopped, recording account balances in a spreadsheet, flagging unusual activity, and carrying out small maintenance actions as directed. The work is repetitive, detail-critical, and must be executed consistently every day.



If you have experience in operations monitoring, account management, IT helpdesk, data entry, or any role where you were responsible for checking systems, recording information accurately, and keeping things running smoothly on a daily basis, this role will suit you well.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time position, 40 hours per week

* Stable, long-term role with an Australian business

* 20,000php starting salary during probation

* 23,500php + 1,500php benefits post probation (~1 month)

* KPI-based performance bonuses after approximately 3 months

* 13th month pay and government-mandated benefits

* Full training provided through screen-recorded sessions

* Fully remote - work from home

* Genuine scope for role growth into financial admin over time



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO (TRAINING PROVIDED)



* Log into multiple remote machines daily and confirm everything is running correctly

* Restart software or machines that have stopped and ensure all systems are operational

* Record account balances accurately in a spreadsheet

* Review recent activity and flag anything unusual

* Carry out small maintenance actions as directed

* After 2-3 months, produce daily summaries of accounts needing attention and take on additional reporting tasks



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Strong attention to detail - accurate balance recording across many accounts is the core of this role and mistakes have direct consequences

* Comfortable with REPETITIVE, ROUTINE WORK performed to a high standard every single day

* AVAILABLE TO WORK 7 DAYS A WEEK, with days off taken Monday to Wednesday if needed

* Able to maintain focus and consistency even on weekends or quieter shifts

* Able to follow instructions from screen-recorded training sessions, take your own notes, and execute independently without needing things re-explained

* Willing to speak up immediately when something is unclear rather than guessing

* Comfortable learning and working inside remote desktop and browser-based software daily

* Reliable internet connection and computer setup



---



NICE TO HAVE



* Experience with account management or similar monitoring roles

* Experience with remote desktop tools (AnyDesk, TeamViewer, Chrome Remote Desktop)

* Experience with multi-profile browsers or similar tools

* Background in IT support, helpdesk, or systems monitoring



---



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* 7 days per week (days off Monday to Wednesday if needed)

* Core hours: 11:00am to 4:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT)

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



---



This role suits someone who takes pride in doing the same job well every day, pays close attention to detail even on routine tasks, and is specifically looking for a structured, DAILY WORKLOAD rather than a standard weekday-only job. If that sounds like you - apply now.

title: AI Content Creator - Sports Recovery
description:
Company Overview:

We are Interlink AI, a generative AI and automation agency that builds and manages the content engines for premium brands. We have partnered with NERV, a new, ultra-premium sports recovery business that is looking to completely change the game within the sector.



NERV does not sell cheap gimmicks; they build high-end recovery tech designed for serious athletes who demand peak performance. Their current lineup focuses on items like advanced compression boots and temperature-controlled massage guns, and they will eventually be expanding into premium ice baths and saunas as well. As they scale, we need an AI content creator who can make their visual presence match the elite caliber of their hardware.



The Role:

We are looking for a highly skilled AI Content Creator to build visually stunning, photorealistic social media assets (Images and Short Form Video) that showcase NERV's products in action.



The Workflow & Expectations:

This is a batch-creation role designed for someone who works efficiently and respects systems.

- Volume: You are required to generate 4 to 5 high-quality pieces of content (a mix of Reels and static images) per week.

- The Deadline: All content for the upcoming week must be finalized and uploaded to our shared Google Drive by 11:59 PM every Sunday.

- The Standard: Your generations cannot look like AI art. They must look like expensive, high-budget commercial sports photography and videography. You must be able to consistently place specific recovery products onto realistic athletes in high-end gym or locker room environments without hallucinating the product designs.



Requirements:

- Proven expertise in advanced AI image generation (e.g., Nano Banana Pro, Midjourney v6).

- Proven expertise in AI video motion generation (e.g., Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0).

- An exceptional eye for lighting, composition, and photorealism.

- The ability to consistently hit a strict weekly Sunday deadline for batch uploads.

- Fluent English and excellent communication skills.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

We ruthlessly ignore automated, copy-paste applications. To prove you have read this post and have the extreme attention to detail required for this role, you must start your application with the exact word "RECOVERY".



In your application, please include:

- A link to your portfolio, specifically highlighting hyper-realistic AI generations involving sports, athletes, or product photography.

- A brief breakdown of the exact AI tools you use for image and video generation.

- Confirmation that you can meet the strict Sunday deadline for batch-uploaded content every week.

title: TikTok Shop Affiliate Manager - UK Health Supplement Brand
description:
About Us

We are a UK-based natural health supplement brand. We sell on Amazon, Shopify, and TikTok Shop and are now focused on scaling TikTok Shop by building a strong network of affiliates who consistently generate daily sales.



Role Overview

We are looking for a full-time TikTok Shop Affiliate Manager to build and manage our creator (affiliate) network to drive revenue. We are looking for someone who is naturally friendly, confident, and enjoys building relationships and managing a community.



Your main responsibility is to find, contact, and onboard TikTok creators who will promote our products and generate sales to earn a commission. You will also support the day-to-day management of our TikTok Shop account (Processing returns, setting up and reporting on promotions, and maintaining account health)







This is a performance-driven role focused on:

- Outreach

- Affiliate growth

- Relationship building

- Revenue generation



Your Responsibilities & Daily tasks will include:

- Find 50–100 relevant TikTok creators per day (UK-focused)

- Reach out to creators via TikTok messages and later using automated apps as we scale up proven products. 

- Follow up consistently (this is critical)

- Onboard creators into our TikTok Shop affiliate program, collect personal information to build our affiliate database, tracking content posted and following up with creators who have not posted. 

-  Move high-potential creators to WhatsApp for faster communication and support. 



- Set up and adjust affiliate offers and commission rates.

- Organise and track promotions and campaigns

- Monitor account health and flag any issues

- Keep an eye on orders, refunds, and general account activity



What We Are Looking For

- Experience with TikTok (TikTok Shop experience is a big plus)

- Strong written English (natural and conversational)

- Confidence messaging creators and building relationships noting personal details. 

- High attention to detail

- Ability to follow systems and processes while continually updating SOPs

- Reliability and consistency (this role requires daily output)



Bonus if you have:

- Experience with affiliate marketing

- Experience with influencer outreach

- Experience in health / supplements



KPIs (How You Will Be Measured)

- Number of active affiliates generating sales

- Number of relevant creators contacted per day

- Reply rate from creators

- Number of creators onboarded



Important

This role requires consistency and persistence. Most creators do not reply to the first message - follow-up is critical. We are building a long-term system, not a short-term project.



How to Apply (Important – Read Carefully)

We receive a high number of applications. To be considered, you MUST follow these instructions exactly.

Please answer the following questions in a natural, conversational way:



1. Include your CV and tell us about yourself in ‘Your own words’, your work experience so far, what you liked and didn’t like about the roles, and what you enjoy outside of work. 



2. What experience do you have with:

- TikTok or other social media platforms

- Affiliate marketing, influencer outreach, or messaging people online

Be specific about what you have personally done.



3.  Have you built relationships with people online (customers, creators, clients, etc.)?

- What did you do to build trust?

- How did you keep those relationships going over time?



4. Why does this role interest you, and why do you think you would be a perfect fit and the person we need to hire?



5.  When you look at a creator on social media, how would you d
 if they are a good fit to promote our supplement brand? List a few things you would check first. 



6.  This role involves managing large amounts of outreach, data and tracking results.

- Are you comfortable using spreadsheets (e.g. Google Sheets)?

- Have you tracked performance, KPIs, or outreach before? How? 

- How do you stay organised when managing many conversations?



7. If a creator received a sample but hasn’t posted content yet by the agreed date, or is slow to respond to your initial message, how would you follow up without being annoying?

Write an example message.



Important:

Please keep your answers clear and natural. We are not looking for perfect or overly formal responses - we want to understand how you think and communicate. 

START YOUR APPLICATION WITH "I am your affiliate manager" 



We are looking for someone to join our team on a long-term basis who wants to grow with the company.

If you perform well, there will be opportunities for bonuses and increased responsibility.

title: Procurement Manager – E-Commerce (for pooling)
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a data-driven Procurement Manager to lead and optimize procurement operations in a fast-paced e-commerce environment. 

This role is responsible for managing a team, improving decision-making through KPIs and AI tools, and ensuring profitable purchasing strategies.



Key Responsibilities

Team Management & Leadership

• Lead, train, and manage procurement specialists

• Monitor performance and provide KPI-based coaching

• Conduct weekly performance reviews 

Coordinate with internal stake holders



KPI Monitoring & Optimization

• Track Loss %, AGP, AGP %, Return %, Cancellation Rate

• Identify trends and take corrective action

• Deliver weekly reports



Procurement Strategy

• Oversee order submission and approval

• Define decision rules and margin thresholds

• Optimize vendor selection and pricing



Vendor Management

• Build supplier relationships

• Negotiate pricing and discounts

• Monitor vendor performance



AI Integration

• Implement AI for order review and
 drafting

• Track AI accuracy vs human decisions

• Improve automation processes



Process Improvement

• Maintain SOPs and documentation

• Standardize workflows and communication



Required Qualifications

• 3–7+ years procurement experience

• E-commerce or high-volume environment experience

• Strong analytical and KPI tracking skills

• Experience with dashboards (Excel, PowerBI, Grafana)

• Familiarity with AI tools and automation

• Strong leadership and communication skills



Key Performance Indicators

• Loss %

• AGP and AGP %

• Return %

• Order accuracy

• Team productivity

• Vendor performance

• AI accuracy rate



What Success Looks Like

• Reduced Loss %

• Improved team performance

• Strong vendor relationships

• Effective AI integration

• Scalable procurement processes



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Web & Graphic Designer – Shopify, YouTube & Social
description:
Web & Design Producer – YouTube / Social / Amazon (MrYouWho Media Network)



Type of Work: Full-time (40 hrs/week) – Remote, Philippines

Salary: US $4.00–$5.00 per hour (approx. ?38,000 – ?48,000 per month) + 13th month + PH holidays + performance bonuses



Job Overview



MrYouWho is a fast-growing global tech & lifestyle media network with 260K+ YouTube subscribers, 15+ channels and a big presence across YouTube, Amazon, TikTok, Instagram,
, Pinterest and Threads.



We’re about to launch our revamped website at 
, built on Shopify 2.0, with new product review hubs, “best of” guides, brand pages and dedicated giveaway and prize sections for our community. We also run regular giveaways, prize packs and community groups tied to our videos and social channels.



We’re looking for Web & Design Producer (also looking for Graduates) who wants to help build and grow this platform – not just do basic admin. You’ll help design and update pages on the new site, publish blog posts and product guides, and create thumbnails and social graphics that match our brand.



You will work inside a structured workflow using our SOPs and Notion system, and collaborate closely with our video, content and partnerships team.



Key Responsibilities



• Help build and update pages on our Shopify 2.0 website (home, review pages, “best of” guides, giveaways, for brands, etc.)

• Format and publish blog posts and buyer guides (headings, images, internal links, basic on-page SEO)

• Design and update landing pages for giveaways,
 capture and brand campaigns

• Create YouTube thumbnails, social graphics and simple ads using Canva or Figma

• Prepare images for web (cropping, resizing, compression and naming)

• Keep product and review pages visually consistent with our brand style

• Work from briefs and SOPs, updating task status in Notion so deadlines are met

• Coordinate with the content team to make sure videos, posts and giveaways are all linked correctly across website and social channels



Requirements (Must Have)



• Graduate or early-career (0–5 years) in Multimedia Arts, Web Design, Graphic Design, IT, Communications, Digital Media or similar

• Comfortable working with website builders (Shopify, WordPress, Wix or similar – we will train you on Shopify 2.0)

• Good design sense: spacing, typography, image selection and basic layout

• Experience using Canva (or Figma / Photoshop) for graphics and thumbnails

• Strong written English for headings, buttons and basic copy edits

• Reliable computer and stable internet connection for remote work

• Coachable, organised, and able to follow detailed SOPs consistently



Nice to Have (Bonus)



• Any experience with Shopify themes, sections and simple page-building

• Basic understanding of HTML/CSS (even just editing snippets)

• Experience preparing blog posts or landing pages for SEO (titles, meta, internal links)

• Prior work with YouTube channels, influencers or e-commerce brands

• Familiarity with Notion, Dropbox and basic project tracking



Compensation & Benefits



• Full-time remote role paid in PHP (approx. ?38,000 – ?48,000/month depending on skills and experience)

• 13th month pay and PH public holidays

• Performance-based bonuses after probation

• Long-term role with clear growth path as the website and media network expand

• Training on Shopify 2.0, our content systems, and real brand campaign work

• Chance to build a strong portfolio across web design, e-commerce and content production



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be considered.



Please send:



1.	Your CV/Resume (PDF)



2.	Links to 2–3 examples of your work – this can include:

	• Websites or pages you helped design or build

	• Blog posts or guides you formatted and published

	• Thumbnails, social graphics or layouts you created in Canva/Figma



3.	Short answers to these questions (in your own words):



a) Why do you want to work with MrYouWho as a Web & Design Producer?

b) What platforms or tools have you used for building or editing websites so far?

c) Which design tools do you use (Canva, Figma, Photoshop, etc.) and what are you most confident doing in them?

d) What kind of computer do you use (CPU, RAM, internet speed) and how many hours per day can you reliably work?



Important: This is a creative and technical role. Generic or AI-generated applications will be deleted. We want to hear your own voice and see your own work.



To show that you read this properly, please add the word WEBSITES at the very end of your application.

title: YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form)
description:
YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form) – Large Multi Channel Media Company



Type of Work: Full-time (can start part-time during trial)



Salary: US $4.00–$7.00 per hour (roughly 36,000–55,000 PHP/month for 40 hrs/week, depending on experience)

Hours: 40 per week

Job Overview



MrYouWho Global Media Network is a fast-growing global tech & lifestyle media network with 260K+ YouTube subscribers, 15+ active channels and a big presence across YouTube, Amazon, TikTok, Instagram,
, Pinterest and Threads.



We are looking for a Senior Video & Content Producer whose main job is long-form YouTube reviews. Short-form is important, but it is secondary. If you only like cutting 30–60 second clips, this role is not for you.



You’ll take 30–90 minutes of raw footage and turn it into 8–15 minute YouTube reviews that feel fast, clear and watchable all the way through – then help spin off a few Shorts/Reels from that main edit.



This is not a VA role. It’s a creative production role for someone who wants a stable, long-term home with constant projects.



What You’ll Do (Priority Order)



1. Primary (70–80% of time)



• Edit full 8–15 minute YouTube reviews from raw footage (A-roll, B-roll, overlays, product close-ups, music, light sound design).

• Structure the story: build hooks, tighten the middle, keep retention high, land the verdict cleanly.

• Prepare 1080p/4K masters, check audio/colour, and hand off ready-to-upload files.

 

2. Secondary (20–30% of time)



• Cut 2–4 Shorts/Reels/TikToks from the long-form edit (not from scratch campaigns).

• Prepare Amazon Influencer versions using our compliance rules.

• Help with thumbnails in Canva and basic graphic elements.

• Keep Dropbox + Notion organised so every project is tracked.



You’ll also give occasional feedback to junior/graduate editors and help us standardise templates, presets and editing benchmarks.



Required Skills & Experience



• 3+ years editing long-form YouTube videos (non-negotiable). Must be comfortable doing full narrative edits, not just “clipping the best bits.”

• Strong in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve (CapCut desktop is a plus, but not the core tool).

• Proven ability to:

 • Restructure talking-head content so it flows

 • Kill filler and keep the pace moving

 • Sync B-roll and product shots to what’s being said

 • Fix basic audio issues and balance music vs voice

 • Experience making Shorts/Reels/TikToks from long-form edits.

 • Good English comprehension (scripts, briefs, feedback).

 • Fast, reliable PC/laptop and strong internet suitable for moving large video files.



Nice to have



• Tech / product review channel experience

• Simple motion graphics (titles, overlays, call-outs)

• Experience mentoring other editors or leading post-p workflows



Perks & Growth



• 36,000 PHP – 55,000 PHP/month depending on experience & trial

• Weekly pay via Wise or PayPal

• 13th month pay + PH public holidays

• Performance bonuses for reliability, quality and output

• Long-term role with a path to Lead Editor / Post-Production Lead as we scale the team



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Send a short application and answer these questions in your own words (no AI / generic answers – they will be deleted):



	1. Why do you want to join MrYouWho specifically as a long-form YouTube editor?

	2. Which 1–2 MrYouWho videos did you watch before applying, and what do you notice about our editing style? (Link them from 
/mryouwho)

	3. Share 3 links to long-form videos you edited (8+ minutes, with voiceover and B-roll). For each one, tell us briefly what you personally improved in the edit (structure, pacing, B-roll, audio, etc.).

	4. Share 2–3 links to Shorts/Reels/TikToks you cut from long-form projects. For at least one of them, explain how you chose the hook and why you cut it that way.

	5. What software do you use, and what are your PC/Laptop specs? (CPU, RAM, GPU, storage, internet speed)

	6. In your opinion, what separates a “good” long-form YouTube edit from a “great” one? Give 2–3 specific examples from your own work.



Add the word DETAILS at the very end of your application so we know you actually read the job post.

title: Meta Ads / DTC Ads Video Editor For Ecommerce Ads
description:
Intro About the Company



Hey there! I'm Kane, founder of a rapidly scaling 7-figure DTC brand in the women's shapewear & fashion space.

We've done over $2,000,000+ in revenue, driven almost entirely through Meta 
 & Instagram) ads, and we're now looking to bring on a high-level Meta Ads Video Editor who specializes in the four ad formats we run and scale: VSLs, AI UGC, UGC, and B-roll voiceover ads. On top of that, you need to know how to craft scroll-stopping hooks that actually stop the thumb in the first 2 seconds.



Your mission?



To turn scripts and concepts into scroll-stopping Meta ads across our four core formats, starting every single ad with a hook that earns the next 3 seconds of attention.



Job Qualifier Who This Is NOT For



Important:



If you do NOT have direct experience editing VSLs, AI UGC, UGC, or B-roll voiceover ads for DTC / Shopify brands running Meta ads, this role is not for you.



We're not looking for:

Long-form YouTube editors

Wedding or event videographers

Cinematic brand filmmakers

Beginners or generalist editors

Anyone who's never edited a VSL or UGC ad that actually ran on Meta

Anyone who can't craft scroll-stopping hooks

But if you've edited these specific DTC ad formats and they've actually converted, keep reading.



Why You Should Care to Apply

This brand is already proven.



We've:

Scaled past 7 figures on Meta ads

Validated product-market fit in a massive women's market

Built a repeatable creative testing system across VSLs, AI UGC, UGC, and B-roll voiceover ads

Now, creative volume and quality is the bottleneck.

That's where you come in.

You'll be working directly with the founder, not buried in layers of management, and you'll have real influence over what gets launched, tested, and scaled.

If you want your work to actually move revenue, this is it.

Who We're Looking For

We have one non-negotiable rule: You must want to get better and win.



The purpose of this role is to:

Edit high-performing Meta ads in our four core formats: VSLs, AI UGC, UGC, and B-roll voiceover ads

Craft scroll-stopping hooks that lock in attention in the first 2 seconds

Independently source UGC raw clips, B-roll, and stock footage

Structure every ad using proven DTC direct response frameworks (hook, problem, agitation, solution, proof, CTA)

Use AI tools (HeyGen, Arcads, Captions, ElevenLabs, Runway, etc.) to produce AI UGC ads and speed up workflow

Eventually help write scripts and creative angles based on provided concepts



As a Meta Ads Video Editor, you have:

Proven experience editing Meta ads for DTC / Shopify brands

Hands-on experience with all four formats: VSLs, AI UGC, UGC, and B-roll voiceover ads

A track record of crafting scroll-stopping hooks (visual hooks, text hooks, pattern interrupts, callouts)

Deep understanding of what performs on
 & Instagram feed, Reels, and Stories

Mastery of pacing, pattern interrupts, captions, B-roll layering, and CTAs

Comfort with AI tools for avatars, voiceovers, and editing speed

Ability to source UGC clips, stock footage, and B-roll independently



You also have these character traits:

Strong attention to detail

Ownership mentality (you don't wait to be told every step)

Creative curiosity and testing mindset

Ability to think like a direct response marketer, not just an editor

Your Day-to-Day Responsibilities

Edit VSLs (60 to 180 seconds) based on scripts provided, with strong pacing, proof elements, and CTAs

Produce AI UGC ads using avatar tools and AI voiceover platforms

Cut and assemble UGC ads from raw creator footage

Edit B-roll voiceover ads by layering sourced footage over provided scripts and voiceovers

Craft and test multiple scroll-stopping hook variations for every ad concept

Source relevant B-roll, stock clips, and UGC assets independently

Structure every ad using DTC direct response frameworks (hook, problem, solution, proof, CTA)

Add captions, sound design, music, and pattern interrupts that hold attention

Test different hooks, pacing styles, and angles for creative testing

Collaborate directly with the founder on creative concepts and iterations

Organize and deliver ad variations ready for ad account upload

Eventually help write or improve scripts based on given concepts



More Reasons to Join

Work directly with a 7-figure DTC brand

High creative volume = fast reps and fast improvement

Long-term opportunity with increased responsibility

Creative freedom within proven DTC frameworks

Performance-based growth as the brand scales



Final Step

If this resonates with you, apply and include the number of the core value you align with most in your application.

CORE VALUES:



1 Results Obsessed

2 Attention to Detail

3 Accelerated Excellence

4 Relentless Ownership

5 Prepared to Win

6 Collaborative Innovation

7 Never Not Growing

Apply now. Let's build winning ads together.

title: Intermediate WordPress Developer (Execution-Focused, Debugging-Heavy)
description:
# Intermediate WordPress Developer (Execution-Focused, Debugging-Heavy)



## About The Role

We’re looking for an intermediate WordPress developer who knows how to **figure things out, fix issues, and get things working reliably**.

This is not a “build pretty sites from scratch” role.

This is a **high-impact execution role** focused on:

- debugging real-world issues  

- maintaining and improving live websites  

- implementing designs accurately  

- optimizing performance  



If you enjoy solving problems like *“Why is this form not submitting?”* or *“Why is this site slow?”* - you’ll thrive here.



---



## What You’ll Be Doing

This role is roughly:

- **80% support, debugging, and fixes**

- **20% optimization and improvements**



### Core Responsibilities

- Diagnose and fix issues across WordPress sites (forms, plugins, themes, integrations)

- Maintain and support existing client websites

- Implement designs with high attention to detail using:

  -- builders (Avada, Beaver Builder, etc.)

  -- custom templates (ACF-based)

- Perform performance optimization (Core Web Vitals, load speed improvements)

- Handle API integrations (forms, CRMs, third-party tools)

- Execute SEO-related technical implementations

- Collaborate with teammates on QA (your own work and teammates’ work)



---



## What Success Looks Like

- You can take a vague issue like *“something is broken”* and figure out the root cause

- You **ask the right questions**, scope the solution, and execute it cleanly

- You can independently fix performance issues across the stack (DNS ? server ? WordPress)

- Your work is thoughtful

- You consistently deliver



---



## Required Skills & Experience



### WordPress Fundamentals

- Strong understanding of how WordPress works:

  - themes, plugins, templates

- Experience with:

  - **ACF (Advanced Custom Fields)** for custom templates

  - Gutenberg vs builder-based themes (and when to use each)



### Frontend Development

- Strong CSS skills (must be able to implement designs accurately)

- Solid JavaScript (understanding of jQuery + modern JS is required, but proficiency is not required)

- Ability to translate designs into functional WP layouts



### Backend / Systems Awareness

- Working knowledge of PHP within WordPress

- Understanding of the **LAMP stack**

- Ability to troubleshoot performance and uptime issues:

  - hosting, DNS, caching, plugins, etc.



### Debugging & Problem Solving (Critical)

- Ability to diagnose issues independently

- Comfortable working with incomplete information

- Able to propose solutions



---



## How You’ll Work

- Fully remote, globally distributed team

- Work directly with our project managers and other developers

- Minimal meetings (a few per week), but **must be available for real-time collaboration in 8am-5pm CST timezone**



### Schedule (Non-Negotiable)

- Must work within **8am–5pm CST**

- Typical expectation:

  - ~4 hours per weekday (e.g., 9am–1pm CST M-F)



---



## Compensation

- Commensurate with experience

- Guaranteed and consistent weekday hours

- Opportunity to grow into:

  - full-time role 

  - senior developer positions  



---



## What Makes This Role Different

- High autonomy, no micromanagement

- Real-world problem solving (not repetitive production work)

- Exposure to:

  - Senior WordPress developer teammates with vast experiences

  - performance optimization  

  - SEO implementation  

  - complex debugging scenarios  

- Fast-paced environment with a variety of projects



---



## What We’re Looking For (Soft Skills)

- Strong written and spoken English (required)

- Clear, proactive communication

- Ability to ask smart questions and move things forward

- Detail-oriented - especially with design implementation



---



## Who This Is NOT For

- Developers who only rely on plugins without understanding how things work

- Pure designers with limited technical depth



---



## Growth Opportunity

This role is designed as a stepping stone to:

- Senior WordPress Developer

- Technical specialist (performance, SEO, systems)

- Expanded responsibility across projects and architecture



---



If you’re the type of developer who enjoys solving problems, improving systems, and making things work under real-world conditions, we’d love to hear from you!



---



##Why You’ll Love Working With Us:



The Mighty Mo! is a seasoned WordPress development, design, and SEO agency based in Minneapolis, MN, focused on delivering high-quality results you'll be proud of.



Here’s why our team loves working here:

- Regular Hours

- Asynchronous + Real Time Communication – Minimal meetings; we use ClickUp to stay organized.

- Room to Grow – This part-time role can expand into a full-time position for the right person.



Learn more about how we work: 
/why & 





---



##How to Apply / Next Steps

Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph by submitting the following:



1. Answer the following four questions:

- “What’s the hardest WP bug you’ve solved recently?”

- “Have you ever fixed a performance issue? What did you do?”

- “What’s your process when you don’t know how to fix something?”

- "How are you incorporating AI into your development workflow?

2. Record and send a link to a 2–3 minute Loom/video explaining how you approached a specific broken website issue recently.



FYI: It’s expected that you’ll use AI tools where appropriate to speed up the dev process (Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT, etc.). But your answers to the above should reflect how *you* think and work.

title: Create AI Facebook VSL's / AI UGC for Supplement Brand
description:
We're a direct response marketing agency seeking a skilled AI video creator to produce authentic UGC-style testimonial videos for health and wellness products. This is a TEST-TO-HIRE position with immediate full-time potential for the right candidate.



What We Provide:

- Complete 60-second scripts

- Detailed creative briefs and strategy

- Character descriptions and scene settings



What You'll Do:

- Generate realistic AI spokespersons using tools like Sora, HeyGen, Kie.ai, Synthesia, or similar platforms

- Create authentic UGC-style videos that look like real testimonials (NOT polished ads)

- Match specific demographics (women 45-65, natural looking, relatable)

- Execute our vision with attention to detail on lighting, setting, and emotional delivery

- Ensure character consistency across multiple video variations

- Deliver videos in vertical format (9:16) optimized for
/Instagram



Requirements:

- Proven experience with AI video generation tools

- Portfolio showing REALISTIC human avatars (not cartoon/obviously AI)

- Ability to create natural, "unprofessional" UGC aesthetic

- Understanding of direct response marketing videos

- Fast turnaround (24 hours or less per video)

- Excellent attention to detail

- Ability to follow specific creative briefs exactly



Trial Project:

3 test videos (scripts and full briefs provided)

- Each video will be 60 seconds

- Different concepts but same target demographic

- Due As Soon as Possible



Future Opportunity:

If trial videos meet our standards:

- Immediate ongoing work (10+ videos per week)



- Potential for full-time position

- Long-term partnership with growing agency



To Apply, Please Include:

1. Links to 3-5 AI-generated videos you've created (preferably testimonial/UGC style)

2. Which AI tools you're proficient in

3. Your turnaround time for a 60-second video

4. Brief description of your process

5. Confirmation you can start immediately



Do NOT Apply If:

- Your portfolio only shows animated/cartoon avatars

- You haven't worked with realistic AI spokespersons

- You can't maintain character consistency

- You're unavailable for quick revisions



Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience in health/wellness marketing

- Understanding of
/Instagram ad requirements

- Knowledge of multiple AI video platforms

- Video editing skills for post-production touches



This is an excellent opportunity for someone looking to grow with a performance marketing agency. We value quality, authenticity, and reliability. If your trial videos perform well in our ad campaigns, this will quickly become consistent, well-paid work.



Note: We're looking for someone who can execute our vision precisely, not someone who wants to add their own creative input. Following directions and attention to detail are crucial.



Type "I CREATE AUTHENTIC AI VIDEOS" at the start of your proposal so we know you read this fully.

title: Dental Office Patient Advocate
description:
Answer and manage incoming calls for the practice in a professional and friendly manner

Schedule new and existing patients efficiently using the practice management system

title: Client Services Administrative Specialist
description:
Job Title: Client Services Administrative Specialist

Department: Operations



About Self Bill Pro:

Self Bill Pro is a rapidly growing startup dedicated to solving one of the most persistent challenges in the employee benefits ecosystem: the complexity of monthly benefits billing. We provide a tech-enabled service where our dedicated team leverages proprietary software to eliminate the administrative burdens of manual invoice audits and costly billing errors. Our mission is to streamline this critical operation, freeing up employers, brokers, and carriers to focus on their strategic priorities.



About the Role:

The Client Services Administrative Specialist supports the Client Services team by executing key administrative and data-related tasks that ensure accurate and timely client deliverables. This role plays a critical part in maintaining operational efficiency by following established processes, supporting data workflows, and partnering closely with Client Service Managers.



Requirements



Key Responsibilities:

Support the end-to-end self-bill creation and delivery process, ensuring accuracy and timely completion

Query, validate, and load data files between systems following established workflows and standards

Maintain accurate and well-organized files, documentation, and client records to support operational workflows

Communicate clearly and proactively with the Client Service Manager regarding task status, issues, and discrepancies

Identify and escalate data inconsistencies or process gaps that impact overall workflow accuracy or delivery

Follow SOPs and reference documentation to complete tasks consistently and accurately

Perform basic quality checks on data and outputs prior to delivery

Flag discrepancies or errors identified during quality checks for review and resolution



Qualifications:



Required Qualifications:

Strong written and verbal communication skills in English, with the ability to collaborate effectively with English-speaking colleagues

Experience in employee benefits, HR operations, or a related field required

Strong technical aptitude with the ability to learn systems and follow structured processes with accuracy

High attention to detail with the ability to maintain accuracy in high-volume, repetitive tasks

Ability to follow SOPs and established workflows with consistency and discipline

Self-motivated, adaptable, and comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote environment

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines with minimal supervision

Required shift of US ET business hours (8pm-5am PHT), potential to transition to a second shift (3pm-12am PHT) following onboarding.



Preferred Qualifications:

Knowledgebase in file transfer, desktop excel applications

Experience in HR tech, employee benefits, or insurance industry.

Bachelor’s degree in business, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field is preferred.



**Compensation is structured as monthly base pay inclusive of night differential, reflecting the scheduled working hours for this role. Scheduled hours are intended to align with U.S. Eastern Time. The 13th month pay is provided in addition to the stated base compensation in accordance with local requirements.



Why Join Self Bill Pro:

At Self Bill Pro, you’ll join a collaborative and ambitious team dedicated to transforming outdated processes through smart, scalable technology. If you’re passionate about tech, and solving real-world problems, we’d love to hear from you.

Work Model:

Remote

Full-Time, Permanent

Information Technology

Bachelor’s Degree

title: Remote Virtual Estimator
description:
USE THIS FORM TO SUBMIT YOUR INFORMATION. NO MESSAGES WILL BE CONSIDERED WITHOUT FORM COMPLETION. 





Profile Summary

Role Type: Remote / Virtual



Key Focus: Accuracy in cost estimation, quantity takeoffs, and bid preparation.



Ideal Candidate: A detail-oriented individual with strong mathematical skills, deep industry knowledge (e.g., construction or electrical), and the ability to work autonomously. Clear and effective communicator. C2 & C1 professional level. 



Primary Industries: Construction (Commercial/Residential)



Job Description



Core Responsibilities

Cost Estimation & Analysis: Analyze project documents, blueprints, and specifications to determine labor, material, and equipment costs.



Quantity Takeoffs: Perform detailed digital measurements and list all materials required for project completion using specialized software.



Bid Preparation: Change complex cost data into professional, competitive bid proposals and executive summaries.



Vendor & Subcontractor Coordination: Research prices, manage bids from subcontractors, and maintain relationships with suppliers.



Risk Assessment: Identify potential financial or operational risks and suggest cost-reduction or value-engineering options.



Communication: Collaborate with project managers, engineers, and clients through video conferencing,
, and virtual meetings to clarify project scopes.



Required Skills & Qualifications



Technical Proficiency: CRM Construction Online



Analytical & Math Skills: Strong ability in algebra, geometry, and financial analysis to prevent costly errors.



Experience: 

Typically requires 3–7+ years of industry experience (e.g., as a project manager, estimator) to understand field complexities.



Education/Certification: 

A bachelor's degree in Construction Management or Engineering is often preferred but not always mandatory. Experience is more attractive.



Professional certifications like Certified Professional Estimator (CPE) or Certified Estimating Professional (CEP) are highly valued.



Remote Work Competency: Self-motivated, with excellent time management skills and a secure, high-bandwidth, and home office setup.
