description:
We are a start-up online fitness coaching business based in the United States looking for a dedicated, passionate, and highly organized Online Fitness Coach to join our team on a long-term basis.



This is not a passive role. You will be the face of our client experience — texting clients daily, calling them regularly, tracking their progress, coaching their nutrition, and doing whatever it takes to help them lose weight and hit their goals. Our clients are paying a premium for real human accountability and you are that accountability.



If you are someone who genuinely loves helping people transform their lives, communicates exceptionally well, and takes ownership of your clients’ results — this role is for you.



-----



## What You Will Be Doing Every Day



**Client Accountability (Primary Responsibility)**



- Send daily good morning check-in texts to every active client

- Review each client’s daily step count submitted through our tracking system

- Review each client’s daily calorie and macro log submitted through the FitHub app

- Provide same-day feedback, encouragement, and corrections on nutrition and activity

- Celebrate wins, troubleshoot setbacks, and keep clients motivated when they want to quit

- Recognize when a client is slipping and reach out proactively before it becomes a problem



**Coaching Calls**



- Conduct weekly 15-minute accountability calls with Foundation clients

- Conduct 3× per week 15-minute coaching calls with Premium clients

- Conduct daily 1-on-1 coaching calls with Elite clients

- Use calls to review progress, answer questions, give specific tips, and adjust goals

- Provide mindset coaching, nutrition guidance, and motivational support on calls

- Handle different personalities with patience, empathy, and professionalism



**Nutrition Coaching**



- Help clients understand calorie deficits and how to achieve them through simple eating adjustments

- Review FitHub photo logs and give specific actionable feedback on meals

- Answer nutrition questions clearly and accurately

- Guide clients on practical food choices without pushing extreme diets

- Adjust calorie and macro targets weekly based on each client’s progress data



**Walking & Fitness Program Management**



- Monitor each client’s walking progression from their starting point to 10,000 steps per day

- Adjust step goals weekly based on results and client feedback

- Provide simple bodyweight or movement suggestions as needed to complement walking

- Identify plateaus early and adjust the program to break through them



**CRM & Documentation (Trello)**



- Keep every client’s Trello card fully updated after every interaction

- Log daily check-in notes, call summaries, step counts, calorie data, and mood/energy updates

- Track each client’s weekly progress metrics and flag anything concerning

- Maintain clean, organized records so the business owner can review any client at any time

- Update client goals, plan adjustments, and next steps in real time



**General**



- Respond to client messages promptly — same day at minimum, ideally within a few hours

- Communicate any client concerns, complaints, or red flags to the business owner immediately

- Suggest improvements to the coaching process based on what you observe working with clients

- Represent the Quality Fitness Coaching brand with professionalism, warmth, and positivity at all times



-----



## Who We Are Looking For



**Required Qualifications**



- Certified Personal Trainer or Fitness Coach (any recognized certification accepted)

- Minimum 2 years of experience coaching clients in fitness, weight loss, or wellness

- Strong understanding of nutrition fundamentals — caloric deficit, macros, sustainable eating habits

- Excellent English communication skills — written and verbal — you must be able to text and speak clearly with American clients

- Experience handling coaching calls or client consultations via phone or video

- Comfortable working with clients of different fitness levels, ages, backgrounds, and personalities

- Reliable internet connection and quiet environment for daily client calls

- Experience using or ability to quickly learn Trello for CRM and client management



**Preferred Qualifications**



- Experience working with weight loss clients specifically

- Background in nutrition coaching or certified nutrition consultant

- Experience with remote or online coaching (not just in-person)

- Familiarity with calorie tracking apps

- Experience coaching clients who are beginners or have limited mobility

- Strong empathy and emotional intelligence — our clients deal with real struggles and need a coach who genuinely cares



-----



## The Ideal Candidate Is



- **Proactive** — you reach out to clients before they reach out to you

- **Organized** — you keep Trello spotless and nothing falls through the cracks

- **Empathetic** — you understand that weight loss is emotional and you show up for clients on their hard days

- **Resilient** — you can handle different personalities, frustrations, and difficult conversations without taking it personally

- **Results-driven** — you measure your success by your clients’ results, not just by completing tasks

- **Self-managed** — you do not need someone watching over you to show up and do exceptional work every day

- **Communicative** — you keep the business owner informed, ask questions when unsure, and flag issues immediately

- **Positive** — your energy through text and voice is warm, encouraging, and motivating



-----



## Work Schedule



- Monday through Sunday 

- Must be available for client calls during US business hours (Eastern, Central, or Pacific Time)

- Daily check-in texts sent in the morning US time

- Flexibility for Elite clients who may need daily calls at consistent scheduled times

- Sunday light monitoring — check messages and respond to any urgent client needs



-----



## Tools You Will Use



- **FitHub** — client nutrition and calorie tracking app (we will train you)

- **Trello** — CRM for all client documentation and progress tracking

- **Smarter Contact, Google Voice or SMS** — daily client text communication 

- **Phone** — weekly and daily coaching calls

- **Trello** — weekly progress reporting to business owner 



-----



## Compensation

- We will be paying up to $500 USD weekly bonus for every client brought on board as well as bonuses for helping each client reach their goals.





- Competitive monthly salary starting at $3 USD but will increase as time goes on. 



- Long-term role with opportunity to grow as the business scales

- Performance reviews every 90 days with potential for rate increases



-----



## How to Apply



Please send the following to be considered:



1. Your resume or CV including all fitness and coaching certifications

1. A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are the right fit for this role — this is required so we can assess your English communication and coaching personality

1. A brief description of your experience coaching weight loss clients specifically







**Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.**



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long term. If you are serious about helping people transform their lives and want a stable, rewarding remote role — we want to hear from you.



WhatsApp -

mbers

title: Video Editor/Social Media Manager
description:
We own a YouTube channel and we're looking for an editor who can edit 4 to 5 videos per week for us. The videos will be about 8-12 minutes in length. 



Qualities we are looking for:



Core Responsibilities: Virtual Assistant



1.	Social media and YouTube video and content production, organizing, scheduling, and posting.

a.	VA should be well-trained in Mike Sherrard A.I. Agent content creation methodology.

b.	VA should be well-trained in Mike Sherrard Social Agent Academy methodology.

c.	Fluent English speaker and strong understanding of American culture and lifestyle.

d.	Strong time management and task prioritization

e.	Software experience needed: Google Drive, Whatsapp, Buffer/Later, YouTube, Instagram



2.	Main Jobs (Output-Based…not Hours-Based)

a.	Understand my brand and target audience.

b.	Properly research content ideas and video titles that create trust and a willingness to work with me among my target audience.

c.	Create teleprompter-friendly scripts for me to work off of when I go to record the videos.

d.	Edit the videos to match up with my brand style, vibe, and tone.

e.	Create thumbnails for the videos that match up with my brand style, vibe, and tone.

f.	Use Opus or some other editing software to create shorts and reels from the long-form video.

g.	Upload final long-form video, shorts, and reels to Google Drive for my review and approval.

h.	Once approved by me, organize and schedule shorts, reels, and long-form videos in Buffer per the appropriate posting times.



3.	Weekly Goals Checklist

a.	Complete editing of 2 long-form videos for YouTube

b.	Complete production/editing of 4 short-form videos for Instagram and YouTube Shorts

c.	Create thumbnails for each video.

d.	Schedule the newly completed videos in Buffer.

e.	End of Week Report (EOWR) – This is a weekly
 report to be sent to Steve on Friday at the end of the week to briefly explain:

i.	What was accomplished this week?

ii.	Was there anything you planned to get done this week that you didn’t get to? If so, what was it and how do you plan to get it done?

iii.	What is your plan and goals for next week?

iv.	Is there anything you need fro
 to help you accomplish your goals/tasks?



4.	Monthly Goals Checklist (to be done in the first week of the month)

a.	Assess the previous month’s video performance and connect with Steve on what needs to be done to improve.

b.	Using Mike Sherrard A.I. methods, research the upcoming month’s (not current month) video topics, create teleprompter-friendly scripts and deliver to Steve. 

i.	Making video topic suggestions is encouraged as long as it’s backed by data.



5.	Extra Credit Skills and Traits

a.	Self-sufficiency

b.	Fast learner

c.	Organized

d.	Social media and/or marketing background

e.	Ability to come up with and express ideas to refine and improve the systems I have in place. 



- Hard-worker

- Goal-oriented

- Resourceful

- Fast learner

- Not afraid to ask questions about things (questions are seen as a good thing in our company)

- Ability to make thumbnails for YouTube videos

- It is required that the editor has access to various amounts of stock footage and stock images as these will not be provided by the employer.

title: Industrial Designer/Engineer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

Cold Caller / Appointment Setter - US Business Hours (Night Shift PH)

Company: SigBridge (US-based, Connecticut)

Product: SNSYS - AI-powered business operations solution

Schedule: Full-time, Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM EST (9PM-6AM Manila)

Payment: Weekly via Wise



What We Do

SNSYS gives small businesses AI that sees, hears, and acts. We replace receptionists, marketers, security guards, and manual operations all for one monthly fee. We're growing fast and need dialers to book meetings with business owners.



The Job

This is not a sales job. This is a dialing job.



You will:

Log into our platform

See your call list

Click dial

Read the script on screen

Repeat
times per day



You will not need to:

Improvise

Go off script

Think about strategy

Do lead research

Close deals



We need your voice and your discipline. Our platform does the heavy lifting.



Requirements



Must have:

Clear, confident English (American clients)

Quiet workspace (no background noise)

Reliable internet (minimum 10 Mbps)

Backup internet (pocket WiFi or secondary connection)

USB headset with noise cancellation

Computer with Chrome browser

Ability to work US business hours (night shift PH)



Nice to have:

Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience

SaaS, IT, Software sales or SDR/BDR experience 



Compensation

Base: $5-7/hour US

Payment: Weekly

Schedule: Consistent hours, no weekend work



How to Apply



Send the following:

Voice sample (required): Record yourself reading this script



"Hi, this is [your name] calling from SNSYS (pronounced "Senses"). We help businesses run smarter with AI, it answers your phones, watches your building, collects receivables, and handles operations and more so you can make smarter decisions and focus on what matters...your business. Do you have 30 seconds? I'd like to see if we might be a fit."



Brief intro: 2-3 sentences about your calling experience (if any)

Availability: Confirm you can work 9PM-6AM Manila time, Monday-Friday



What Happens Next



We review applications (same day)

Offers sent same day w/ full welcome packet and onboarding / explainer videos, training, etc.

Performance review - if you hit metrics, you stay



We hire fast and fire fast. If you follow the script and show up consistently, you'll have a long-term role. If you can't follow instructions, it won't work out.



No agencies. Direct hires only.



Apply now.

title: High-Level Video Editor + Artist Operator (Faith-Based Music)
description:
We’re working with faith-based artists and building content that drives real growth, not just surface-level engagement.



This role is for someone who is highly experienced in video editing, understands how content performs in the music space, and can also manage social platforms while supporting day-to-day artist growth.



You will be responsible for both the quality of the content and how it performs.



What you’ll be doing:



- Editing is the core of this role. You will take raw footage and turn it into high-retention, platform-native content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube, with strong pacing, clean visuals, and intentional structure.



- Alongside that, you will manage posting, engagement, and overall content flow across platforms, while also supporting outreach and identifying opportunities that help the artist grow.



What we’re looking for:



- You are advanced in your editing software and comfortable working with professional-level tools and workflows. You understand color grading, pacing, captions, and how to structure content that holds attention.



- You have a strong feel for music. You know how to edit in rhythm, build emotion, and create content that fits the artist, not just generic trends.



- You understand what makes content perform. Not guesses, actual understanding of retention, hooks, and why people watch or scroll.



- You can communicate clearly, stay organized, and operate without constant direction.



To apply:



Send your portfolio and a short overview of your experience, including the tools you use and your setup. (will not consider if videos are low-level, simple edits, and not viral ready)



Also answer this:

What specific editing choices do you make to improve reach on short-form content?



Final note:



This is a hands-on role inside a fast-moving environment. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of their work and cares about performance, not just output. WE PAY WELL!!!!



God Bless:)

title: Interior Design Construction Documentation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Architect – Interior Design Documentation Specialist (Fully Remote)

Schedule: 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM PST, Monday–Friday (12:00 AM – 8:30 AM PH Time)

Company: Alignment Architects Inc., Cupertino, CA

Location: Fully Remote



Company Introduction

Join our fast-growing architectural and design firm based in San Jose, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. We specialize in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments. With a full range of real estate services—from land acquisition to project execution—Alignment Architects Inc. offers a dynamic environment for collaboration, technical growth, and design excellence.



Position Overview

 We are seeking a detail-oriented and technically skilled Architect – Interior Design Documentation Specialist to support our residential projects in California. This role focuses on the preparation of high-quality interior design construction documents and post-permit revisions.



 You will play a critical role in translating design intent into precise, buildable drawings, ensuring coordination across disciplines and compliance with applicable codes and standards. This position is ideal for someone with strong documentation experience who thrives in a fast-paced, production-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities

  - Construction Documentation:

 Develop and refine detailed interior design construction documents, including floor plans, reflected ceiling plans (RCPs), elevations, sections, schedules, and interior details. 

  - Technical Coordination:

 Coordinate architectural interiors with structural, MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing), and civil drawings to ensure fully integrated and conflict-free documentation. 

  - Code Compliance:

 Ensure all drawings comply with California building codes, local zoning regulations, and industry standards. 

  - Post-Permit Documentation:

 Prepare supplemental drawings, revisions, and addendums to address plan check comments, RFIs, and construction changes. 

  - Design Translation:

 Accurately translate design concepts, sketches, and markups from designers into clear and precise technical drawings. 

  - Team Collaboration:

 Work closely with architects, interior designers, project managers, and consultants to maintain documentation accuracy and efficiency. 

  - Quality Control:

 Review drawings for completeness, consistency, and constructability prior to submission. 

  - Software Utilization:

 Produce high-quality drawings using industry-standard tools such as Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.



Qualifications

  - Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Architecture 

  - Experience: Minimum of 3 years in architectural/interior design documentation (residential experience preferred; US projects a plus) 

  - Software Proficiency:

    -  Strong proficiency in Revit & Autocad (required) 

    -  Knowledge of SketchUp and Bluebeam is an advantage 

    -  Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite 

  - Technical Knowledge:

    -  Strong understanding of construction detailing and documentation standards 

    -  Familiarity with MEP and structural coordination 

    -  Knowledge of California codes is a plus 



  - Skills:

    -  Excellent written and verbal English communication 

    -  Strong attention to detail and organization 

    -  Ability to manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment 

    -  Proactive, collaborative, and accountable work ethic

title: UI/UX Designer
description:
# UI/UX Designer — NextGen BPO Projects (Freelance / Part-Time)



## About the Company



NextGen BPO is a technology company building SaaS products across multiple industries. Our active and upcoming projects include:



- **CargoMind Enhance** — A logistics SaaS platform for freight forwarding and customs brokerage companies, including a web dashboard and a Microsoft Outlook Add-in

- **HR & Workforce Management SaaS** — A time tracking and workforce management platform for businesses

- Other current and future internal tools and client-facing web applications



Our products are live in production with real users — you'll be working on something people actually use every day.



## What We're Looking For



A **freelance or part-time UI/UX designer** to help improve the user experience and visual design across our product portfolio. This is a great opportunity for a **fresh graduate or junior designer** looking to build real-world SaaS product experience. Our products are already live and functional — your job is to make them cleaner, more consistent, and easier to use.



You don't need years of industry experience. If you can think through a design problem, use Figma well, and communicate clearly, we'd love to hear from you.



## Scope of Work



### Immediate Priorities

- **UI refresh** — Modernize web dashboards across products (login, navigation, data tables, user management)

- **Constrained-space design** — Improve layout and visual hierarchy in narrow panels and sidebars (e.g. Outlook Add-in taskpane at ~350px wide)

- **Design system / component library** — Create a small Figma component library for consistent buttons, cards, forms, badges, and headers across products



### Ongoing Work

- Design new features before development (wireframes ? mockups ? handoff)

- Improve information density without sacrificing readability

- Ensure accessibility basics (contrast, font sizes, focus states)

- Responsive considerations for web and panel-based interfaces



## Deliverables



- **Figma files** with organized pages, components, and variants

- Design specs with spacing, colors, and typography tokens

- Interaction notes (hover states, transitions, loading states)

- Developer handoff via Figma (inspect mode)



## Requirements



### Must Have

- Working knowledge of **Figma** (components, auto-layout, basic prototyping)

- An eye for clean, readable UI — especially for screens with a lot of information

- Ability to think about **constrained layouts** (sidebars, narrow panels, small viewports)

- A portfolio or project showing your design process — **any dashboard, web app, or SaaS interface counts** (school projects, personal redesigns, or concept work welcome)

- Clear written communication in English



### Nice to Have

- Exposure to B2B, productivity tools, or SaaS design (school projects count!)

- Experience with **Microsoft Office Add-in** design patterns or Fluent UI design system

- Familiarity with design systems or component thinking

- Basic understanding of HTML/CSS — enough to know what's feasible to build

- Interest in HR tech, logistics, or enterprise software



> No industry background needed — we'll give you the context. We care more about how you think through a design problem than what domain you've worked in.



## Tech Context (For Reference)



You won't need to code, but knowing the stack helps you design within constraints:



| Layer | Technology |

|-------|-----------|

| Frontend | Vanilla JS, React, Fluent UI |

| Backend | Node.js / Express |

| Hosting | Microsoft Azure |

| Platforms | Web apps, Microsoft Outlook Add-in |

| Design Tool | Figma | 
v | 
sign



## Engagement Details



| Detail | Info |

|--------|------|

| Type | Freelance / Part-time contract |

| Hours | ~10–20 hrs/week (flexible) |

| Duration | Initial 1–2 month engagement, extendable |

| Location | Remote (any timezone, async-friendly) |

| Communication | Teams, async updates |



## How to Apply



Please share:

1. **Portfolio or project samples** — 2–3 examples of UI work. This can be anything: a dashboard redesign, a SaaS app concept, a school capstone, or a personal project — we just want to see how you approach UI problems

2. **Figma sample** — A link to any Figma file showing components, layouts, or a recent project

3. **Brief intro** — Tell us a bit about yourself and why you're interested in this kind of work

4. **Availability and rate** — Your hourly rate and how many hours per week you can commit

title: Graphic Design & Social Media Strategist
description:
About the Role

We are Keenya Kelly LLC, a fast-moving social media education and strategy brand based in Houston, Texas. We teach entrepreneurs how to grow on TikTok and Instagram and monetize through content. Our founder, Keenya Kelly, is a TikTok and Instagram Growth Strategist with a business built over 10 years.



We are looking for a reliable, creative, and communicative full-time tea
mber who can handle both graphic design and social media management tasks. This is a remote, long-term role for someone who is proactive, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly.



What You Will Do

Graphic Design (approx. 50% of role):

Create social media graphics, banners, thumbnails, and branded templates in Canva

Design promotional materials for launches, webinars, and digital products

Maintain brand consistency across all visual assets

Resize and reformat existing designs for multiple platforms



Social Media Management (approx. 50% of role):

Write or lightly edit captions in our brand voice

Monitor comments and engage with the community

Track basic performance metrics and report weekly

Support content calendar execution during launches



What We Are Looking For

Experience with Canva (required) — Photoshop or Illustrator a plus

Familiarity with TikTok and Instagram — how the platforms work, what performs well

Strong written English communication skills

Ability to follow brand guidelines and take direction well

Highly responsive to
 and messages — we are a fast-moving team

Organized, reliable, and able to meet deadlines without being chased

Previous experience working with a personal brand or online business is a plus



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, you MUST complete the following short sample task along with your application. Applications without the completed task will not be reviewed.



SAMPLE TASK



Task 1 — Graphic Design

Create ONE social media graphic (1080x1080) in Canva for a fictional post promoting a our course 
. Use any colors and design you like, but make it look professional and eye-catching. Export as a JPG or PNG and attach it to your application.



Design a carousel template that will go well with our brand 
/keenyakelly



Task 2 — Caption Writing

Write 2 caption options for the graphic above as if posting to Instagram. Each caption should include a hook, 2–3 sentences of value, a call to action, and 3–5 relevant hashtags.



Task 3 — Portfolio

Share a link to your portfolio OR attach 3–5 samples of past graphic design work. If you have managed social media accounts before, please also share the handle or a screenshot showing results.



DESIGN NOTE: Please do not use AI to design these sample task as we are looking for a designer that creates not someone using AI generated content for us.



A Note on Communication

This team moves quickly. We expect our tea
mbers to check
 and messages daily, respond within 24 hours, and complete agreed-upon tasks on time. If you are someone who values clear communication and takes ownership of your work, we would love to hear from you.



We look forward to reviewing your application

title: Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market
description:
Senior Business Development Manager (B2B Healthcare & NDIS) - ANZ Market

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Engagement Type: Full-Time Independent Contractor (40 hours per week, Australian Business Hours)



Company: CDM Direct



About Us CDM Direct is a leading provider of outsourced operational support and customer experience solutions. We are currently executing a major expansion across the Australia and New Zealand (ANZ) markets, specifically targeting the Aged Care and National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) sectors.



We provide high-value, tech-enabled operational support—including our flagship 'Rostering as a Service' (RaaS) solution powered by Zoom Contact Centre AI—to solve severe administrative, financial, and compliance bottlenecks for healthcare providers.



The Role This is not a scripted call centre role. This is a highly strategic, consultative B2B sales position working directly alongside our Australian leadership team.



As our market expansion lead, you will be responsible for driving new business acquisition across the ANZ health sector. You will:

• Conduct highly targeted, unscripted outreach to engage senior business decision-makers (CEOs, CFOs, Partners, and Operations Managers).

• Lead commercial conversations to uncover operational chaos, staffing bottlenecks, and financial pain points.

• Position CDM Direct’s RaaS and outsourced solutions with absolute clarity and commercial credibility.

• Secure "Qualified Meetings" (QMBs) for our senior sales executives, directly driving the top of the revenue pipeline.



The Ideal Candidate (The "Hunter") We are exclusively recruiting Tier 1 B2B sales talent. To succeed in this role, you must possess severe commercial resilience and a genuine "hunter" mentality. You will be dealing with busy executives in a highly regulated industry; you must be comfortable handling objections, navigating gatekeepers, and creating commercial urgency from scratch.



• Minimum 3+ years of proven success in outbound B2B sales, KPO, or SaaS business development.

• Exceptional, polished English communication skills capable of peer-to-peer conversations with Australian C-Suite executives.



• Deep discipline, self-management, and the resilience to execute daily strategic outreach in a remote environment.

• A stable, private home office with reliable high-speed internet.



What We Are NOT Looking For



• Entry-level customer service or call centre agents.

• Telemarketers who rely on rigid scripts.

• Candidates seeking a passive account management role; this is a proactive pipeline-generation position.



Remuneration & Commercial Benefits



We offer a highly lucrative, performance-driven commercial package designed to reward top performers:



• Base Retainer: PHP 85,000 per month.

• Health & Wellbeing: Up to PHP 50,000 annual allowance to fully reimburse the cost of a premium private HMO plan for you and one dependent.

• Year-End Bonus: An annual service bonus equivalent to one month's base fee (13th month), paid in December.

• Activity Bonus: NZ$50 for every Qualified Meeting Booked (QMB) to supplement your income while your pipeline builds.

• Revenue Commission: An uncapped 2.5% commission on the Year 1 Contract Value of closed deals, with an accelerator to 5% for high performance.



• Leave & Lifestyle: You will observe standard Australian public holidays as non-working days without any reduction to your base fee. After 12 months, you are permitted 10 days of planned unavailability per annum.



How to Apply



If you have the resilience and the commercial acumen to drive this expansion, please submit:

1. Your updated CV.

2. A link to your LinkedIn profile.

3. A brief cover letter outlining your most successful experience generating outbound B2B meetings with senior executives.

title: Test Analyst - Remote

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Company Overview

Join our SaaS Customer Engagement Platform company as a Remote DevOps Engineer. We are looking for a highly motivated, self-starting candidate who is ready to take ownership of our infrastructure and security compliance initiatives.



Role Description

As a DevOps Engineer, you'll own the full lifecycle of our cloud infrastructure and deployment systems. You'll build CI/CD pipelines, manage Azure resources, drive security certification initiatives, and work with our team to optimize costs. We're looking for someone with genuine drive and curiosity who digs into problems, learns quickly, and keeps pushing forward. You don't need to know everything on day one, but you need the hunger to master it.



Key Responsibilities



Infrastructure & Deployment

- Architect, develop, deploy, and evolve CI/CD systems for our cloud applications

- Write application deployment automation using industry-standard tools like Jenkins

- Deploy and manage Azure services including App Services, SQL Database, and Virtual Machines

- Monitor system performance and respond to monitoring alerts

- Provide systems support and perform emergency deployments outside standard hours when needed



Security Certifications & Compliance

- Lead the initiative to achieve and maintain key security certifications including ISO 27001 and FedRAMP

- Develop a strategic roadmap for pursuing multiple certifications, identifying overlaps and dependencies

- Execute certification initiatives incrementally, building knowledge and compliance over time

- Write comprehensive documentation for security certification applications and audits

- Implement and maintain security best practices across infrastructure



Data & Database Management

- Demonstrate strong understanding of database systems including MongoDB and SQL databases

- Implement and manage backup strategies and disaster recovery procedures

- Apply security best practices in data storage, access, and management



Cost Optimization

- Identify and recommend Azure cost-saving opportunities and optimization techniques

- Collaborate with development teams to determine cost-efficient architectural solutions

- Provide guidance on resource utilization and cloud spending optimization



User & System Administration

- Manage Active Directory administration including adding users, setting up new employees and contractors

- Provide configuration support and troubleshooting for employees and contractors as needed



What We're Looking For

- Genuine drive to learn and take on complex challenges

- Self-directed problem solver who stays engaged with difficult problems

- Strong communication and documentation skills

- Ability to work independently

- Willingness to respond to emergencies outside standard hours



Foundational Experience (You'll grow from here)

- Hands-on experience with CI/CD concepts and tools like Jenkins, Azure DevOps, or GitHub Actions

- Working knowledge of Azure cloud platform

- Understanding of GitHub for version control and collaboration

- Experience with monitoring and observability tools (Pingdom, DataDog, New Relic, or similar)

- Basic familiarity with databases and scripting/automation concepts

- Willingness to perform deployment tasks during off-hours in emergency situations



 Required for Application

- Provide a link to your resume/CV

- Include a cover letter with a brief summary of your relevant experience and why you are interested in this position

- Use the subject line: 'DevOps - [Your Name]'

title: Full Stack Developer – Senior – React / .NET / Azure

 Core

Requirements

 Core

- Familiarity with Azure (App Services, Functions, Service Bus, Storage)

- Experience with SQL databases and data modeling

- Understanding of OAuth, Active Directory, and CI/CD practices

- Comfortable using AI-assisted development tools (Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor)

Nice to Have

title: Customer Service Representative & Executive Assistant
description:
About Us

SoCal Seismic Construction is a residential foundation and seismic company based in Southern California. We specialize in foundation inspections, seismic retrofitting, foundation repairs, drainage, and waterproofing. We are FEMA trained and have proudly participated in the Earthquake Brace + Bolt (EBB) program since 2013. We're a fast-moving team that takes pride in delivering quality work and exceptional client experience from the very first call.



About the Role

We are looking for a professional, polished, and highly organized individual to serve as our Customer Service Representative and Executive Assistant to the Owner. This is a dual-role position — you will be the first point of contact for our clients while also providing direct administrative support to our owner. If you are a strong communicator who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can manage multiple responsibilities with grace, we want to hear from you.



What You'll Be Doing

Customer Service



Answer incoming calls professionally and represent the company with confidence

Respond to client inquiries via phone and
 in a timely manner

Schedule inspections and coordinate appointments

Follow up with leads and existing clients

Provide clients with accurate information about our services and process

Ensure a positive client experience from first contact through job completion



Executive Assistant to the Owner



Manage the owner's calendar, appointments, and communications

Provide quick and accurate updates on job status, payments, and scheduling

Pull information from our systems (Service Fusion, QuickBooks, 
) as requested

Handle confidential information with professionalism and discretion

Assist with day-to-day operational tasks and priorities as they arise

Act as a liaison between the owner and internal tea
mbers



General Admin



Maintain and update CRM and project management platforms

Assist with data entry, document management, and internal communications

Support the office team with administrative tasks as needed





What We're Looking For



Proven experience in customer service, reception, or an executive assistant role

Excellent verbal and written communication skills — you are the voice of our company

Professional phone presence and strong interpersonal skills

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to prioritize in a fast-moving environment

Comfortable navigating multiple platforms (Service Fusion, QuickBooks, 
, or similar)

Discreet, reliable, and responsive during business hours

Construction or trades industry experience is a plus but not required

Bilingual (English/Spanish) is a plus





Availability

Monday through Friday, 8AM–5PM (Pacific Time). Must be available and responsive during all business hours.



Compensation

$8/hour upon successful completion of probation





To Apply

Your resume

A short video introduction telling us about yourself and your relevant experience

title: Senior Video Editor | Night Shift – PH Time
description:
About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

  - all feedback is applied

  - no new issues are introduced

  - output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:

title: Social media manager...
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who does things the same way I would do them, with all my knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience internalized… but better. Of course that someone does not exist (yet!).



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do. Someone who can preform without using AI. Who can write authentic texts themselves, and can think strategy without using GPT's suggestions.



Social media is a complex discipline. You do not learn this from a course, some online tips, or from experience in a previous position. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, good visual awareness, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.

Payment is 15000 PHP/month, based on 20 hours/week.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please complete the IQ test and the DISC test this platform offers.

title: Sales Representative
description:

To apply, please SUBMIT your resume and a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and qualifications.

We are seeking a motivated and results-driven Sales Representative who doesn’t just book appointments but actively drives sales and closes deals. The ideal candidate is an excellent communicator, confident in presenting to clients, and capable of generating revenue by addressing client needs, closing deals, and identifying upsell opportunities.



Responsibilities:

- Conduct outreach to potential clients through cold calls,
s, and other communication methods.

- Deliver engaging and persuasive presentations to clients to close deals effectively.

- Identify and create upsell opportunities during client meetings and presentations.

- Collaborate with the sales team to ensure seamless handoff of prospects, follow-ups, and conversion strategies.

- Maintain a deep understanding of our offerings and tailor presentations to meet specific client needs.

- Showcase confidence and professionalism while presenting, whether over the phone, via video call, or in written correspondence.

- Work independently, learn quickly, and adapt to evolving tasks and priorities.

- Focus on generating revenue, not just scheduling meetings, by proactively closing deals and ensuring client satisfaction.



Requirements:

- Familiarity with GoHighLevel, its features, and how it can be used in sales and marketing processes.

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, both written and verbal, in English.

- Proven experience in delivering presentations, closing deals, and upselling in a sales environment.

- Comfort and confidence in presenting to clients and prospects to drive sales.

- Proficiency in conducting online research and gathering relevant information to tailor presentations effectively.

- Familiarity with AI and ChatGPT technologies for enhanced communication (preferred).

- Self-driven and able to work autonomously with minimal guidance.

- Organized and detail-oriented, ensuring accurate and organized record-keeping.

Application Process:

title: Para-Broker / Mortgage Broking Credit Analyst
description:
Para Broker - Credit Analyst – Australian Mortgage Broking (Medical & Complex Lending Specialist)

Work from Home | Full-Time | 60,
,000 PHP pm



Are you an EXPERIENCED / SENIOR Para-broker or Credit Analyst ready to level up your career and be part of a thriving, high-performing team? We're an established mortgage brokerage based in Australia, specialising in Finance for Medical professionals — but we handle residential (owner-occupied and investment), commercial, SMSF, complex, and high-net-worth lending.



We're not your average brokerage. Every day is different. Every file presents a new challenge. Our clients are driven, intelligent professionals — and they expect the same from us.



That’s why we’re looking for a **GENUINLY EXPERIENCED** Credit Analyst / Para - Broker — not someone who ONLY submits applications via AOL or plays a broker support/admin role.



What We’re Looking For:



End-to-end experience: From researching borrowing structures, assessing servicing, recommending lenders, and preparing strong applications — through to following deals to settlement.



Confident across multiple loan types: You’ve worked on residential, investment, commercial, SMSF, and trusts, and you're comfortable navigating credit policy across major banks and non-bank lenders.



EXCELLENT English communication skills: You’ll liaise directly with brokers and sometimes clients — explaining your recommendations clearly and concisely.



Problem-solving mindset: You enjoy working through complex deals and helping find smart, viable solutions.



Not a support role: If your background is primarily in administration or document collection/submission only, this role is NOT suitable.



A successful applicant will have experience working with AOL, Mercury & Quickly. If you do not know what these programs are, then you are NOT qualified to enquire for this role. 



Why Join Us?



* Work with a tight-knit team of 3 brokers and 3 support staff who LOVE what they do

* We have a 100% approval track record and highly satisfied clients — your work will directly impact real outcomes

* Above-market salary for the right candidate — we pay well and value skill

* A fun, fast-paced culture — every day is different, and we keep things exciting

* Full-time, permanent, work-from-home role: Monday to Friday, 9am to 6pm AEST





How to Apply



Please DO NOT send a CV only.



We want to hear from you.

Send us a short VIDEO INTRODUCTION  (2–4 minutes) where you:



* Walk us through your experience as a Credit Analyst

* Explain the types of loans and clients you’ve worked with

* Tell us how your role differs from broker support or admin staff

* Show us your communication style and English fluency



Upload your video to Google Drive or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application. Failure to do this will result in AUTOMATIC DECLINE of your application, as it will show a lack of attention to detail. ATTENTION TO DETAIL is KEY to this role.  



If you're a true credit analyst who loves problem-solving, has a high attention to detail, excellent English, thrives in a high-achieving team, and wants to work on complex deals that challenge you — this is your next great opportunity.



We look forward to seeing your video!

description:
Are you organized, detail-driven, and motivated to help turn leads into paying customers—even if you're not on the front lines of sales?



Palmer Construction is looking for a Remote Sales Support & Lead Coordinator to be the engine behind our sales team. You’ll play a key role in ensuring every lead is followed up with, every inspection gets scheduled, and every sales rep has the support they need to close deals.



What You’ll Do

- Act quickly on new leads—call, qualify, and schedule inspections for our sales team

- Make follow-up calls to leads that are still d
, keeping them engaged and moving forward

- Track open tasks and job statuses, ensuring estimates, audits, and meetings stay on schedule

- Keep sales reps’ calendars organized, ensuring all appointments are properly scheduled and followed through

- Create weekly sales meeting slides and track action items

- Make welcome calls to new customers, providing a warm and professional first touch

- Redirect occasional phone calls or questions to the appropriate team when needed



What We're Looking For

- Highly organized with excellent attention to detail

- Sales-driven mindset—you understand the urgency and importance of follow-up

- Strong communicator—comfortable on the phone and confident when checking in with others

- Tech-savvy—able to work across CRM tools, calendars, and spreadsheets

- Self-motivated—you take ownership and pride in getting things done



Preferred Experience

- Previous experience in sales coordination, appointment setting, admin support, or customer follow-up

- Familiarity with CRM systems and remote collaboration tools

- Experience in roofing, construction, or home services is a plus—but not required



Why Join Palmer Construction?

We’re a customer-focused, fast-moving company with a strong team culture. As a remote Sales Support & Lead Coordinator, you’ll play a key role in the lead and sales process—helping ensure no opportunity is missed, and that our sales team has the support they need to succeed.

title: Social Media Outreach & Engagement Assistant (Chat-Based Role)
description:
**Location:** Remote (Philippines Only)

**Hours:** 5 hours/day, 7 days/week (flexible schedule)



---



**About the Role**



We are looking for a confident and engaging Social Media Outreach Assistant to help grow our online presence by building conversations and connections across platforms such as Instagram, Snapchat, Hinge, and similar apps.



This role focuses heavily on **chat-based interaction**, relationship-building, and guiding people toward our platform.



---



### **Responsibilities**



* Actively message and engage with users on social media platforms

* Build natural conversations and maintain ongoing chats

* Follow proven messaging frameworks and adapt when needed

* Encourage interest and guide users toward our service

* Track daily outreach numbers and results

* Perform occasional simple admin tasks if required



---



### **Compensation**



* **Base Pay:** $400/month



* **Weekly Tiered Commission:**



  * First 50 referrals/week ? $1.50 each

  * 51–100 referrals/week ? $1.75 each

  * 101–150 referrals/week ? $2.00 each

  * 151+ referrals/week ? $2.25 each



*(Each tier applies only to referrals within that range)*



---



### **Earning Potential (Examples)**



* 10 referrals/day (~70/week) ? **~$210/week**

* 15 referrals/day (~105/week) ? **~$270/week**

* 20 referrals/day (~140/week) ? **~$340/week**

* 25 referrals/day (~175/week) ? **~$415+/week**



Actual earnings depend on your consistency and performance. Strong performers can exceed these numbers over time.



---



### **What We’re Looking For**



* Strong written English with a natural, conversational tone

* Comfortable chatting with new people for extended periods

* Confident, personable, and socially aware

* Consistent and reliable (very important)

* Able to follow direction but also think independently

* Motivated by performance-based earnings



---



### **Important Notes**



* This role is **highly performance-based**

* Success depends on your ability to engage and build interest

* We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow their income over time



---



### **To Apply**



Please include:



1. Your experience with social media and chatting platforms

2. Your internet speed

3. A short example of how you would start a conversation with someone online

4. Start your application with the word **“CONNECT”**



---



If you are confident in your communication skills and enjoy chatting with people, this role offers strong earning potential and long-term growth.

title: Customer service & dispatcher (High Call VOLUME) - Must speak GREAT ENGLISH
description:
Hello, thank you for your interest in working with us.



We are looking for someone who can handle a high volume of calls daily (50–70+ calls) and operate in a fast-paced environment. You must have strong, stable Wi-Fi to ensure calls are clear and never disconnected. Reliability is very important  you are expected to show up on time every day and be fully available during working hours.



Work Schedule (U.S. Eastern Time):

Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

Saturday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM

Sunday: OFF



Philippines Time Equivalent:

Monday – Friday: 9:00 PM – 7:00 AM (next day)

Saturday: 9:00 PM – 3:00 AM (next day)

Sunday: OFF



This is a 56-hour work week. Starting pay is $7.00 per hour with opportunity for growth.



You must speak very clear, professional English and be able to understand customers easily over the phone. If you are bilingual (English & Spanish), that is a strong plus.



Responsibilities include answering calls, making callbacks, scheduling appointments, and dispatching jobs quickly and efficiently. Speed is extremely important in this role.



For Jay’s Mobile Tire Shop, you will:

    •    Gather customer location, vehicle info, and service needed

    •    Dispatch jobs to technicians

    •    Prioritize urgent roadside calls

    •    Handle multiple customers at once



We take pride in our reputation and strong Google reviews in South Florida. You must represent the company professionally and help us maintain excellent customer service.



???? IMPORTANT:

Please send a voice recording introducing yourself. Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: AEO / GEO / SEO Specialist for Australian Websites
description:
I’m looking for an SEO specialist to support Australian websites with content creation, on-page SEO, backlinks, SEO audits, tracking, and reporting.



This is gig work/contract work for now. I’m looking to test the waters, see how we work together, and assess the quality of execution before considering anything further. 



The main focus is local SEO for Australian businesses, while also improving visibility across Google and AI-driven search platforms.



Tools We Use:

- WordPress

- Divi 4 / Divi 5

- Rank Math

- SEMrush

- Claude

- ChatGPT

- Notion

- Asana

- Google Analytics 4

- Google Search Console

- Google Tag Manager



What I’m Looking For

- Strong SEO experience

- Strong English writing and communication skills

- Experience with content creation and on-page SEO

- Experience doing SEO audits and giving practical recommendations

- Understanding of local SEO

- Experience with backlinks / off-page SEO

- Comfortable working in WordPress

- Able to use AI tools well, without producing generic AI content

- Experience with GA4, Google Search Console, and Google Tag Manager

- Able to track performance and assess whether SEO work is producing real results

- Able to create clear client-friendly reports showing work completed, progress, and outcomes

- Organised, reliable, and able to follow systems



Important:

I am not looking for low quality AI-generated content. AI can be used as part of the workflow, but the final work must be well written, properly edited, and sound natural in English.



I’m also looking for someone who already has established systems and methods of execution, not someone who is still learning from scratch.



A portfolio is required. Reporting examples are also highly preferred.



Nice to Have

- Experience working on Australian websites

- Experience with Divi

- Understanding of AEO / GEO / AI search

title: Skilled Real Estate Video Editor

Applications that do NOT follow instructions will be ignored.

title: Lead AI Sports Content Creator & Community Manager
description:
About Us:

We are Interlink AI, the company behind the HDN Sport Network. We have already built the most successful AI sport brand in the world from the ground up (150+ million views per month on
). Now, we are expanding our empire into a massive, multi-channel network. We are launching our flagship Basketball and Soccer accounts first, but we are aggressively scaling to 10+ different channels (one dedicated to every major sport).



Because we have a proven, highly profitable business model, we can guarantee your work and your hours. This is not a temporary gig or a fragile startup; we are looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to build a career with the best in the industry.



The Role:

This is a hybrid role that blends creative AI generation, extensive viral research, and active community management. You won't just be generating images; you will be the pulse of the new HDN brand across multiple sports.



Timezone & Schedule: We are based in Australia on Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST), which is exactly 2 hours ahead of Philippine Time (PHT). You will be expected to start your shift at 9:00 AM PHT each day to ensure seamless communication with our operations team.



Content Example: To see the exact caliber of viral, hyper-realistic content you will be creating, check out this recent Reel from our basketball channel, HDN Hoops:


==



Please note: This position will begin as a Part-Time role (4 hours per day / 20 hours per week) as a paid trial to establish your workflow. Once you have mastered the AI generation process, this role is guaranteed to transition directly into a Full-Time position (8 hours per day / 40 hours per week).



Key Responsibilities:

- Viral AI Ideation & Research: Spend hours daily analyzing Meta and TikTok to find the highest-performing AI sports videos within each respective sport/niche. Your job is to find AI concepts that have already proven to be extremely successful, reverse-engineer why they went viral, and adapt those exact formats and hooks for the HDN channels.

- AI Content Generation: Master our specific, locked-in tech stack to create flawless assets. You will exclusively use Nano Banana Pro for hyper-realistic image generation and Seedance 2.0 for high-fidelity video motion.

- Video Assembly: Stitching together the AI-generated clips, adding trending audio, text hooks, and dynamic captions to create ready-to-post Reels/Shorts.

- Community Management: You will use Meta Business Suite to reply to comments on our
 and Instagram accounts. Your main goal here is just to keep the comment sections active and engage directly with the fans.

- 
 Operations: We run a highly organized operation. All of our team communication, QA reviews, and daily operations happen seamlessly within a 
 server.



The Ideal Candidate:

- You are a universal sports fanatic. You must have a deep knowledge of ALL major sports. While we are launching with Soccer and Basketball, you will eventually be managing content for 10+ different sports channels. You know the slang, the culture, the rules, and what fans actually care about across the board.

- You are extremely online. You understand exactly what makes a sports highlight go viral.

- You are highly adaptable. AI moves fast. You must be willing to learn new prompting techniques to ensure absolute photorealism.

- You have excellent English. You need to write witty, engaging captions and reply to comments naturally.



Required Tech Stack Experience:

- Nano Banana Pro (We only use this for images)

- Seedance 2.0 (We only use this for video)

- CapCut (or Premiere Pro) for fast, trendy video editing

- Meta Business Suite

- 



How to Apply:

Please reply with your portfolio or examples of previous social media accounts you have managed. Important: To ensure you read this entire post, you must include two things in your application:

1. Include the name of your favorite sports team in the very first line of your application.

2. Include a link to a recent Speedtest.net result (minimum 50Mbps download speed required) and briefly list your PC specs (Processor/RAM) to ensure you can handle the video generation workflow.

Applications without these details will be immediately ignored.

title: YouTube Video Editor / Content Creator – Training Provided
description:
Video & Content Producer – YouTube / Social / Amazon (MrYouWho Global Media Network)



Type of Work: Full-time (can start part-time during training)

Salary: US $4.00–$5.00 per hour (PHP equivalent, depending on skills and test edit)

Hours: 40 hours per week



Job Overview



MrYouWho is a fast-growing global tech & lifestyle media network with 260K+ YouTube subscribers, 15+ channels, and a big presence across YouTube, Amazon, TikTok, Instagram,
, Pinterest and Threads. We review tech, audio and lifestyle products and turn them into high-performing videos and short-form content that actually sells.



We’re looking for a Video & Content Producer (Graduate and Experienced) who wants to build a real media career – not just do basic VA tasks. You’ll start by helping edit YouTube reviews, Shorts/Reels/TikToks and Amazon Influencer videos, with full training, clear SOPs and a supportive team.



This role is ideal for a fresh grad or early-career editor who’s serious about learning, growing and staying long-term.



What You’ll Do



• Edit full YouTube review videos (8–12 minutes) from raw footage using B-roll, overlays and music

• Cut short-form vertical clips from long videos (YouTube Shorts, Reels, TikTok)

• Help prepare Amazon Influencer videos using existing scripts/footage and clear guidelines

• Do basic thumbnail work in Canva following our brand style

• Follow our file naming and folder structure in Dropbox

• Track tasks in Notion so nothing is missed and deadlines are clear

• Work closely with our Content & Operations Manager and wider team



Requirements (Must-Have)



• Graduate or early-career (0–2 years) in Multimedia, Film, Communication, Digital Media or similar

• Comfortable editing in CapCut Desktop, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve or similar

•.Can follow story flow, pacing and basic sound design

• Strong English comprehension (scripts, briefs and SOPs are all in English)

• Reliable computer and stable internet connection for video editing

• Coachable, detail-oriented, and able to follow checklists consistently



Nice-to-Have (Bonus, not required)



• Experience editing YouTube videos with voiceover + B-roll

• Experience cutting Shorts/Reels/TikToks

•.Basic Canva/thumbnail experience

• Interest in tech, audio, gadgets or reviews



Compensation & Schedule



• Full-time: 40 hours per week (can start at 25–30 hours/week during training if needed)

• Pay range: US $4.00–$5.00 per hour, paid in PHP at the current exchange rate

• 13th month pay, PH holidays and performance-based raises/bonuses for long-term tea
mbers

• Clear growth path into Senior Editor or Campaign Producer roles if performance is strong



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Please answer these questions in your own words. Applications without these will not be read.



1. Why do you want to work for MrYouWho as a Graduate Video & Content Producer?

2. What experience do you have editing videos (university projects, freelance, YouTube, etc.)?

3. Share 2–3 links to videos you’ve edited (can be uni work, passion projects or client work).

4. What editing software do you use, and what is your current PC/laptop spec (CPU / RAM / GPU / internet speed)?

5. How many hours per week can you reliably commit, and what time window do you usually work in?



To show that you read this properly, add the word DETAILS at the very end of your application.

title: Creative Video Editor for Global YouTube/Social Media Brand – No Templates, Just Talent
description:
Creative Video Editor – YouTube Reviews, Social Media & Shorts (MrYouWho)

Remote – Philippines | $4.00–$6.00 USD/hour | 25–30 hrs/week | Long-Term Creative Role



Edit Videos Seen by 110,000+ Daily Viewers – Global Tech & Lifestyle Brand



MrYouWho is a global tech and lifestyle review brand with 260K+ YouTube subscribers, 15+ active channels, and a growing international presence across YouTube, TikTok, Threads, Instagram, and Pinterest. We create high-converting product reviews and engaging short-form content for audiences around the world.



We’re looking for a creative, detail-oriented video editor who can turn raw footage into polished, engaging YouTube reviews & Videos — then repurpose them into Shorts, Reels, and platform-specific edits.



A quick note before you apply:



This is a creative role, and we want to hire you — not ChatGPT or a template.



	•	Please write your answers in your own words.

	•	Generic or AI-generated replies will be auto-deleted.

	•	Applications without the 4 required answers will not be read.

	•	To show you’ve read this, add the word DETAILS at the very end of your application.



We’re excited to meet people who think carefully, love what they do, and want to grow long-term with our team.



What You’ll Do



• Edit full YouTube review videos (8–12 minutes) from raw footage with overlays, transitions, and music

• Repurpose edits into Shorts, Reels, and platform-specific clips

• Edit/adapt existing videos for overseas channels (subtitles, pacing, visuals)

• Create custom thumbnails in Canva

• Add giveaway overlays, product annotations, and light blog formatting

• Follow our brand’s file & style systems (Dropbox & Notion)



Required Skills



• Proficiency in CapCut (desktop), Premiere Pro, Filmora, or DaVinci Resolve

• Canva for thumbnail creation

• 3+ years editing long-form YouTube videos with voiceovers & B-roll

• Experience with short-form and cross-platform edits

• Strong grasp of pacing, visual flow, and sound design

• Familiarity with YouTube Studio, Dropbox, and Notion

• Fast, reliable computer + high-speed internet (upload/download)

• English fluency (reading/writing)



Perks



• Weekly pay via Wise or PayPal

• $4.00–$6.00 USD/hour depending on experience

• Flexible schedule after training

• Raises & bonuses for consistent performance

• Long-term role with growth opportunities

• Your work featured across multiple global channels



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



Answer these 4 questions in your own words (applications without these will be ignored):

	1.	Why do you want to work for MrYouWho as a video editor?

	2.	What experience do you have creating full-length YouTube review videos from raw footage?

	3.	Share 2–3 links to long-form videos you’ve edited (must include voiceover, B-roll, and story pacing).

	4.	What editing software do you use, and how comfortable are you with adding overlays, music, and transitions?



Don’t forget: Add the word DETAILS at the end of your application to confirm you read this properly.
