title: Lead Data Analyst, Returns and Credits
description:
We are looking for a highly technical and analytical Lead Analyst to own the data integrity of our returns and credits department. Your primary goal is ensuring that our refunds and credits are reported accurately, formatted correctly, and tracked meticulously.



Key Responsibilities:



Data Integrity & Auditing: Monitor the full lifecycle of refunds and credits. Ensure all data is updated, formatted correctly, and reported without errors.



SLA Tracking & Vendor Accountability: Build and maintain tracking systems for vendor performance. You will ensure we know exactly which refunds, credits, and returns are on time and which are pending.



Workflow Assignment: Generate daily reports that serve as the "action plan" for the Returns Coordinator and Credits Coordinator. You will assign specific tasks to them to clear backlogs and fix discrepancies.



Scripting & Automation: Utilize scripts (Python, VBA, or AI-generated code) to clean messy data, run complex audits, and automate manual reporting processes.



Financial Reconciliation: Work with accounting values to ensure that what is in our system matches the financial reality of our bank/credit memos.



The Ideal Candidate:



Analytical & Technical: You spend 95% of your time in the data. You are an expert in Excel and comfortable using scripts to manipulate large datasets.



Detail-Obsessed: You spot formatting errors and missing values immediately.



Directive: You are comfortable handing off work to tea
mbers and following up to ensure it was done correctly.



Resourceful: You know how to use tools (including AI) to write the scripts or formulas needed to get the job done efficiently.



Requirements:



High-level proficiency in Excel (complex formulas, PivotTables, VBA/Macros).



Experience with scripting/automation (using Python, SQL, or similar to process data). Using AI to create scripts is acceptable. We DO NOT expect this individual to know how to code, or create scripts on their own, however to leverage AI and understand the tools to run it.



Background in working with financial data, accounting values, or inventory reconciliation.



Proven ability to organize workflows and track SLAs.



Send in you CV or a link to a shared file with necessary access granted. No CV will be automatically ignored.

title: Senior Manager - E-Commerce (with leadership exp)
description:
Description

We are hiring a senior E-commerce Manager to own and manage the majority of our digital business. This role is ideal for someone with a strong small business background who is comfortable leading a lean team, managing day to day operations, and stepping into the details when needed.



This is a hands on leadership role. We are not looking for a high level executive who operates far from execution. We are looking for someone who can lead, manage, and do..



Company Brief:

We are supporting a privately owned company that distributes marine dock parts and supplies, with a strong and growing e-commerce operation in Florida. The business serves both B2B and B2C customers and relies heavily on its digital channels to drive sales, support customer experience, and scale efficiently across domestic and international markets.



Responsibilities

Owning the end to end e-commerce operation across Shopify as the primary platform

Managing and supporting the back office and digital team

Overseeing technical, operational, and day to day e-commerce activities

Acting as the main point of contact for agencies and third party vendors

Representing the company on technical, operational, and integration related calls

Managing product additions, integrations, customer service escalations, and platform issues

Ensuring the team is aligned, productive, and clear on priorities

Running regular check ins and one on ones with direct reports

Coordinating with in person staff as it relates to e-commerce operations

Communicating clearly with company owners on progress, issues, and priorities

Getting hands on when needed to resolve issues or unblock the team



Platforms and Experience Required

Strong expertise in Shopify is required

Experience with Amazon is strongly preferred

Exposure to Walmart or eBay is a plus but not required

Comfort managing integrations, apps, and technical workflows

Experience working with agencies and external partners



Requirements



Education & Experience



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, E-commerce, or a related field is preferred

Minimum of 3 years of hands-on Shopify experience in a live e-commerce environment

Proven experience maintaining, optimizing, and troubleshooting Shopify stores

Experience managing or supporting marketplace platforms such as Amazon, Etsy, eBay and More

Background working in product-based or multi-channel e-commerce businesses

Strong understanding of end-to-end e-commerce operations and workflows

Comfortable working remotely and independently with minimal supervision

Able to manage day-to-day execution while overseeing team output and priorities

Ability to work fully during Eastern Standard Time business hours



Nice to Have Skills



Experience with additional marketplaces such as Walmart or other third-party platforms

Familiarity with e-commerce integrations, apps, and third-party tools

Basic understanding of e-commerce financials, including margins, pricing, and cost of goods

Experience coordinating with agencies or external vendors

Exposure to international e-commerce operations or cross-border selling

Comfortable supporting or overseeing digital marketing initiatives in partnership with specialists or agencies

Experience helping scale or integrate new brands or acquisitions into an existing e-commerce platform



Ideal Candidate Profile



Has managed a small to mid sized team (roughly 5–20 people)

Comes from a small business or growing company environment

Is comfortable wearing multiple hats

Can lead without being “too high level”

Is not afraid to get into the operational or technical details

Can grow with the company as we scale and potentially acquire other businesses



***Very important: Do take note that the applicant is required to share their updated CV with appropriate access. Applicants who are non compliant with this will be automatically ignored.***

title: Graphic Designer - Canva
description:

I own a successful Etsy shop focused on personalized monogram and embroidered gifts, and I’m expanding into t-shirt graphics and digital printable products.



I’m looking for a talented Canva designer who can take my written content, ideas, and brand direction and turn them into beautiful, high-converting designs.



? About the Brand

My shop focuses on high-quality, personalized gifts for moms, teachers, and children. The style is clean, elevated, preppy, and giftable—think boutique aesthetic, not trendy or overly graphic.

Your role is to bring everything together into polished, cohesive Canva designs.

???? Compensation

* Project-based pricing

(Please include your rates in your application.)



???? Test Project

title: Operations Co-ordinator
description:

Location – Remote

The Company:

Revolution360 is the number one bespoke out-of-home media company in Australia. Our Street Poster network is second to none. What started as a guerrilla urban network is now a fully-fledged legitimate product in the out-of-home space with accountability and measurability to rival the biggest out-of-home players.

They will report directly into the Production & Operations Director and work collaboratively with the Operations Executive, Operations Co-Ordinators and other departments across the organization to ensure targets are hit and campaigns are delivered on time and on budget, without losing any attention to detail.

title: Full-Stack Developer & Automation Engineer
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



OUR COMPANY BACKGROUND

Authority Solutions® is a digital marketing agency that focuses on Web Design, SEO (Search Engine Optimization), and AI-powered marketing technology to increase revenue for our clients. Founded in 2014, the company has grown year over year and has worked with remote tea
mbers in the Philippines since the beginning.



We serve clients in Medical, Legal, Ecommerce, and Home Services verticals — and we're building internal SaaS products to power our own growth and eventually serve the broader market. The company plans to 3X its revenue in the next 12 months, and this role is central to making that happen.



We are not a typical agency. We build our own tools. We use AI (Claude Code, GPT, automation agents) daily. We ship fast, iterate constantly, and expect our team to own what they build. If you want to be part of a small, high-output team where your work directly drives growth — keep reading.



JOB TITLE

Full-Stack Developer & Automation Engineer



JOB OVERVIEW

We're hiring a developer who can operate across two equally important domains:

1) Internal SaaS Product Development (50%) — Design, build, and ship lightweight internal web applications from the ground up using React/Next.js, Supabase, and Vercel. These are greenfield builds. You'll own the full stack — database design, API layer, frontend UI, auth, deployment, and iteration based on team feedback.



2) Automation & Integration Engineering (50%) — Architect, build, and maintain business-critical automation workflows (primarily n8n) that connect our CRM (GoHighLevel), ecommerce (WooCommerce), project management (ClickUp), communication (Slack), and operational systems (Google Sheets). You own the plumbing between platforms — making sure data, orders, pipelines, and alerts flow correctly with bulletproof error handling.



This is a hands-on, high-ownership role. You will not be waiting for tickets. You will be working directly with company leadership to understand what needs to be built, then building it.



WHO YOU ARE

You're a builder. You get energy from shipping things, not fro
etings about shipping things.

You're comfortable with ambiguity. "Here's the problem, figure out the best solution" is exciting to you, not stressful.

You use AI-assisted development tools (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot) daily and consider them a multiplier, not a crutch. This is a hard requirement.



You can context-switch between writing a React component in the morning and debugging a webhook integration in the afternoon.



You document what you build so others can understand and maintain it.

You communicate proactively — especially when something is blocked, broken, or behind schedule.



REQUIRED TECHNICAL SKILLS

Full-Stack Development

React / Next.js — Building production web applications from scratch (not just modifying templates)

Supabase — Database design, Row Level Security, Edge Functions, Auth, Realtime subscriptions

Vercel — Deployment, environment management, serverless functions

JavaScript/TypeScript — Strong fundamentals, not just copy-paste from Stack Overflow

Tailwind CSS — Clean, responsive UI implementation

REST APIs — Designing and consuming APIs, authentication patterns, error handling

Git — Version control discipline (branching, PRs, meaningful commits)

Automation & Integration Engineering

n8n (or equivalent workflow automation platform) — Multi-step workflows including webhooks, cron schedules, branching logic, data transformations, retries, idempotency, and error handling

GoHighLevel (GHL) — Pipelines, CRM entities, webhooks, API integrations

WooCommerce — Orders, inventory, payment events, cancellation logic, REST API

ClickUp — Task management integrations, status updates, messaging

Slack — Notification workflows, integration patterns

Google Sheets — As an operational input/output layer for bulk actions and data mapping

AI-Assisted Development (Hard Requirement)

Claude Code, Cursor, or GitHub Copilot — Daily proficiency. You use AI tools to ship faster and higher quality, not as a replacement for understanding what you're building.

Ability to evaluate, prototype, and recommend AI-powered features and tooling improvements for internal use.



PREFERRED / NICE-TO-HAVE SKILLS

Experience building chatbots or conversational AI agents (GHL, Convocore, Voiceflow, or similar)

WordPress custom API integrations and plugin development

Experience with Stripe or payment processing integrations

Familiarity with SEO tools and marketing technology platforms

Experience modeling API costs at scale

Infrastructure management on Render, Railway, or similar platforms



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Internal SaaS Development

Build greenfield internal web applications (React/Next.js + Supabase + Vercel) from concept to production

Own the full product lifecycle: database schema design, API development, frontend UI, authentication, deployment, and ongoing iteration

Current product roadmap includes internal tools for content production, SEO auditing, and local SEO workflows — you will build these from scratch

Write clean, maintainable code with documentation

Ship iteratively — working prototypes first, then polish based on team feedback

Automation Workflow Engineering

Design and deploy multi-step n8n automation workflows that synchronize data across GHL, WooCommerce, ClickUp, Slack, and Google Sheets

Build and maintain workflows including: sale event syncing (GHL ? WooCommerce), bulk restock pipelines, daily operational summaries, low-stock alerts, and reconciliation jobs

Implement robust error handling: retries, deduplication, dead-letter patterns, audit logging, and alerting

Establish reusable workflow patterns with consistent naming conventions, standardized nodes, and environment variable management

Data Integrity & Reliability

Build reconciliation workflows with auto-fix strategies where feasible

Ensure deduplication persistence to prevent duplicate downstream actions

Validate workflow correctness across edge cases (failed payments, cancellation restores, multi-item orders, out-of-order webhooks)

Maintain audit logs so changes can be traced and diagnosed

Testing & Deployment

Define and execute structured test plans for both SaaS features and automation workflows

Manage deployment across environments (dev, staging, production)

Drive releases from development to production with verification, observability, and rollback plans

Documentation & Operational Visibility

Document all workflows, system architectures, and runbooks

Build operational dashboards and status outputs for team visibility

Maintain mapping systems (SKU mapping, integration object mapping, API documentation)

AI Tooling & Continuous Improvement

Conduct internal audits of AI usage and tooling opportunities

Prototype new automation capabilities including AI-powered agents and chat-driven workflows

Evaluate and recommend tools and processes that improve team productivity



BASIC & SOFT SKILLS

Self-Directed Problem Solver — You research, troubleshoot, and find answers independently before escalating. Google, documentation, and AI tools are your first line of defense.

Time Management — You show up on time for meetings, hit deadlines, and communicate early if timelines shift.

Independent Worker / Self-Starter — You do not need daily supervision to stay productive and on task.

Strong Written Communication — You can explain technical decisions, write clear documentation, and communicate status updates without being asked.

Ownership Mentality — If you built it, you own it. Bugs, performance, uptime — it's yours until it's handed off.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

First 30 Days:

Onboarded to all systems (n8n, GHL, WooCommerce, ClickUp, Supabase, Vercel)

Shipped at least one small internal tool or meaningful feature

Taken over and stabilized existing automation workflows

Established working relationship and communication rhythm with leadership

First 90 Days:

First internal SaaS product in production and being used by the team

All critical automation workflows documented, monitored, and running reliably

Proactively identifying and proposing improvements to systems and processes

Operating independently with minimal direction on day-to-day priorities

First 6 Months:

Multiple internal SaaS tools shipped and iterating based on usage

Automation infrastructure is reliable, observable, and well-documented

You've become the team's go-to for "how should we build this?" questions

Measurable time savings and operational improvements from your work



WORK SCHEDULE & HOLIDAYS

All staff work a split shift so we can communicate on pertinent tasks or have tea
etings as needed with US leadership.

As a company we observe all US holidays, as well as PH public holidays (New Year's Day, Lunar New Year, Maundy Thursday, Good Friday, Bataan Day, Labour Day, Philippines Independence Day, National Heroes' Day, Bonifacio Day, Feast of the Immaculate Conception, Christmas Day, Rizal Day). We work hard and value time with our families.

After 90 day probationary period all staff qualify for leave with proper notice based on employee handbook regulations.



SALARY RANGE

Full Time

$10–$12/hr USD (based upon knowledge, technical abilities, and demonstrated experience)

Performance-based increases as responsibilities grow



PERKS & BENEFITS

Access to paid development tools and platforms (Supabase, Vercel, n8n, API subscriptions)

Access to AI development tools (Claude Pro, Cursor, etc.)

Access to paid training and courses for professional development

Direct access to company leadership — your ideas get heard and implemented fast

Opportunity to architect and build products from the ground up, not just maintain someone else's code

Small team environment where your contributions are visible and valued

Clear path to increased responsibility and compensation as the company scales



HOW TO APPLY

Do not send a generic application. We will ignore it.

Instead, include the following in your application:

A brief introduction — Who you are, what you've built recently, and why this role interests you.

A link to your portfolio, GitHub, or examples of shipped work — We want to see things you've actually built and deployed, not tutorial projects.

Your experience with AI-assisted development — Which tools you use, how they fit into your workflow, and a specific example of how they helped you ship faster or better.

One question you have about the role — This tells us you actually read the posting.

Applications that follow these instructions will be reviewed first.

”

title: Project Coordinator Admin (Hybrid PM + HR Support)
description:
Role Summary

The Project Coordinator is responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing certification and

compliance audit projects (e.g., ISO 27001, ISO 42001, SOC 2). The PM ensures that clients, auditors, and

internal teams are aligned so that each audit is delivered on time, with accuracy, and according to

Certification Body standards.

This role is client-facing, deadline-driven, and highly detail-oriented, requiring excellent communication

and coordination skills.

Full-time remote position, Monday to Friday, aligned with US time zones.

In addition, this role includes HR and recruitment support responsibilities, functioning as a hybrid

position bridging operations and talent acquisition.



Key Responsibilities

- Coordinate audit schedules with clients and auditors

- Serve as the main point of contact for clients

- Communicate clearly and professionally via

- Lead meetings with clients, auditors, and internal teams

- Manage auditor availability and resource allocation

- Provide auditors with needed documents, access, and platform support

- Maintain audit trackers, timelines, and dashboards

- Identify and escalate risks (delays, missing documents, scope issues)

- Ensure adherence to internal SOPs and audit processes

- Support improvements in PM workflows and procedures

- Create presentations and simple Gantt charts

Additional Responsibilities (HR + Operations Support)

- Manage applicant tracking and recruitment pipelines

- Maintain communication with candidates throughout the hiring process



Role Expectation Clarification

This is a dual-function role combining project coordination and HR support. The candidate must be

highly organized, adaptable, and capable of managing priorities across multiple functions.

As the company scales, these responsibilities may be split into separate roles.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – High-Volume Cold Calling (B2G)
description:
Remote / Work From Home | Company based in California

Full-Time | Remote | CST Hours



About Us

Bi-Rite Global is a certified small business and a trusted retailer that supplies a wide range of products to government agencies — including federal, state, and education sectors. Based in California, we are rapidly expanding and focused on delivering quality products, competitive pricing, and reliable service to our government partners. This role offers a full time employment and the opportunity to grow beyond a purely SDR function into a full sales role, if that’s something you’re interested in.



Role Summary

We are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) – High-Volume Cold Calling (B2G) that is responsible for initiating outbound calls to federal, state, and local government agencies to identify contracting opportunities, introduce company services, and qualify decision-makers involved in procurement. The role supports the business development pipeline by generating leads, setting capability briefings, and gathering intelligence on upcoming bids and purchasing needs.



Key Responsibilities

• Conduct high-volume outbound calls to government agency front desks and effectively navigate phone trees to reach relevant departments

• Ask targeted, strategic questions to identify key procurement or purchasing decision-makers (by name and role)

• Introduce company capabilities and differentiate services

• Qualify opportunities based on agency needs, budgets, and timelines

• Schedule capability briefings or discovery meetings for sales/business development teams

• Gather information on upcoming solicitations, RFPs, and purchasing cycles

• Accurately capture and log contact details (name, title,
, direct phone line) into a CRM or tracking spreadsheet

• Professionally handle gatekeepers and objections, including situations where information is not readily disclosed

• Maintain organized and up-to-date contact lists to support ongoing outreach efforts

• Track targets such as contacts reached, meetings set, and opportunities generated



Role Focus

• This position is primarily focused on contact discovery and list building, not full-cycle sales or closing.



Qualifications 

• Professional phone presence and clear communication skills

• Persistent and comfortable with high-volume outbound calling and rejection

• Strong research skills to identify government decision-makers

• Organized with accurate CRM documentation and time management

• Understanding of B2G (Business to Government) sales or ability to learn quickly

• Experience in lead generation, appointment setting, telemarketing, or inside sales

• Exposure to government procurement or public-sector contracting preferred

• Familiarity with RFP/RFQ processes, vendor registrations, and contract vehicles is an advantage

• Able to clearly present company capabilities and services



Work Environment

• 100% Remote (must have reliable work-from-home setup)

• Structured schedule aligned with business hours of government agencies

• Use of approved scripts and compliance-focused communication

• Calls primarily to public offices, vendors, or registered partners

• Performance tracked by call quality, accuracy, and documentation — not aggressive contracting

• Collaboration with compliance, procurement, and contracts teams

• Strict adherence to data privacy, confidentiality, and record-keeping standards

• Professional and formal communication style required

• This is a full time position



Technical Requirements

• Stable internet (minimum 50 Mbps download/upload on fiber connection)

• Backup internet (LTE mobile data or pocket Wi-Fi)

• Laptop or desktop with Intel i5 equivalent or higher, 8GB RAM

• Quality headset with noise-canceling microphone

• Functional webcam



What’s Next

Send your application with the subject line:  “I want this job – SDR”



Include:

1. A 2-minute introduction Loom video about yourself and your cold calling experience.

2. Attach your Loom URL, resume, and any relevant experience samples in this form (
) or
 at 



Important: Only candidates who follow instructions will be considered.

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

, TikTok & Instagram):

title: Hiring Coordinator / Recruitment VA (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
We're hiring a Virtual Assistant to run our recruitment process end-to-end. You'll be the first human candidates talk to, so fluent English and a friendly, professional vibe are non-negotiable.



Here's the work:

? Review incoming applications and shortlist candidates

? Schedule and run intro calls / interviews with candidates

? Ask the right questions, take notes, and pass strong candidates to us

? Keep our hiring board organized — every candidate in the right status, every step tracked

? Follow up with candidates (responses, rejections, next steps)

? Post and update job listings across platforms when needed



What matters to us:

- Fluent English, spoken and written. You'll be on video calls representing us.

- You're organized - nothing falls through the cracks, no candidate gets ghosted.

- You're comfortable on camera and good at making people feel at ease in interviews.

- You can spot talent (and red flags) quickly. Reliable internet, quiet space for calls, working webcam and mic.



Previous recruitment, HR, or VA experience is a big plus but not required if you're sharp and a fast learner.



Part-time, flexible hours, hourly pay. Ongoing role as we keep growing the team.

title: Learning & Enablement Lead
description:
Learning & Enablement Lead

We are looking for a process-obsessed, people-first educator who combines deep expertise in process improvement and SaaS tools with a genuine passion for teaching. This role exists to build a high-performing, well-trained team that understands both how work should flow and how to use ClickUp to make it happen.



About the role

The Learning & Enablement Lead is responsible for designing and delivering training programs that elevate the team's competency across two dimensions — internal process mastery and ClickUp product knowledge. You are equal parts process consultant, curriculum designer, and performance coach. You don't just train people; you build a culture of continuous learning and operational excellence.



What you'll do

1. Assess, document, and improve internal processes to ensure the team operates efficiently and consistently

2. Train the team on ClickUp — from foundational usage to advanced workflows — tailored to different skill levels

3. Design and build learning modules, playbooks, onboarding guides, and reference materials the team can rely on

4. Evaluate individual tea
mbers on product knowledge and internal process understanding through structured assessments

5. Identify skill gaps and create targeted training to close them

6. Maintain and update all training content as processes evolve and the platform changes

7. Uphold a high standard of education quality across everything you deliver



What we're looking for

1. Experience in process improvement, process mapping, or business operations

2. Hands-on knowledge of ClickUp or similar SaaS work management tools

3. A genuine passion for teaching and developing people

4. Strong ability to create clear, structured, and engaging learning content

5. Comfortable evaluating performance and giving constructive, actionable feedback

6. Detail-oriented with a commitment to quality and consistency



What You'll Need

1. A desktop or laptop with specs capable of running multiple applications for virtual meetings and presentations.

2. A quiet home workspace.

3. A noise-cancelling headset.

4. A stable, high-speed internet connection atleast 50Mbps speed.



Why Join Digibeacon?

1. Competitive compensation package.

2. Hybrid work setup with a collaborative, high-performance team.

3. Direct exposure to executives and the chance to contribute to operational strategy and growth.

4. Hands-on experience with modern SaaS tools, data-driven reporting, and digital transformation projects.



How to Apply

1. Complete the sign-up form to process your application.

2. Only applicants who complete the form will be reviewed.

3. Apply here: 
.com/digibeaconcareers

title: Social Media & Content Amplification Specialist
description:
About Us

We are building The Health Files, a cinematic, investigative health media series focused on complex, controversial, and often unresolved topics in medicine and public health. This is not typical content—it is long-form, documentary-style storytelling designed for depth, credibility, and impact .



Our challenge is not content creation—we already have that. 

Our challenge is distribution, amplification, and reach.



Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced social media professional who understands how to push content—not just post it.

This is a part-time role (~5 hours/day) focused on:

* Strategic distribution

* Targeted outreach

* Audience growth

* Content amplification across platforms

You will be responsible for ensuring our content reaches the right audiences, conversations, and influencers at scale.



Key Responsibilities

1. Strategic Content Distribution

* Publish and optimize content across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X, and other platforms

* Adapt content format per platform (long-form vs short-form vs clips)

* Write high-performing captions, hooks, and descriptions



2. Amplification & Growth Execution

* Identify and engage:

    * Influencers

    * Niche communities

    * Topic-specific audiences (health, policy, science, etc.)

* Proactively distribute content into:

    * Relevant threads, groups, and conversations

    * Comment sections of high-traffic posts

    * Community platforms (Reddit, X threads, etc.)

* Build repeatable systems for content amplification



3. Outreach & Relationship Building

* Reach out to creators, pages, and communities for collaboration or sharing

* Build a network of amplification partners over time

* Track who engages and double down on high-performing relationships



4. Audience Engagement & Positioning

* Manage and respond to comments with intention (not generic replies)

* Guide conversations in a way that increases visibility and credibility

* Identify emerging narratives and insert content strategically



5. Performance Optimization

* Track and analyze performance (views, CTR, engagement, shares)

* Identify what is working and iterate quickly

* Test hooks, formats, posting times, and distribution strategies



Ideal Candidate

* Based in the Philippines

* 2–5 years of experience in social media, digital marketing, or content growth

* Proven experience growing or promoting content (not just managing accounts)

* Strong understanding of:

    * YouTube growth and distribution

    * Short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

    * X 
) and/or Reddit amplification strategies

* Comfortable with manual outreach and proactive engagement

* Strong written English

* Highly organized, responsive, and execution-focused



This Role Is NOT For Someone Who

* Only schedules posts and waits for results

* Has no experience with outreach or growth tactics

* Prefers passive social media management



Nice to Have

* Experience promoting long-form YouTube content

* Familiarity with health, science, or investigative content

* Basic video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

* Experience working with creators or media brands



Working Structure

* Part-time: ~5 hours/day

* Remote

* Flexible hours with some coordination overlap

* Opportunity to grow into a full-time growth or lead role



What Success Looks Like

* Measurable growth in reach, engagement, and subscribers

* Content consistently entering relevant conversations and communities

* Strong amplification through influencers and niche networks

* Clear improvement in performance across videos over time



Compensation & Performance Incentives



Base Salary (Part-Time, ~5 hours/day):

$500/month USD (30,000 Philippine peso per month)



Performance Bonus (Monthly)

This role includes a performance-based bonus of 5,000 – 10,000 Philippine peso per month, tied directly to measurable growth and amplification results.



Bonus will be awarded based on:



Content Reach & Views Growth - Consistent increase in views across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and X

Audience Growth - Net new subscribers and followers across platforms

Content Amplification - Successful placement of content within relevant communities, threads, and influencer networks

Engagement Quality - Increase in meaningful comments, shares, and discussions



How to Apply

Please include:

* A short introduction

* Examples of accounts or content you’ve helped grow

* A brief explanation of how you would promote a 45-minute YouTube documentary

title: Bookkeeper (QuickBooks Setup + Backlog Cleanup + Monthly Close) — Remote (PH)
description:
Bookkeeper (QuickBooks Setup + Backlog Cleanup + Monthly Close) — Remote (PH)

Pay: $4–$6 USD/hour (midpoint $5)

Hours: 25–40 hrs/week (contractor) | Start: ASAP

Location: Remote (PH)



About the role



We need a real bookkeeper to clean up and capture everything properly. Your job is to go through past bank statements + receipts, enter and categorise transactions, attach proofs, and get us to a clean monthly close. This needs to be accurate and audit-ready so we can hand it to an Australian accountant later.



What you’ll be doing



• Import and reconcile bank statements (including backlog)

• Enter/categorise all expenses and income correctly

• Attach receipts/invoices to transactions (capture system must be consistent)

• Set up and run QuickBooks (preferred) or propose an alternative if you have a better system

• Build a simple monthly close process: reconciliation + clean monthly summary

• Keep everything organised and searchable (folders + naming + notes)



What we’re looking for (non-negotiable)



• Proven bookkeeping experience (not “admin who can learn”)

• Strong QuickBooks/Xero/QBO experience

• High accuracy, consistency, and comfort with messy backlogs

• Can build a repeatable system and stick to it



About MrYouWho



• Global tech & lifestyle media network

• 16 YouTube channels + 14 Amazon storefronts

• Social across all major platforms + two affiliate websites

• 260,000+ subscribers network-wide, 170,000+ daily views

• $1.25M in Amazon sales last year

Primary channel: 
/mryouwho



Proof + trial (important)



Shortlisted candidates will do a short paid trial task. We will verify experience.



How to apply (3 questions only)



Quick Apply / CV-only applications will not be reviewed. Answer these 3 questions in order:

1. What bookkeeping tools have you used (QBO/Xero/Sheets) and what type of business? (3 examples)

2. How do you handle backlog cleanup + reconciliation? (5 steps)

3. What does your monthly close deliverable include for a founder? (bullet list)



Add DETAILS at the end.

title: Immigration Documentation & Evidence Admin
description:
I am seeking a highly organized, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to manage the complex data entry and evidentiary documentation required for high-stakes immigration filings. 

You will be responsible for ensuring that thousands of data points—from recruitment logs to personal history records—are organized, accurate, and "audit-ready" for government review. 

This role requires a professional who thrives on detail, systematic file organization, and strict compliance with government procedures.

Key Responsibilities:

• Detailed Data Entry: Key-in and cross-reference thousands of details from raw sources (resumes, identity documents, history logs) into Master Excel and Word templates with 100?curacy.

• Audit-Ready Record Keeping: Organize and manage evidentiary records, including date-stamped screenshots, communication logs, and supporting documents to prove compliance with government timelines.

• Information Synthesis: Review high volumes of applicant or client data and summarize them into professional formats that meet strict regulatory standards.

• Systematic File Management: Maintain a flawless digital filing system across multiple platforms, ensuring every piece of evidence is labeled, dated, and easy to retrieve for government audits.

• Quality Control: Perform self-audits to ensure names, dates, and addresses are perfectly consistent across all documentation.

Technical Requirements:

• Expert MS Excel / Google Sheets (formulas, filters, structured data entry).

• Advanced MS Word, Google Drive / OneDrive, and PDF tools (merge, rename, organize).

• Strong proficiency with digital tools: JotForm, E-signature platforms (DocuSign), and Online document sharing.

• Technological Agility: Able to quickly learn and operate systems such as Indeed, Job Bank, and Loom.

• Confidentiality: Absolute discretion in handling sensitive personal data.



Required / Strongly Preferred Experience:

• Hands-on experience with LMIA recruitment processes (Job Bank, Indeed, recruitment logs, screening documentation)

• Experience preparing or organizing immigration-related documents or case files

• Familiarity with compliance-based documentation and audit-ready record keeping

• Background in data entry, bookkeeping, legal admin, or similar detail-oriented roles

Additional Skills (Nice to Have):

• Experience using Canva for simple graphics or social media content.

• Able to assist with basic content posting and administrative tasks as needed.

Work Style & Personality (Critical):

• Active & Proactive Communication: You provide updates and flag issues early without waiting to be asked. You reach out first to confirm receipt of tasks and flag issues immediately.

• Reliable & Responsible: You take ownership of your work and ensure tasks are completed accurately and on time.

• Precision-Obsessed: You carefully review your work to ensure names, dates, and documents are accurate before submission.

• Proactive Problem Solver: If a piece of evidence is missing or a screenshot is blurry, you flag it immediately.

• Highly Communicative: You provide brief, daily "End of Day" (EOD) reports so I always know the status of pending files.

• Deadline-Aware: You understand that government timelines are strict and manage your time to meet filing windows.

title: Meta Ads Video/Creative Editor For E-Commerce Brand
description:
About Us

We are a fast growing direct to consumer e-commerce brand in the gardening niche. We sell a seed starter kit built specifically for people who have tried and failed to grow from seed and we help them finally succeed, but we will target new angles and avatars. We scale aggressively through paid Meta advertising and need a creative who moves just as fast.



What You Will Be Doing: 



Editing high converting Meta ad creatives with a 24 hour turnaround using AI UGC avatar tools, cinematic b-roll generation, and professional voiceover integration.

Creating AI UGC content that looks and feels like real customer testimonials  specifically a relatable everyday mom in her mid to late 40s sharing her genuine gardening failure and redemption story in a way that feels completely authentic and unscripted.

Building VSLs that take viewers from the specific pain of failed seed starting and wasted money through to the relief of finally finding a system that works and converting that emotional journey into purchases.

Cutting b-roll with AI generated footage to create scroll stopping content  specifically empty seed trays, struggling leggy seedlings, effortless product setup, and thriving sprout reveals, maintaining a deliberate visual progression from cool flat failure lighting to warm golden success lighting across every ad.

Testing new hooks, formats, and styles based on performance data, specifically hook rate and hold rate metrics and iterating quickly based on what the numbers tell us.

Adapting quickly to what is working on Meta right now including short form Reels formats, longer emotional storytelling formats, and static image ads depending on what the data is showing.



You Must Have

Proven experience editing Meta ads for e-commerce brands with real sales results to show not just views or engagement but actual purchase driven performance data.

A portfolio of direct response ads that have generated real revenue for direct to consumer e-commerce brands gardening, home, or lifestyle brands preferred.

Hands on experience with AI UGC generation tools specifically Google Veo 3.1 and Higgsfield Kling 3.0 and the ability to prompt effectively for consistent realistic emotional performances across multiple clips. HeyGen or Arcads experience also considered.

Strong understanding of VSL structure, hook, problem, solution, proof, CTA, and specifically the ability to build emotionally driven VSLs that follow a pain to redemption arc rather than a features and benefits structure.

Experience with ElevenLabs or similar AI voiceover tools and the ability to generate and sync natural sounding conversational voiceovers that sound like a real person not a corporate narrator.

Ability to deliver a finished ad in under 24 hours without sacrificing emotional consistency or brand voice.

Deep knowledge of what resonates with female audiences specifically women 35 to 65 in the home and gardening space who respond to authentic emotional storytelling, personal failure and redemption narratives, and specific financial pain points rather than generic product features.



Bonus Points

Experience editing ads in the gardening, home, kitchen, or family lifestyle niche.

Familiarity with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve for final assembly, captioning, transitions, and sound design.

Understanding of Meta ad fatigue and creative refresh strategy  specifically how to produce enough creative volume and diversity to give Meta's Andromeda algorithm sufficient data to optimize across multiple concepts simultaneously.

Experience with Advantage Plus campaign structures and how creative diversity affects algorithm performance.

Understanding of hook rate and hold rate metrics and how to use them to diagnose creative problems and inform the next iteration.

Experience producing both long form emotional storytelling ads and short form Reels and Stories formats for the same product and audience.



How To Apply

Send us your portfolio and links to past work. Include at least one example of a Meta ad you edited that generated real e-commerce sales. If you have samples using Google Veo 3.1, Higgsfield Kling 3.0, or ElevenLabs include those as well. s Specifically any examples of AI UGC avatar generation or cinematic b-roll production. Tell us which tools you have the most experience with, how long you have been using each one, what e-commerce brands or niches you have produced ads for, and what your typical turnaround time is from script to finished ad. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: AI Influencer Content Creator
description:
We run and scale AI character pages - fictional influencers built from the ground up using AI-generated visuals, scripts, and video content.



We currently operate 2 active pages and are scaling to 5+ within the next 30 days.

This is a fast-moving creative operation. We move quick, build quick, and we're looking for someone who can keep up.



Compensation

$750/month base

Performance bonuses available based on output quality and consistency.

Growth path: As we scale, top performers will move into a manager role — overseeing and training new AI content staff. This comes with a base salary increase.



Schedule and Availability

Full-time, 28 hours per week

Must be available and responsive during active hours

24-hour turnaround on all assigned content

Good English communication is required - written and verbal



Daily/Weekly SOP'S:



Daily Content Output

Produce 3 videos per day across assigned AI character pages - on brief, on time, every time

AI Image & Visual Production

Generate high-quality, photorealistic AI character visuals using tools like Midjourney, Higgsfield, Leonardo, and others

Video Scripting & Hooks

Write scripts and hooks for each reel - you understand pacing, pattern interrupts, and what makes someone stop scrolling

Creative Development

Pitch new character ideas, content angles, and visual directions - not just execute, but contribute

Team Collaboration

Work closely with the team, flag issues early, and communicate clearly on progress and blockers



You Are a Fit If:



You have hands-on experience with AI tools - Midjourney, Kling, Higgsfield, Runway, Leonardo, and similar

You understand what makes AI influencer content perform on short-form platforms

You are consistent - 3 videos a day is the standard, not the stretch goal

You take initiative and bring ideas, not just wait for instructions

You want to grow - managing and training a team is where this role goes for the right person

You communicate clearly and meet deadlines without being chased

description:

 interviews with be arranged with selected candidates.

title: YouTube AI Content Creator and Manager
description:
We are seeking a YouTube AI Content Creator who can leverage AI Agent tools to research, collect data, and transform insights into engaging, high-quality videos. The ideal candidate will have a strong sense of storytelling, visual creativity, and hands-on experience in video editing and channel management.



Key Responsibilities

* Use AI Agent tools to automate workflows, streamline research, and organize data efficiently

* Handle graphic design, scriptwriting, footage collection, AI voiceovers, video editing, and background music integration

* Create eye-catching thumbnails, SEO-optimized descriptions, and tags to boost visibility and engagement

* Set up and manage a YouTube channel, including profile design, cover art, logo, intro/outro, and ongoing content updates

* Ensure all content complies with YouTube’s policies and community guidelines



If you’re a creative professional who can blend AI innovation with YouTube storytelling, we’d love to work with you.

title: DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist
description:
DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist



(High Salary Growth · with Huge Performance Bonuses · Long-Term Role)



No Beginners — Only Serious, Skilled Editors Apply



We are hiring a full-time, highly skilled premier pro video editor & marketing-focused creative who understands viral video creation at a deep level and can produce multiple high-quality, high-retention videos every single day.



This role is for someone who wants to grow with a team, build a long-term career, and be rewarded heavily for performance. The better your videos perform, the more you earn.



This is a highly rewarded role with massive long-term income potential for the right individual. Including huge extra benefits for top loyal perfomers





What We’re Looking For



We want a serious, dedicated editor who:

• Understands how viral videos work — especially on TikTok, Reels, and modern short-form platforms



• Can produce multiple 4-8 high-quality videos daily using Adobe Premiere Pro



• Has strong marketing instincts and understands how to create “watchable,” high-retention content



• Is motivated to grow their career, earn more, and become a key part of our long-term team

• Is committed, reliable, and consistent with daily output



• Wants a full-time role with massive salary growth opportunities



This position is for professionals only — no beginners, no part-timers, no hobby editors.







Salary & Growth



Starting Range: $400–$500 - can lead up to $1,500/month

(Depending on skills, experience, creativity, and daily output)



• Salary increases are based on your permanent

• Bonuses rewarded for high-performing viral videos

• The more the content grows, the more your salary grows

• Long-term potential for very high monthly pay for top performers

• Travel opportunities and niche-specific projects available as you grow within the company



- To be part of a multinational team that cares about you, and be part of a team not just staff



We only hire people who want a full-time, long-term home — not freelancers jumping from project to project.







Your Responsibilities:



4-8 videos Daily Video Editing & Production (duration anwher from 10secs to 2 mins+ )



• Produce multiple short-form videos per day for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts



• Edit in Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable)



• Add creative transitions, pacing, captions, sound design, and storytelling



• Create viral-style videos without relying on generic templates



• Improve based on performance data & feedback



Marketing & Creative Strategy

• Work with the team to develop ideas, concepts, and hooks



• Help craft videos that sell, entertain, educate, or retain attention



• Understand how to market a physical product through content



• Be resourceful and solution-oriented with limited footage



• Create scenes using alternative footage, B-roll, and creative storytelling if clips are missing



Collaboration

• Work daily with our team (creators, assistants, strategists)

• Help turn raw ideas into powerful, viral-ready videos

• Bring your own suggestions, creativity, and marketing mind to every project







 What Makes This Role Unique:

• You will help grow a fast-scaling brand with huge global potential

• Long-term, stable, career-building opportunity

• You will have the freedom to grow, lead, and experiment creatively

• Exposure to different niches, products, and video styles

• Uploads of product footage will be provided, but creativity is required — when footage is missing, we adapt and find solutions

• Massive future salary growth for the right editor

• Opportunities to travel with the team as operations expand in couple of months from now



This is a job for someone who wants to build a real career, not just “edit videos.”







Ideal Candidate Profile

• Strong Adobe Premiere Pro skills

• Deep understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts virality

• Fast, efficient, and consistent daily editor

• Creative thinker with marketing instincts

• Problem solver who can work with limited footage

• Team player with great communication

• Long-term mindset with the ambition to grow inside the company

• Able to take feedback and improve quickly

• Full-time availability (no other jobs on the side)



 To Apply



Please send:

1. Your best short-form video examples (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

2. A short message explaining your experience with viral content

3. Your expected salary range

4. Confirmation you can work full-time, long-term

5. Your availability and commitment level



?

 Final Note



This is an exciting, high-growth opportunity for a dedicated editor who wants to rise, earn more, and build a powerful career inside a fast-growing company.

If you’re ready to work full-time, produce high-performing videos daily, and grow with a long-term team — we want to hear from you.



Only committed, professional video editors should apply.

title: Email Newsletter VA (Beehiiv / Email Marketing / List Management)
description:
About the Role

This role is internally titled Content Operations Specialist, and is responsible for executing and maintaining our newsletter and content distribution systems across the business. We are hiring a detail-oriented candidate to initially help set up and manage two professional newsletters—one for a business podcast and one for a law firm.

This is a systems and execution role, not a writing or marketing strategy position. You will be part of a remote podcast team and will work directly with our PH-based Podcast Producer & Operations Lead, with initial coordination from the US-based podcast host.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Responsible For

Phase 1: Setup (First 2–4 Weeks)

• Set up two newsletters in Beehiiv (podcast + law firm)

• Configure
 templates and formatting

• Import and organize contact lists (from CRM tools—GHL for the podcast, and Monday for the law firm)

• Apply tags and segmentation to subscriber lists

• Assist with
/domain setup (SPF, DKIM, etc.), if needed

• Embed signup forms on website pages (Webflow)

Phase 2: Ongoing Management

• Format and schedule newsletters (content will be provided)

• Ensure
s are clean, accurate, and properly structured

• Test
s before sending

• Maintain subscriber lists and tags

• Coordinate with podcast producer and ops lead

• Help keep the system organized and running smoothly

________________________________________

Required Experience

• Experience with
 marketing tools (Beehiiv, Mailchimp, Klaviyo, ConvertKit, ActiveCampaign, etc.)

• Experience managing
 campaigns or newsletters

• Comfortable working with subscriber lists (imports, exports, tagging)

• Strong attention to detail

• Good written and spoken English

________________________________________

Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience with Beehiiv

• Experience with Webflow (embedding forms)

• Experience with 
 (or Zapier)

• Familiarity with CRM tools GHL and Monday

________________________________________

Tools We Use

• Beehiiv (newsletter platform) – this will be a brand new account setup

• Webflow (website)

• GHL (CRM)

• 
 (CRM/project tracking)

• 
 (automation, later phase)

________________________________________

Work Details

• Remote (Philippines preferred)

• Part-time (5–15 hours/week to start)

• Flexible schedule (must meet deadlines for scheduled
s)

• Must be responsive within 24 hours

________________________________________

Compensation

• $6–$8/hour depending on experience

________________________________________

Who You Are

• Organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working with systems and tools

• Able to follow structured processes

• Reliable and consistent

• Proactive in identifying issues

________________________________________

Success in This Role Looks Like

•
s go out on time, every time

• No broken links or formatting issues

• Subscriber lists are clean and organized

• Minimal supervision needed after onboarding

________________________________________

IMPORTANT: How to Apply

Please provide:

• A brief summary of your experience with
 marketing tools

• Which platforms you’ve used (Beehiiv, Mailchimp, Klaviyo, ConvertKit, etc.)

• Your availability (hours per week)

Then answer the following questions directly in your application:

1. If you were setting up a newsletter from scratch (using Beehiiv or another platform), what are the top 3 things you would do to make it easy to manage and scale over time?

2. Describe your standard step-by-step process for preparing and sending an
 newsletter to 1,000+ subscribers.

3. How have you used a newsletter to help grow an audience—either by increasing new subscribers or improving engagement? Please give 1–2 specific examples (focus on actions you personally implemented).

________________________________________

We are looking for someone reliable who can help us build a clean, scalable newsletter system and manage it consistently over time.

title: Video Editor/Design Creator
description:
Hello! My name is Ty. I have a background in video production and Motion graphics. Most recently I’ve had some different editing needs that have come up, and I am looking for a reliable editor that I can work with.  I work as a full-time marketing specialist and video producer but due to my entrepreneur endeavors have a need for additional editor to get things done. I have been doing production/design for about 10 years and look to build a long term relationship with an editor due to my line of work being so consistent. 



This role will start around $520 a month and will increase to more full time wage over next several months as the role stabilizes and alignment is solid on both sides.  



Will need around 2 to 4 videos/small projects completed/worked on per week. (Sometimes a little more complex, mostly very simple edits with all the footage provided as well as project files and selects broken time on the timelines). The work will be stable and consistent with opportunity to get creative if you’d like. 



Project Types: 

-corporate videos

-Short ads

-short highlights with small interview and broll

-Graphics, posters, banners, thumbnails, etc 



Very doable and easy stuff, not super graphics heavy. 



You’ll be an extension of me, so we’ll be working on things collaboratively sometimes. (Sharing project files and assets back and forth)



I just need a RELIABLE editor/designer so that I can get things up to speed, and then we can scale and increase wages .



I really look forward to filling this role and growing with the best individual for it. 

Type of person best for this role. 

- Organized

- Follows directions

- Meets deadlines

- Communicates effectively 

- Has Editing/Design capability 

- Has lots of common sense

- Pays attention to detail

- Can follow a basic post production/editing workflow

title: Have a Business Idea? Let’s Build It Together
description:
Have a business idea? Or just want to be part of building something from scratch?

I’m looking for someone in the Philippines who wants more than just a typical VA job. I want someone who thinks, creates, and wants to grow something real.

If you’ve ever thought:

“I have ideas but no opportunity”

“I want to build something, not just complete tasks”

“I want to be part of something early”

This is for you.

What I’m looking for:

Reliable and hungry to grow

Strong communication (English)

Creative thinker (marketing, systems, ideas)

Willing to learn and take initiative

What we’ll do:

Share ideas back and forth

Test simple business concepts

Build and grow something together

You’ll help with outreach, social media, and operations

Everything we build and do will be in good faith, ethical, and fully legal. No shortcuts, no shady tactics — we’re building something real the right way.

This is not just a job — it’s an opportunity to be part of something early and grow with it.

To apply, send:

A short intro about you

Any business ideas you have (simple is fine)

How much it will cost to build it

Why you want this opportunity

And most important: ???? If we built a business together, how would you get clients and actually make money? Be specific.

If it’s a fit, we’ll build something real.

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
Hey all,

I’m looking for a full-time video editor to join me long-term and grow together.



You’ll be editing a mix of:



Client work (paid social / ads / brand content)

My personal content (short-form + YouTube)



If you’re into tech, luxury, and design-forward content, this will be a great fit.



Scope:

A few client videos per month

~5–10 short-form videos for my personal pages

2–3 YouTube videos per month



What I’m Looking For:

Strong understanding of short-form pacing, retention, and storytelling

Ability to match a clean, elevated, cinematic style (not generic UGC)

Detail-oriented (text overlays, timing, sound design matter)

Fast turnaround and strong communication (24-48hr turn around times) 

Able to handle large 4K/6K files smoothly



Bonus if you:

Understand tech and luxury product content

Have a strong sense of what performs on TikTok and Instagram

Can think beyond just editing (ideas, structure, improvements)



Style References

Please review these before applying to understand the level of quality and style









Also review my content to match tone and 
 (Instagram / TikTok / YouTube)



Please include:

Your portfolio (must include relevant work)

A short note on why you want to work with me specifically

Your monthly rate

Your editing software 



Bonus (highly recommended):

If you’re able to go above and beyond, recreate a few seconds of one of the reference styles above. This will immediately stand out.



Please don't apply if:

You rely heavily on templates or CapCut-style edits and can’t build a clean, original look

You don’t understand pacing, retention, or how to structure content for performance

You miss deadlines or struggle with communication

You’re not comfortable working with large 4K/6K files or higher-end workflows

You need constant direction and can’t take initiative or think creatively

You’re only looking for short-term or freelance-only work (this is a long-term role)

You don’t have a strong portfolio that reflects the style referenced above





Thank you! Looking forward to connecting soon
